azubiEmptyHint: Mpaghara ọmụmụ gị ga-egosi ebe a
stuGoalsEmpty: Enweghị ebumnuche ugbu a – pịa + tinye
noteContentPlaceholder: Tinye nkọwa klas gị ebe a…
noteContentRequired: Biko tinye aha ma ọ bụ ọdịnaya
schSubtitle: Nweta ngwa ngwa na ọdụ ụlọ akwụkwọ gị
defaultSlotsHint: A na-eji ha na usoro ọhụrụ
learnLibrarySubtitle: Ahaziri site na folda isiokwu nwere isi mmalite ntụkwasị obi maka ụlọ akwụkwọ na mahadum.
learnHomeschoolSubtitle: Wuo usoro ọmụmụ ulo, họrọ ụlọ kwesịtara, ma soro atụmatụ izu uka gị.
learnEmpty: Enweghị mpaghara mmụta dị maka ọnọdụ a.
studyModeDescription: Họrọ ma usoro mmụta gị emeziri maka ụlọ akwụkwọ ma ọ bụ mahadum.
chatCreateFirstRoom: Mepụta ọnụ ụlọ nkata mbụ gị.
chatSelectPrompt: Họrọ nkata ka ịmalite izi ozi
learnBookmarkEmpty: Enweghị ibe edokọbara. Kaa otu isiokwu ka ịmaliteghachi ma emechaa.
learnInAppSubtitle: Ihe niile dị n'okpuru bụ nke a na-eji eme ihe ozugbo na ngwa na-emegheghị njikọ mpụga.
learnExplainSchool: pụtara ịmụta otu isi echiche n'otu oge, wee jiri ihe atụ dị mfe mee ya.
learnExplainUni: pụtara ịghọta echiche bụ́ isi, ihe mere o ji dị mkpa, na ebe a na-etinye ya n’ihe ọmụmụ ma ọ bụ omume.
learnStep1: Gụọ nkọwa dị nkenke otu ugboro.
learnStep2: Dee echiche bụ isi n'okwu nke gị.
learnStep3: Dozie otu obere ọrụ wee lelee mmejọ.
learnMiniTaskAndWhy: ma kọwaa ihe mere o ji dabara.
learnHintSimple: Ndụmọdụ: Ọ bụrụ na ọ na-esiri gị ike, kewaa isiokwu ahụ n'ime obere akụkụ ma jiri otu ihe atụ na-emegharị nke ọ bụla.
learnExamBasicsHint: Ụdị nlebara anya: ntọala siri ike nke mbụ, emesia obere usoro omume.
learnExamBalancedHint: Ụdị mgbado anya: nghọta ziri ezi, omume na nyocha.
learnExamHardHint: Ụdị mgbado anya: Ọrụ ụdị ule nwere nrụgide oge yana nzaghachi ngwa ngwa.
demoModeEnabled: Agbanyere ụkpụrụ ngosi. A gafechara nkwenye maka nnwale.
learnSelectSubject: Họrọ isiokwu dị n'elu ka ịmalite mmụta
notifMarkRead: Kanye ihe niile ka ọ na-agụ
dashNoHomeschool: Hazie usoro ihe omume na Mụta inweta ntụzịaka ebe a.
emptyTasksDesc: Tinye ihe aga-eme iji soro ọrụ gị na oge imecha gị.
emptyFilesDesc: Bulite ihe ọmụmụ, ndetu, ma ọ bụ akụrụngwa.
emptyGradesDesc: Akara gị ga-apụta ebe a ozugbo agbakwunyere.
emptyCoursesDesc: Jiri koodu jikọọ usoro ọmụmụ dị adị ma ọ bụ mepụta nke gị.
emptyMessagesDesc: Malite mkparịta ụka ọhụrụ iji jikọọ na ndị ọzọ.
joinCourseDesc: Tinye koodu nkuzi nwere mkpụrụedemede isii n'aka onye nkuzi ma ọ bụ nwa klas gị.
joinCourseInvalidCode: Biko tinye koodu nkuzi bara uru.
courseNoDesc: Enweghị nkọwa dị maka nkuzi a.
tasksNothingInFilter: Ọ nweghị ihe dị na nzacha a
tasksAddHint: Tinye ihe aga-eme iji soro ọrụ gị na oge imecha gị.
settingsAppearanceSub: Isiokwu gbara ọchịchịrị na-arụ ọrụ yana kachasị maka itinye uche.
plannerEntryRequired: Ụbọchị, oge na isiokwu dị mkpa.
settingsStudyRemindersSub: Na-echetara gị mgbe oge ruru ịmụ ihe
settingsDataLocal: A na-echekwa data niile na mpaghara
teacherToolsSubtitle: Jikwaa ohere klaasị, kpọchie ụdị ụmụ akwụkwọ wee kesaa ọdịnaya ọmụmụ na-enyeghị ụmụ akwụkwọ ikike onye nkuzi.
teacherClassControlDesc: Mkpọchi nwa akwụkwọ na-agbanwe n'etiti ọnọdụ ụlọ akwụkwọ na mahadum ma mee ka klaasị lekwasị anya na usoro ọmụmụ dị ugbu a.
teacherLockSuccess: Ụdị klaasị akpọchiri maka ụmụ akwụkwọ.
teacherShareMaterialDesc: Bipụta ihe omume ma ọ bụ ndetu ndeghari ngwa ngwa maka klaasị gị.
invitesLoadError: Enweghị ike ibunye akwụkwọ ịkpọ òkù.
settingsCountrySub: Na-eme ka ọ̀tụ̀tụ̀ ọkwa ọkwa, ọkwa ụlọ akwụkwọ, na usoro nọmba na usoro agụmakwụkwọ gị.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_name: Algebra na-eji mkpụrụedemede na akara iji nọchite anya ọnụọgụ ma kọwaa mmekọrịta. Ọ bụ ọkpụkpụ azụ nke mgbakọ na mwepụ niile dị elu. Ị na-amụta iji dozie nha anya, rụọ ọrụ na mgbanwe, wee chọta ụkpụrụ amaghị ama site na usoro ezi uche dị na ya.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_desc: Dozie: 3x - 5 = 10. Dee nzọụkwụ ọ bụla. Wee lelee azịza gị site n'ịgbanwe x azụ.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_task: Agbanwe (dị ka x ma ọ bụ y) na-anọchi anya ọnụọgụ amaghị.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp0: Otu nha na-egosi na okwu abụọ hà nhata (dịka 2x + 3 = 7).
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp1: Iji dozie nha anya, mee otu ọrụ ahụ n'akụkụ abụọ ka ikewapụ mgbanwe ahụ.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp2: To solve an equation, do the same operation on both sides to isolate the variable.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp3: Ọrụ na-esetịpụ ntinye ọ bụla na otu mmepụta kpọmkwem: f(x) = 2x pụtara ntinye okpukpu abụọ.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp4: Polynomials bụ okwu nwere ọtụtụ okwu: 3x² + 2x - 1.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_desc: Ọmụmụ geometry na-akpụzi, akụkụ, na mmekọrịta gbasara ohere. Ọ na-akuziri gị ịtụgharị uche n'ụzọ ezi uche dị na ya wee gosipụta nkwupụta site na iji nkọwa na theorems. Geometry na-apụta na nhazi ụlọ, nka, injinia na ndụ kwa ụbọchị.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_task: Triangle ziri ezi nwere ụkwụ nke 3 cm na 4 cm. Gbakọọ hypotenuse site na iji a² + b² = c².
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp0: Ebe enweghị nha; ahịrị na-agbatị agwụghị agwụ n'akụkụ abụọ ahụ.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp1: A na-atụ akụkụ na ogo: akụkụ nri = 90 °, akụkụ kwụ ọtọ = 180 °.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp2: Nchikota akụkụ na triangle ọ bụla bụ 180 ° mgbe niile.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp3: Theorem Pythagorean: na triangle aka nri, a² + b² = c² (c bụ hypotenuse).
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp4: Ụdị ihe jikọrọ ọnụ na nha na ọdịdị ya; Ụdị ndị yiri ya nwere otu akụkụ mana nha dị iche iche.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_name: Statistics na ihe gbasara nke puru omume
learnSch_mathematics_f2_desc: Ndekọ ọnụ ọgụgụ na-enyere gị aka ịnakọta, hazie, na ịkọwa data iji nweta nkwubi okwu. Ihe puru omume na-atụ etu ihe omume si dị. Ha jikọtara ọnụ dị mkpa na sayensị, akụnụba, na ime mkpebi kwa ụbọchị.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_task: Tụgharịa a die: kedu ihe puru omume ịnweta ọnụọgụ ọnụọgụgụ? Gosi mgbako.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp0: Pụtara = nchikota nke ụkpụrụ niile ÷ ọnụọgụ ụkpụrụ.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp1: Ọkara = ọnụ ahịa etiti mgbe a na-ahazi data.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp2: Ihe puru omume nke mmemme = (nsonaazụ dị mma) ÷ (mkpokọta arụpụta).
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp3: Ihe ndekọ akụkọ ihe mere eme na-egosi nkesa data ugboro ugboro.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp4: Mmekọrịta na-egosi ma mgbanwe abụọ na-agakọ ọnụ - mana ọ bụghị ihe kpatara ya.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_name: Trigonometry || Trigonometry na-amụ mmekọrịta dị n'etiti akụkụ na ogologo akụkụ na triangles. A na-eji ya na physics, engineering, igodo, na egwu. Ọrụ atọ dị mkpa - sine, cosine, na tangent - jikọọ akụkụ na oke nke akụkụ.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_desc: Ubube dị mita 5 n'ogologo na-adabere na mgbidi na 60º. Ego ole ka ọ na-eru? Jiri mmehie (60°) = √3/2.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_task: Na triangle aka nri: mmehie (θ) = opposite/hypotenuse, cos(θ) = n'akụkụ/hypotenuse, tan (θ) = megidere/n'akụkụ.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_kp1: okirikiri otu ahụ na-agbatị trig ruo akụkụ niile gafere 90°.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_kp2: Sine na cosine bụ nke oge: ha na-emegharị kwa 360° (2π radians).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_name: Tiori ọnụọgụgụ na-enyocha njirimara nke ọnụọgụgụ - ọkachasị ọnụọgụ ọnụọgụgụ, nkewa, na imepụta ihe. Ọ bụ otu n'ime ngalaba mgbakọ na mwepụ kacha ochie yana n'okpuru nzuzo nzuzo ọgbara ọhụrụ.
learnSch_mathematics_f4_desc: Number theory studies the properties of integers — especially prime numbers, divisibility, and factorization. It is one of the oldest branches of mathematics and underlies modern cryptography.
learnSch_mathematics_f4_task: Chọta GCD(48, 18) site na iji Euclidean algọridim. Mgbe ahụ chọta LCM(48, 18).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp0: Ọnụọgụgụ isi nwere kpọmkwem ihe abụọ: 1 na onwe ya (dịka ọmụmaatụ 2, 3, 5, 7, 11).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp1: Enwere ike dee integer ọ bụla> 1 dị ka ngwaahịa pụrụ iche nke primes (isi mmalite nke mgbakọ na mwepụ).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp2: Iwu nkewa: a na-ekewa ọnụọgụgụ site na 3 ma ọ bụrụ na a ga-ekewa nchikota nke ọnụọgụ ya site na 3.
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp3: GCD (onye nkesa na-ahụkarị): ọnụ ọgụgụ kacha ukwuu na-eke ma. Jiri Euclidean algọridim: GCD(a, b) = GCD(b, a mod b).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp4: LCM (ọtụtụ kacha nta): LCM(a, b) = (a × b) ÷ GCD(a, b).
learnSch_mathematics_f5_desc: Vector nwere ma ịdị ukwuu (nha) na ntụzịaka. Vectors dị mkpa na physics (ike, ọsọ) na mgbakọ na mwepụ dị elu. Enwere ike ịgbakwunye, wepụ, na tụọ ha ọnụ, ha na-ejikọta ya na oghere 3D.
learnSch_mathematics_f5_task: Nyere gị = (2, 3) na v = (4, -1), chọta: (a) u + v, (b) |u|, (c) u · v. Ị na v ọ̀ dị n'otu n'otu?
learnSch_mathematics_f5_kp0: Edere vector dị ka akụ ma ọ bụ dị ka nhazi: v = (3, 4) pụtara nkeji atọ ziri ezi, nkeji anọ elu.
learnSch_mathematics_f5_kp2: Mgbakwunye vector: (a, b) + (c, d) = (a+c, b+d). Mwepụ bụ otu ihe ahụ na mwepu.
learnSch_mathematics_f5_kp4: Ngwaahịa ntụpọ: (a, b)·(c, d) = ac + bd. Ọ bụrụ na ngwaahịa ntụpọ = 0, vectors na-adakarị.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_desc: Usoro bụ ndepụta nọmba ahaziri ahazi na-agbaso ụkpụrụ. Usoro bụ nchikota usoro nke usoro. Ha abụọ na-apụta n'oge mgbakọ na mwepụ na nhazi ụwa n'ezie (uto, ego, physics).
learnSch_mathematics_f6_task: Usoro na-amalite 2, 6, 18, 54, … (a) Ọ bụ mgbakọ na mwepụ ma ọ bụ geometric? (b) Chọta okwu nke asaa. (c) Chọta nchikota nke okwu ise mbu.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp0: Usoro mgbakọ na mwepụ: okwu ọ bụla na-adị iche site na ọnụọgụ ego d (ọdịiche nkịtị). aₙ = a₁ + (n-1) d.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp1: Nchịkọta usoro mgbakọ na mwepụ: Sₙ = n/2 · (a₁ + aₙ).
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp2: Usoro geometric: a na-amụba okwu ọ bụla site na nha r. aₙ = a₁ · r⁻¹.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp3: Nchikota nke usoro geometric: Sₙ = a₁ · (1 - rⁿ) / (1 - r) maka r ≠ 1.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp4: Usoro geometric na-enweghị ngwụcha na-agbakọ na S = a₁ / (1 − r) mgbe |r| < 1. || Usoro mgbakọ na mwepụ
learnSch_mathematics_f7_name: Ọmụmụ ihe mgbako dị iche iche ọnụego mgbanwe na mkpọda akụkụ. Mwepụta ahụ na-agwa gị otu ọrụ na-agbanwe ngwa ngwa n'oge ọ bụla. Ọ bụ isi na physics, engineering, Economics, na niile quantitative sayensị.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_desc: Chọta mwepu nke f(x) = 4x³ - 2x² + 5. Mgbe ahụ chọta ebe mkpọda ahụ hà zero.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_task: Mwepụta f′(x) na-enye mkpọda ahịrị tangent ka f(x) n'ebe x.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp0: Iwu ike: ọ bụrụ f(x) = xⁿ, wee f'(x) = nxⁿ⁻¹. Ọmụmaatụ: (x³)′ = 3x².
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp1: Ọchịchị nchịkọta: (f + g)′ = f′+ g′. Iwu ngwaahịa: (fg)′ = f′g + fg′.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp2: Usoro iwu yinye: ewepụtara f(g(x)) bụ f'(g(x)) · g'(x).
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp3: Ọrụ nwere oke ma ọ bụ opekempe ebe f′(x) = 0 (isi ihe dị mkpa).
learnSch_mathematics_f8_desc: Mkpịsịkọta ọnụ na-agbakọ mpaghara dị n'okpuru mkpọkọ na ọnụọgụ ekpokọbara. Ọ bụ azụ ọrụ nke iche. A na-eji ntinye aka na physics (ọrụ, anya), ọnụ ọgụgụ (ihe gbasara omume), na injinịa.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_task: Nyochaa ∫₀² (3x² + 2) dx. Gosi usoro niile site na iji usoro ihe mgbako dị mkpa.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp0: Indefinite integral ∫f(x)dx na-enye ezinụlọ ọrụ nke usoro ya bụ f.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp1: Iwu ike maka integrals: ∫xⁿ dx = xⁿ⁺¹/(n+1) + C (maka n ≠ -1).
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp2: Ngwakọta a kapịrị ọnụ ∫ₐᵇ f(x)dx na-enye ebe dị n'etiti mgbanaka na axis x site na a ruo b.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp3: Isi mmalite nke mgbako: ∫ₐᵇ f(x)dx = F(b) - F(a), ebe F' = f.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp4: Mpaghara n'etiti akụkụ abụọ: ∫ₐᵇ [f(x) -g(x)] dx, ebe f(x) ≥ g(x).
learnSch_physics_f0_desc: Mechanics bụ ọmụmụ nke ngagharị na ike ndị na-akpata ya. Iwu ngagharị atọ nke Newton bụ ntọala. Ịghọta igwe na-arụ ọrụ na-enyere aka ịkọwa ihe niile site na ihe dara ada ruo na mwepu rọketi.
learnSch_physics_f0_task: Bọọlụ kilogram 2 na-eme ngwa ngwa na 3 m/s². Olee ike na-eme ya? Jiri F = ma.
learnSch_physics_f0_kp0: Iwu mbụ nke Newton: ihe na-ezu ike na-anọ na izu ike ma ọ bụrụ na ejiri ike mee ya.
learnSch_physics_f0_kp1: Iwu nke abụọ nke Newton: Force = mass × acceleration (F = ma).
learnSch_physics_f0_kp2: Iwu nke atọ nke Newton: omume ọ bụla nwere mmeghachi omume nha anya na nke na-emegiderịta onwe ya.
learnSch_physics_f0_kp3: Kinetic ike = ½ × uka × ọsọ² (KE = ½mv²).
learnSch_physics_f0_kp4: Ọrụ = Ike × dị anya na ntụziaka nke ike (W = Fd).
learnSch_physics_f1_desc: Eletrik bụ nnyefe ọkụ eletrik site na ndị nduzi. Magnetism na-ebilite site na ụgwọ na-ebugharị na ihe ndọta. Ha abụọ jikọtara ọnụ na electromagnetism, nke na-akwado teknụzụ ọgbara ọhụrụ.
learnSch_physics_f1_task: Otu sekit nwere batrị 12 V na ihe mgbochi 4 Ω. Kedu ihe dị ugbu a? Jiri V = IR.
learnSch_physics_f1_kp0: Iwu Ohm: Voltaji = Ugbua × Nguzogide (V = IR).
learnSch_physics_f1_kp1: Usoro sekit: otu ihe ugbu a site na ihe niile; voltaji na-agbakwụnye.
learnSch_physics_f1_kp2: Parallel circuit: otu voltaji gafee niile components; mmiri ozuzo gbakwunyere.
learnSch_physics_f1_kp4: Mpaghara ndọta na-akpa ike na ebubo na-akpụ akpụ: F = qvB.
learnSch_physics_f2_desc: Ebili mmiri na-ebufe ike na-ebufeghị ihe. Ụda na ìhè bụ ma ebili mmiri. Optics na-amụ ka ọkụ si akpa àgwà - na-atụgharị anya na enyo, na-ehulata na anya anya, na ịmepụta ihe oyiyi.
learnSch_physics_f2_task: Igwe ụda nwere ugboro 440 Hz yana ọsọ 340 m/s. Gịnị bụ ogologo ifegharị ya? Jiri v = fλ.
learnSch_physics_f2_kp0: Ọsọ ebili mmiri = ugboro × ogologo wavele (v = fλ).
learnSch_physics_f2_kp1: Ụda na-aga site na ihe; ọ nweghị ike isi n'ime oghere pụta.
learnSch_physics_f2_kp2: Ìhè na-aga na 300,000 km/s na oghere (c).
learnSch_physics_f2_kp3: Ntughari: akụkụ nke ihe omume = akụkụ nke ntụgharị uche.
learnSch_physics_f2_kp4: Ntụgharị: ọkụ na-ehulata mgbe ị na-agafe n'etiti ihe dị iche iche dị iche iche (iwu Snell).
learnSch_chemistry_f0_desc: Ihe niile bụ nke atọm. Atọm nke ọ bụla nwere oghere (protons + neutron) nke eletrọn gbara ya gburugburu. Tebụlụ nke oge a na-ahazi ihe ndị sitere na nọmba atọm na njirimara kemịkal ha.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_task: Carbon nwere nọmba atomic 6. Proton, eletrọn na neutron ole ka ¹²C nwere?
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp0: Nọmba atọm = ọnụ ọgụgụ nke proton; na-ekpebi nke mmewere ọ bụ.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp2: Electrons na-ejide ọkwa ike (shells); outermost eletrọn na-ekpebi reactivity.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp3: Isotopes bụ atọm nke otu mmewere nwere ọnụọgụ neutron dị iche iche.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp4: Njikọ Ionic: nnyefe elektrọn. Covalent bonds: eletrọn na-ekekọrịta.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_desc: Mmeghachi omume kemịkalụ na-ahazi atọm ka ọ bụrụ ihe ọhụrụ. A na-agbanwe ndị reactants ka ọ bụrụ ngwaahịa. Ịghọta mmeghachi omume na-enyere aka na nkà mmụta ọgwụ, sayensị ihe, nri, na ụlọ ọrụ.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_task: Hazie nhata a: H₂ + O₂ → H₂O. Ugboro ole H₂ na O₂ ka ị chọrọ?
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp0: Iwu nke nchekwa nke uka: atom adịghị emepụta ma ọ bụ bibie na mmeghachi omume.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp1: Nhazi nha anya: ọnụọgụ nke atọm ọ bụla ga-abụ nha nha n'akụkụ abụọ.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp2: Ọnụego mmeghachi omume na-abawanye site na oke okpomọkụ, itinye uche, ma ọ bụ mpaghara elu.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp3: Ndị na-eme ihe na-eme ka mmeghachi omume dị ngwa n'ejighị ya.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp4: Stoichiometry na-eji oke mole iji gbakọọ ọnụọgụ na mmeghachi omume.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_desc: Acids na-enye ion hydrogen (H⁺); bases nabata ha. Ọnụ ọgụgụ pH na-atụ acidity site na 0 (oke acidic) ruo 14 (nke bụ isi), ebe 7 na-anọpụ iche. Mmeghachi omume ịnọpụ iche na-ejikọta acids na ntọala iji mepụta mmiri na nnu.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_task: Ọ bụrụ na ị na-agwakọta hydrochloric acid (HCl) na sodium hydroxide (NaOH), kedu ngwaahịa na-emepụta? Dee nha nha.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_kp0: pH <7 = acidic (dịka pH mmanya mmanya ≈ 3). pH> 7 = isi (dịka mmiri soda pH ≈ 9).
learnSch_chemistry_f2_kp2: Ihe ngosi (dị ka litmus) na-agbanwe agba na acid na ntọala.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_kp3: Acid siri ike na-ekewa n'ụzọ zuru ezu (HCl); Acids na-adịghị ike na-ekewapụ akụkụ ụfọdụ (CH₃COOH).
learnSch_chemistry_f2_kp4: Titration na-ekpebi itinye uche na-amaghị site na iji ngwọta amaara eme ihe.
learnSch_biology_f0_desc: Selụ bụ akụkụ bụ isi nke ihe niile dị ndụ. Selụ na-arụ ọrụ ndụ niile: inweta ume, ịzaghachi gburugburu ebe obibi, na-eto eto na ịmụpụta. Ịghọta mkpụrụ ndụ bụ ntọala maka ihe ndị dị ndụ niile.
learnSch_biology_f0_task: Kpọọ ọdịiche atọ dị n'etiti cell osisi na cell anụmanụ nwere otu ọrụ maka ọdịiche ọ bụla.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp0: Prokaryotes (bacteria) enweghị oghere; eukaryotes (anụmanụ, osisi, fungi) nwere oghere.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp1: Nucleus nwere DNA, ụkpụrụ mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa nke cell.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp2: Mitochondria na-emepụta ume site na respiration cellular (ATP).
learnSch_biology_f0_kp3: Mitosis na-emepụta sel ụmụ nwanyị abụọ yiri maka uto na nrụzi.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp4: Meiosis na-emepụta mkpụrụ ndụ mmekọahụ anọ (gametes) nwere ọkara nke chromosome.
learnSch_biology_f0_tp1: Mitosis na meiosis || DNA na RNA || Usoro ndu mmadu
learnSch_biology_f0_tp2: Ahụ mmadụ bụ usoro dị mgbagwoju anya nke akụkụ ahụ na-arụkọ ọrụ ọnụ iji nọgide na-adị ndụ. Ịghọta ka usoro ndị a si arụ ọrụ na-enyere aka na ahụike, ọgwụ, na ọdịmma onwe onye.
learnSch_biology_f1_name: Chọpụta ụzọ iku ume oxygen si imi gaa na cell muscle. Kpọọ aha sistemu akụkụ ọ bụla metụtara ya.
learnSch_biology_f1_desc: Usoro ọbara na-ebufe ọbara site na ahụ, na-ebuga oxygen na nri.
learnSch_biology_f1_task: Usoro mgbari nri na-agbaji nri n'ime nri nke ahụ nwere ike itinye.
learnSch_biology_f1_kp0: Usoro ụjọ ahụ na-ahazi ozi ma na-ahazi nzaghachi.
learnSch_biology_f1_kp1: Homeostasis na-eme ka ọnọdụ dị n'ime guzosie ike (dịka okpomọkụ ahụ na 37 Celsius C).
learnSch_biology_f1_kp2: The nervous system processes information and coordinates responses.
learnSch_biology_f1_kp3: Homeostasis keeps internal conditions stable (e.g. body temperature at 37°C).
learnSch_biology_f1_kp4: Nri: carbohydrates na-enye ume; protein na-ewuli elu; abụba na-echekwa ike ma chebe akụkụ ahụ.
learnSch_biology_f2_desc: Ecology na-amụ ka ihe ndị dị ndụ na-emekọrịta ihe na ibe ha na gburugburu ha. Ịghọta ihe ndị dị ndụ na-enyere anyị aka ichekwa ụdị ndụ dị iche iche, jikwaa akụrụngwa, na lebara mgbanwe ihu igwe anya.
learnSch_biology_f2_task: See webụ nri dị mfe nwere ntule ise. Ndị na-emepụta akara, ndị na-azụ ahịa mbụ, na ndị ahịa nke abụọ.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp0: Ndị na-emepụta ihe (osisi) na-eme nri site na photosynthesis; ndị na-eri nri na-eri ha.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp1: Agbụ nri na-egosi ike ike: Sun → osisi → herbivore → anụ anụ.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp2: Naanị ihe dịka 10% nke ike na-enyefe na ọkwa trophic na-esote.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp3: Ụdị dị iche iche nke ihe ndị dị ndụ na-eme ka gburugburu ebe obibi na-enwekwu ike ịgbanwe.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp4: Mgbanwe ihu igwe na-agbanwe ebe obibi, na-agbanwe ụdị dị iche iche, ma na-akpaghasị webụ nri.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_desc: Echiche mgbakọ na mwepụ bụ ụzọ edozi nsogbu a na-eji na mmemme na karịa. Ọ na-agbaji nsogbu ndị dị mgbagwoju anya n'ime akụkụ ndị nwere ike ijikwa ma na-achọpụta usoro nzọụkwụ site na nzọụkwụ nke kọmputa (ma ọ bụ mmadụ) nwere ike ịgbaso.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_task: Dee algọridim usoro nzọụkwụ site na nzọụkwụ (n'asụsụ dị larịị) maka ịhazi oche nke kaadị 5 ejirila nọmba.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp0: Nbibi: mebie nnukwu nsogbu n'ime obere nsogbu ndị nwere ike idozi.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp1: Ịmata ụkpụrụ: chọpụta myirịta na oge na nsogbu.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp2: Abstraction: lekwasị anya na akụkụ ndị dị mkpa ma leghara nkọwa ndị na-adịghị mkpa anya.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp3: Algorithm: usoro usoro iji dozie nsogbu.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp4: Pseudocode na-enyere aka ịhazi algọridim n'asụsụ dị larịị tupu itinye koodu.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_desc: Mmemme na-atụgharị echiche ezi uche dị na ya ka ọ bụrụ ntuziaka kọmputa nwere ike ime. Mmemme ọ bụla na-eji mgbanwe, ọnọdụ, loops, na ọrụ. Ndozi - ịchọta na idozi njehie - bụ nka dị mkpa.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_task: Dee pseudocode ma ọ bụ ezigbo koodu na-ajụ onye ọrụ maka ọnụọgụ wee bipụta ma ọ dị njọ ma ọ bụ ọbụna.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp0: Ngbanwe na-echekwa uru nwere ike ịgbanwe: x = 5.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp1: A loop na-emegharị koodu: n'ihi na i na nso (5) na-agba ahụ ugboro ise.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp2: Ọ bụrụ na nkwupụta na-eme mkpebi: ọ bụrụ x> 0: bipụta ("ezigbo").
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp3: Otu ọrụ nwere ike ịmegharị koodu: def greet(aha): weghachi "Ndewo" + aha.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp4: Ụdị njehie a na-ahụkarị: njehie syntax (nsụpe na-ezighi ezi), njehie oge (okuku), njehie mgbagha (nsonaazụ na-ezighi ezi).
learnSch_computer_science_f2_desc: Sistemụ dijitalụ na-etolite akụrụngwa nke ịntanetị na kọmpụta ọgbara ọhụrụ. Ịghọta netwọkụ, nnọchite data, na cybersecurity dị mkpa maka onye ọ bụla na-eji ma ọ bụ na-ewu teknụzụ.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_task: Tụgharịa ọnụọgụgụ iri na atọ 13 ka ọ bụrụ ọnụọgụ abụọ. Gosi ọrụ gị (kewaa ugboro abụọ ugboro ugboro).
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp0: A na-echekwa data na ọnụọgụ abụọ (0s na 1s): 8 bit = 1 byte.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp1: ASCII na nọmba maapụ Unicode gaa na mkpụrụedemede (dịka A = 65 na ASCII).
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp2: Ịntanetị bụ netwọk zuru ụwa ọnụ nke netwọk na-eji TCP/IP protocol.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp3: A na-eji HTTP eme ihe maka ibe weebụ; HTTPS na-agbakwụnye ezoro ezo maka nchekwa.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp4: Izo ya ezo na-akpachapụ data ka naanị onye nnata bu n'obi nwee ike ịgụ ya.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_desc: Ọgụgụ na nyocha na-akụziri gị ka ị ghọta na ịtụle ederede nke ọma. Ị na-amụta ịmata ebumnobi onye edemede, nhazi arụmụka, na nyochaa àgwà akaebe ejiri.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_task: Gụọ otu paragraf site na edemede ọ bụla. Chọpụta: (1) isi ihe a na-ekwu, (2) otu ihe akaebe, (3) otu echiche nwere ike ime.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp0: Ụdị nhazi ederede: usoro oge, ngwọta nsogbu, ihe kpatara ya, atụnyere-iche.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp1: Isi arụmụka bụ isi okwu onye odee chọrọ ka ị nabata.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp2: Ihe akaebe na-akwado nkwupụta: chọọ eziokwu, ọnụ ọgụgụ, ngụ ndị ọkachamara, na ọmụmaatụ.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp3: Nyochaa isi mmalite: onye odee a nwere ntụkwasị obi? Ihe akaebe a ọ dị nso na ọ dabara?
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp4: Ajọ omume na-apụta mgbe ederede na-egosi naanị otu akụkụ nke arụmụka.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_desc: Edemede dị mma na-akọwapụta echiche n'ụzọ doro anya na n'ikwenye. Usoro a gụnyere atụmatụ, idepụta, idegharị na idezi. Nhazi na ihe akaebe dị mkpa ka okwu.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_task: Dee otu paragraf PEEL (ahịrịokwu 5-7) na-arụ ụka na ọrụ ụlọ na-aba uru ma ọ bụ na-emerụ ahụ. Jiri otu ihe akaebe mee ihe.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp0: Paragraf PEEL: Isi → Ihe akaebe → Kọwaa → Jikọọ azụ.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp1: Okwu mmeghe nke edemede kwuru arụmụka; nkwubi okwu ahụ ji nghọta kwughachi ya.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp2: Edemede ahaziri ahazi na-ezere mkpịsị aka, njakịrị, na onye mbụ ọ gwụla ma akọwapụtara ya.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp3: Olu na-arụsi ọrụ ike na-edo anya karị: "Onye mmụta ahụ doziri nsogbu ahụ" (ọ bụghị "edozi ya").
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp4: Na-emegharị mgbe niile: lelee mgbagha, ihe akaebe, ụtọ asụsụ na ụdị ahịrịokwu.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_desc: Iwu ụtọ asụsụ na-achị ka okwu si ejikọta ọnụ ka ọ bụrụ ahịrịokwu ziri ezi. Okwu okwu siri ike na-eme ka ederede bụrụ nke ziri ezi ma na-ekweta. Ha abụọ chọrọ omume na-arụsi ọrụ ike - ọ bụghị naanị ịgụ akwụkwọ.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_task: Degharịa ahịrịokwu a n'ụdị atọ dị iche iche: "Ndị otu na-emeri egwuregwu." ( gara aga, ọdịnihu, ugbu a zuru oke)
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp0: Ahịrịokwu chọrọ isiokwu na ngwaa: "Ọ na-agba."
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp1: Esemokwu na-egosi oge: dị mfe ugbu a (agba ọsọ), gara aga (gba ọsọ), ọdịnihu (ga-agba ọsọ), ugbu a zuru oke (agbala ọsọ).
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp2: Nkejiokwu: otu isi okwu guzo naanị ya; Nkejiokwu dị n'okpuru chọrọ isi okwu.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp3: Ederede na-eduzi onye na-agụ: rịkọm = nkwụsịtụ dị nkenke, semicolon = sonyere echiche ndị metụtara ya.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp4: Ngosipụta okwu na-enyere aka depụta mkpụrụokwu ndị amabeghị: lelee okwu ndị gbara ya gburugburu.
learnSch_history_f0_desc: Akụkọ ihe mere eme nke ụwa na-egosi ka ọha mmadụ si etolite kemgbe ọtụtụ puku afọ, site na mmepeanya oge ochie site na alaeze ukwu, mgbanwe, na agha ụwa ruo n'usoro ụwa nke oge a. Akụkọ ihe mere eme na-enyere anyị aka ịghọta ihe mere ụwa ji dị otú ọ dị.
learnSch_history_f0_task: Họrọ otu isi ihe mere eme n’akụkọ ihe mere eme ma kọwaa: (1) ihe kpatara ya, (2) ihe merenụ, (3) mmetụta ya na-adịte aka.
learnSch_history_f0_kp0: Mesopotemia (Iraq) na Egypt so na mmepeanya mbụ ama ama.
learnSch_history_f0_kp1: Mgbanwe ụlọ ọrụ mmepụta ihe (18-19th c.) tụgharịrị akụ na ụba site na ọrụ ugbo gaa n'ichepụta ihe.
learnSch_history_f0_kp2: Agha Ụwa Mbụ (1914–1918) na Agha Ụwa nke Abụọ (1939–1945) kpụgharịrị usoro zuru ụwa ọnụ.
learnSch_history_f0_kp3: Agha Nzuzo (1947–1991) kewara ụwa n'etiti US na Soviet Union.
learnSch_history_f0_kp4: Ijikọ ụwa ọnụ sitere na 1990s kere akụ na ụba na omenala jikọtara ọnụ.
learnSch_history_f1_desc: Isi mmalite bụ akwụkwọ mbụ ma ọ bụ ihe arịa sitere n'oge a na-amụ - akwụkwọ ozi, okwu, foto, iwu, akwụkwọ akụkọ. Ndị ọkọ akụkọ ihe mere eme na-eji ha wughachi ihe gara aga dịka o kwere mee.
learnSch_history_f1_task: Chọta obere ngụ akụkọ ihe mere eme (site na okwu ma ọ bụ leta). Chọpụta onye odee, ụbọchị, na otu nhụsianya nwere ike ime.
learnSch_history_f1_kp0: Isi mmalite gụnyere akwụkwọ akụkọ, iwu, foto, okwu, na nkwekọrịta.
learnSch_history_f1_kp1: Isi mmalite nke abụọ na-akọwa isi mmalite: akwụkwọ ọgụgụ, akụkọ ndụ, akwụkwọ akụkọ.
learnSch_history_f1_kp2: Jụọ: Onye dere ihe a? Mgbe ole? Maka ndị na-ege ntị gịnị? Gịnị bụ echiche ha?
learnSch_history_f1_kp3: Ajọ omume anaghị eme ka isi iyi bụrụ ihe efu - ọ na-ekpughe echiche ụwa nke onye edemede.
learnSch_history_f1_kp4: Nkwado: lelee isi iyi ahụ megide ihe akaebe ndị ọzọ iji chọpụta ntụkwasị obi.
learnSch_geography_f0_desc: Geography nke anụ ahụ na-enyocha njirimara okike ụwa - ọdịdị ala, osimiri, ihu igwe, na gburugburu ebe obibi. Ịghọta ọdịdị ala nkịtị na-akọwa ihe mere obodo, ụzọ ahia, na mmepeanya ji malite n'ebe ha mere.
learnSch_geography_f0_task: Kọwaa ihe kpatara ala ọma jijiji ji eme n'akụkụ "Mgbanaka Ọkụ" site na iji tectonic plate.
learnSch_geography_f0_kp0: Plate tectonics: E kewara eriri ụwa gaa na efere ndị na-agagharị, na-akpata ala ọma jijiji na ugwu mgbawa.
learnSch_geography_f0_kp1: Usoro mmiri: evaporation → condensation → mmiri ozuzo → mgbapụ → megharịa.
learnSch_geography_f0_kp2: Mpaghara ihu igwe: okpomọkụ, kpọrọ nkụ, ihu igwe, kọntinent, pola.
learnSch_geography_f0_kp3: Usoro osimiri nwere isi iyi (ala dị elu), tributary, na ọnụ (ebe o zutere oké osimiri).
learnSch_geography_f0_kp4: A na-akpụzi ihe egwu dị n'okike (ala ọma jijiji, idei mmiri, ifufe) site na ọdịdị ala.
learnSch_geography_f1_desc: Geography nke mmadụ na-amụ ka ndị mmadụ si emekọrịta ihe na gburugburu ebe obibi ha na otu ha si ahazi oghere. Isiokwu gụnyere ebe ndị mmadụ bi, ihe mere obodo ji eto, na otú akụ̀ na ụba si dị iche gburugburu ụwa.
learnSch_geography_f1_task: Tulee mba abụọ site na HDI ha. Chọpụta ihe abụọ mere otu nwere ike isi jiri ọkwa dị elu karịa nke ọzọ.
learnSch_geography_f1_kp0: Njupụta ndị mmadụ = ndị mmadụ ÷ mpaghara. Okpokoro dị n'ụsọ oké osimiri na mpaghara nri; obere n'ọzara na ugwu.
learnSch_geography_f1_kp1: Obodo: ndị mmadụ na-esi n'ime obodo na-akwaga n'obodo mepere emepe maka ọrụ na ọrụ.
learnSch_geography_f1_kp2: Ihe na-akwali na-achụpụ ndị mmadụ (dịka ịda ogbenye, esemokwu); ihe na-adọta na-adọta ha (dịka ọrụ, nchekwa).
learnSch_geography_f1_kp3: Ijikọ ụwa ọnụ: ngwa ahịa, isi obodo, ndị mmadụ na echiche na-agafe oke n'efu.
learnSch_geography_f1_kp4: Enwere ike tụọ mmepe site na GDP kwa onye ọ bụla, atụmanya ndụ, na agụmakwụkwọ (HDI).
learnSch_economics_f0_desc: Microeconomics na-amụ ka ndị mmadụ n'otu n'otu na ụlọ ọrụ na-eme mkpebi gbasara akụrụngwa. Ọ na-akọwa otu esi edobe ọnụ ahịa, ihe kpatara ahịa na-ada mgbe ụfọdụ, yana ka mkpali na-esi akpụzi omume.
learnSch_economics_f0_task: Ọ bụrụ na ọnụ ahịa kọfị na-arị elu, gịnị ga-eme na-achọ tii? Kọwaa site n'iji ngwaahịa dochie anya.
learnSch_economics_f0_kp0: Arịrịọ: ka ọnụ ahịa na-ada, ọnụọgụ achọrọ na-arị elu (mmekọrịta inverse).
learnSch_economics_f0_kp1: Nkwanye: ka ọnụ ahịa na-arị elu, ọnụọgụ ndị a na-enye na-arị elu (mmekọrịta kpọmkwem).
learnSch_economics_f0_kp2: Equilibrium: ebe ọkọnọ na-egbo mkpa - ọnụahịa mkpochapụ ahịa.
learnSch_economics_f0_kp3: Ngbanwe na-atụ etu ihe achọrọ ma ọ bụ ọkọnọ siri dị na mgbanwe ọnụahịa.
learnSch_economics_f0_kp4: Ọdịda ahịa: mgbe ahịa na-emepụta oke (adịghị mma mpụga) ma ọ bụ obere (ngwaahịa ọha).
learnSch_economics_f1_desc: Ego nkeonwe na-enyere gị aka ijikwa ego gị nke ọma. Ịghọta mmefu ego, ịchekwa ego, na kredit pụtara na ị nwere ike ịme mkpebi ziri ezi n'oge ndụ gị niile.
learnSch_economics_f1_task: Ị na-enweta € 800 / ọnwa. Depụta ụdị mmefu 5 wee kenye mmefu ego maka onye ọ bụla na-agbakwunye ihe ruru € 800.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp0: Atụmatụ mmefu ego na-enyocha ego na mmefu. Na-emefu ihe na-erughị ihe ị na-akpata iji chekwaa.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp1: Mmasị dị mfe: I = P × r × t (Ụdị × oge × oge).
learnSch_economics_f1_kp2: Ọmụrụ nwa jikọtara ọnụ na-eto ego nke ukwuu - malite n'isi.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp3: Ebe E Si Nweta: ibiri ugbu a na ịkwụghachi ma emechaa na mmasị; jiri nlezianya mee ya.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp4: Ego mberede kwesịrị ikpuchi mmefu ọnwa 3-6.
learnSch_earth_science_f0_desc: Geology na-amụ usoro nke ụwa, nkume ndị e ji mee ya, na otú o si agbanwe ka oge na-aga. Ụwa dị ihe dị ka ijeri afọ 4.5. N'ígwé ya - jikọrọ ọnụ, uwe mwụda, isi mpụta, isi n'ime - nwere ihe dị iche iche.
learnSch_earth_science_f0_task: Ọgbara lava na-ajụ oyi ma na-esi ike. Kedu ụdị nkume ụdị? Kedu ihe nwere ike ime ka ọ ghọọ nkume metamorphic ka oge na-aga?
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp0: Okirikiri nkume: igneous → sedimentary → metamorphic → azụ na magma.
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp1: Nkume dị egwu na-etolite site na magma jụrụ oyi ma ọ bụ lava (dịka granite, basalt).
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp2: Nkume sedimentary na-etolite site na akwa akwa nke sedimenti (dịka ọmụmaatụ, aja aja, nzu).
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp3: A na-agbanwe okwute metamorphic site na okpomọkụ na nrụgide (dịka marble, slate).
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp4: Plate tectonics na-akọwa ala ọma jijiji, ugwu mgbawa, na iwu ugwu.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_desc: Astronomy na-amụ ihe niile karịrị Ụwa - mbara ala, kpakpando, ụyọkọ kpakpando, na eluigwe na ala n'onwe ya. Usoro mbara igwe anyị malitere ihe dị ka ijeri afọ 4.6 gara aga. A na-eme atụmatụ na eluigwe na ụwa dị ijeri afọ 13.8.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_task: Gbakọọ: ìhè na-aga na 300,000 km / s. Ogologo oge ole ka ọkụ na-aga n'ime nkeji 1? N'ime elekere 1?
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp0: Usoro mbara igwe anyị: mbara ala 8 gbara anyanwụ gburugburu. Usoro: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp1: Kpakpando na-emepụta ike site na ngwakọta nuklia: atom hydrogen na-eme ka ọ bụrụ helium.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp2: Afọ-ìhè bụ anya ìhè na-aga n'otu afọ (≈9.46 trillion km).
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp3: Ụzọ Milky bụ ụyọkọ kpakpando anyị; o nwere ihe karịrị ijeri kpakpando 200.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp4: The Big Bang Theory: eluigwe na ụwa malitere dị ka ihe na-ekpo ọkụ nke ukwuu, nnukwu ebe ~ ijeri afọ 13.8 gara aga.
learnSch_health_f0_desc: Ahụ ike nkeonwe na-ekpuchi omume na nhọrọ ndị na-emetụta ọdịmma anụ ahụ na nke uche gị. Obere omume kwa ụbọchị - ụra, nri na-edozi ahụ, mmega ahụ - nwere mmetụta dị ogologo na ahụike.
learnSch_health_f0_task: Hazie nri kwesịrị ekwesị ma ọ dịkarịa ala otu nri anọ. Chọpụta otu nri na ọrụ ya maka nri ọ bụla.
learnSch_health_f0_kp0: Ndị okenye chọrọ 7-9 awa ụra kwa abalị; na-eto eto mkpa 8-10 awa.
learnSch_health_f0_kp1: Nri kwesịrị ekwesị gụnyere carbohydrates, protein, abụba dị mma, vitamin, na mineral.
learnSch_health_f0_kp2: Mmega ahụ mgbe niile (150 min / izu oke oke ike) na-ebelata ihe egwu ọrịa.
learnSch_health_f0_kp3: Hydration: ebumnuche maka ≈2 lita mmiri kwa ụbọchị dabere na ọrụ na ihu igwe.
learnSch_health_f0_kp4: Nlekọta ahụike mgbochi: nyocha oge niile, ịgba ọgwụ mgbochi ọrịa, na nleta eze.
learnSch_health_f1_desc: Ahụ ike nke uche dị mkpa ka ahụ ike anụ ahụ. Ọ na-emetụta otú anyị si eche echiche, mmetụta anyị, na omume anyị. Ịghọta nrụgide na mmetụta uche - na ebe ị ga-achọta enyemaka - bụ nkà ndụ.
learnSch_health_f1_task: Depụta ụzọ atọ ahụike siri ike ijikwa nchekasị. Kọwaa ihe kpatara atụmatụ ọ bụla ji arụ ọrụ physiologically ma ọ bụ nke uche.
learnSch_health_f1_kp0: Nchegbu bụ nzaghachi nkịtị maka ihe ịma aka; nrụgide na-adịghị ala ala na-emerụ ahụ ike.
learnSch_health_f1_kp1: Usoro: iku ume miri emi, mmega ahụ nke anụ ahụ, ịgwa mmadụ okwu, njikwa oge.
learnSch_health_f1_kp2: Nchegbu na ịda mbà n'obi na-abụkarị - ha bụ ọnọdụ ahụike, ọ bụghị adịghị ike.
learnSch_health_f1_kp3: Inyere enyi aka: gee ntị n'enweghị ikpe, gbaa nkwado ọkachamara ume.
learnSch_health_f1_kp4: Ụra, mmega ahụ, na mmekọrịta ọha na eze na-eme ka ahụike uche dịkwuo mma.
learnSch_arts_f0_desc: Nkà na-ahụ anya na-egosipụta echiche, mmetụta, na akụkọ site na onyonyo na ihe. Ịse ihe, eserese, ihe ọkpụkpụ, na imewe niile na-eji otu ihe ntọala: ahịrị, ọdịdị, agba, udidi, oghere na ụdị.
learnSch_arts_f0_task: Chepụta ihe ọ bụla site na iji naanị ahịrị contour (naanị ihe ndepụta). Mgbe ahụ, ndò otu mpaghara iji gosi omimi.
learnSch_arts_f0_kp0: Ụkwụ agba: isi (acha ọbara ọbara, odo, acha anụnụ anụnụ) → nke abụọ (oroma, akwụkwọ ndụ akwụkwọ ndụ, violet).
learnSch_arts_f0_kp1: Agba agbakwunyere na-anọdụ ala n'ihu ibe ha na wiil (red-acha akwụkwọ ndụ akwụkwọ ndụ, acha anụnụ anụnụ-oroma).
learnSch_arts_f0_kp2: Ihe mejupụtara: ka esi hazie ihe. Ọchịchị nke atọ na-ekewa etiti ahụ n'ime akụkụ 9 hà nhata.
learnSch_arts_f0_kp3: Ahịrị: nwere ike ịtụ aro mmegharị, mmetụta, ntụziaka.
learnSch_arts_f0_kp4: Oghere na-adịghị mma: ndabere gburugburu isiokwu - dị mkpa dị ka isiokwu ahụ n'onwe ya.
learnSch_music_f0_desc: Ozizi egwu bụ asụsụ egwu. Ọ na-akọwa otú e si hazie ụda ka ọ bụrụ abụ abụ, nkwekọ, na ukwe. Ịgụ akara egwu dị ka ịgụ maapụ ụda.
learnSch_music_f0_task: Kụzie ụda nke egwu ị maara. Jiri akara ogologo (—) na mkpụmkpụ (·) dee ya. Ole kuku kwa otu mmanya?
learnSch_music_f0_kp0: Pitch: ịdị elu ma ọ bụ ịdị ala nke ụda. Atụtara na Hz.
learnSch_music_f0_kp1: Ihe edeturu na ndị ọrụ: ahịrị clef treble (EGBDF), oghere (FACE).
learnSch_music_f0_kp2: Beat = pulse na-adịgide adịgide. Tempo = ọsọ (BPM). Rhythm = ụkpụrụ nke ụda ogologo na nke dị mkpụmkpụ.
learnSch_music_f0_kp3: Ọnụ ọgụgụ bụ usoro ndetu n'ụdị dị iche iche (dịka nnukwu ọnụ ọgụgụ: dum-dum-ọkara-dum-dum-onne-ọkara).
learnSch_music_f0_kp4: A na-akpọkọ ndetu 3+ ọnụ; nnukwu ụdọ na-ada ụda na-egbuke egbuke, obere ụdọ na-ada ọchịchịrị.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_desc: Mma n'anụ ahụ nwere akụkụ anọ bụ isi: ntachi obi nke obi, ike muscular, mgbanwe, na nhazi ahụ. Ọzụzụ mpaghara ọ bụla na-eme ka ahụike na arụmọrụ dịkwuo mma mgbe niile.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_task: Jiri ụkpụrụ FITT chepụta atụmatụ mgbatị ahụ nke nkeji 30 kwa izu. Tinye opekata mpe ụdị mmega ahụ abụọ.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp0: Mmega ahụ nke ikuku (ịgba ọsọ, igwu mmiri) na-ewusi obi na ngụgụ ike.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp1: Mmega ahụ anaerobic (ibuli ibu, sprinting) na-ewuli ike akwara.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp2: Ibu ibu na-aga n'ihu: jiri nwayọọ nwayọọ na-abawanye ike iji nọgide na-akawanye mma.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp3: Izu ike na mgbake bụ mgbe akwara na-esiwanye ike.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp4: Ụkpụrụ FITT: Ugboro, ike, Oge, Ụdị - ogidi nke atụmatụ ọzụzụ.
learnSch_german_language_title: Asụsụ German || Ụtọ Ụtọ Ụtọ Ụtọ na Nhazi Ahịrịokwu
learnSch_german_language_f0_name: Ewubere ụtọ asụsụ German na ikpe anọ (Nominativ, Akkusativ, Dativ, Genitiv) na-ekpebi aha na ụdị edemede. Ịghọta okwu bụ isi ihe na-emepụta ahịrịokwu German ziri ezi.
learnSch_german_language_f0_desc: Degharịa na ikpe ziri ezi: 'Der Hund (beißen) ____ Mann.' Fanye akụkọ Akkusativ ziri ezi maka 'Mann'.
learnSch_german_language_f0_task: Nominativ = isiokwu (Ònye na-eme ihe ahụ?). Akkusativ = ihe kpọmkwem (Gịnị?). Dativ = ihe na-apụtaghị ìhè (Nye/maka onye?). Genitiv = ihe onwunwe.
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp0: Akụkọ doro anya na-agbanwe site na ikpe: der/die/das (Nom.) → den/die/das (Akk.) → dem/der/dem (Dat.).
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp1: Definite articles change by case: der/die/das (Nom.) → den/die/das (Akk.) → dem/der/dem (Dat.).
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp2: Ọnọdụ ngwaa: na nkebiokwu ndị bụ isi, ngwaa na-abụkarị nke abụọ. N'okwu dị n'okpuru, ngwaa na-aga na njedebe.
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp3: Akwụsị okwu na-agbanwe dabere na isiokwu na ikpe (ike, adịghị ike, nhụsịrị agwakọta).
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp4: Ngwaa Modal (können, müssen, dürfen, sollen, wollen, mögen) na-ejikọta ya na njedebe na njedebe.
learnSch_german_language_f1_desc: Nyocha ederede German na-akuziri gị ịmata ngwaọrụ agụmagụ, kọwapụta ihe ọ pụtara, wee dee arụmụka ahaziri ahazi. Nkà ndị a na-emetụta uri, mkpirisi akụkọ, na ogologo prose.
learnSch_german_language_f1_task: Chọta otu ihe atụ na otu ihe atụ n'ime obere uri German. Dee otu ahịrịokwu na-akọwa ihe nke ọ bụla pụtara.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp0: Nyochaa nhazi: iwebata, isi ahụ, mmechi (Einleitung, Hauptteil, Schluss).
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp1: Ngwa edemede: Metapher (ihe atụ), Vergleich (ihe atụ), Alliteration, Personifikation.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp2: Okwu Textsorte: A na-enyocha uri dị iche na akụkọ akụkọ.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp3: Tesis (Ndị a) + ihe akaebe (Beleg) + nkọwa (Deutung) = usoro nyocha ọkọlọtọ.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp4: Okwu na-apụtaghị ìhè na-eji Konjunktiv I: Er sagt, er könne helfen.
learnSch_german_language_f2_desc: Edemede German dị mma bụ nke ọma, ahaziri nke ọma, ma na-eji ụdị okwu na ogologo ahịrịokwu dị iche iche. Ime ụdị ederede dị iche iche na-ewulite ntụkwasị obi maka ule na nkwurịta okwu n'ezie.
learnSch_german_language_f2_task: Dee 5-ahịrịokwu Erörterung na: 'Sollten Smartphones na der Schule verboten werden?' Jiri 'einerseits… andererseits'.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp0: Erörterung (edemede nkwuwa okwu) na-eweta arụmụka pro na contra yana nkwubi okwu nkeonwe.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp1: Kommentar (nkọwa) na-arụrịta ụka otu ọnọdụ na ihe akaebe na ajụjụ okwu.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp2: Zusammenfassung (nchịkọta): nkenke, onye nke atọ, ihe dị ugbu a, enweghị echiche.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp3: Ndị mbido ahịrịokwu dị iche iche: jiri njikọ ndị nọ n'okpuru (weil, obwohl, damit, wenn) maka ihe owuwu dị mgbagwoju anya.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp4: Ederede: rịkọm n'ihu nkebiokwu niile dị n'okpuru (Nebensätze).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_desc: Ịghọta okpukperechi ndị bụ isi n'ụwa na-enyere aka ịzụlite nkwanye ùgwù, mmetụta ọmịiko, na mmuta omenala. Omenala ọ bụla na-enye azịza pụrụ iche nye ajụjụ gbasara ndụ, ọnwụ, ikpe ziri ezi, na ihe ọ pụtara.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_task: Tụlee otú okpukpe abụọ ị mụrụ si zaa ajụjụ bụ́: 'Gịnị na-eme ma mmadụ nwụọ?' Dee ahịrịokwu atọ maka nke ọ bụla.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp0: Iso Ụzọ Kraịst: ikwere na otu Chineke, Jizọs dị ka onye nzọpụta; ederede dị nsọ = Akwụkwọ Nsọ; ~ 2.4 ijeri ndị na-eso ụzọ.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp1: Islam: nkwenye na Allah, Muhammad dịka onye amụma; ederede dị nsọ = Koran; ogidi ise na-eduzi ndụ kwa ụbọchị.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp2: Okpukpe ndị Juu: otu onye; Torah (Akwụkwọ Nsọ Hibru); 613 iwu (mitzvot); ~ 15 nde ndị na-eso ụzọ.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp3: Okpukpe Hindu: otutu chi, otu eziokwu kacha (Brahman); echiche nke karma, dharma, ịlọ ụwa.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp4: Okpukpe Buddha: nkuzi nke Buddha; Eziokwu anọ dị mma, ụzọ okpukpu asatọ; ihe mgbaru ọsọ = Nirvana (nnwere onwe pụọ na nhụjuanya).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_desc: Ụkpụrụ omume na-ajụ: gịnị bụ ihe ziri ezi na ihe ọjọọ, na gịnị kpatara? Echiche ụkpụrụ omume bụ isi na-enye usoro dị iche iche maka ịme mkpebi omume. Ịghọta ha na-enyere gị aka ịtụgharị uche banyere nsogbu ndị dị n'ụwa n'ezie.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_task: Ụgbọ ala na-anya onwe ya ga-ahọrọ: kụọ 1 mmadụ ma ọ bụ tụgharịa wee kụọ 5. Nyochaa nsogbu a site n'aka onye na-erite uru NA echiche deontological.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp0: Consequentialism (dịka Utilitarianism): kpee omume site na nsonaazụ ha. Kachasị mma maka ọnụ ọgụgụ kacha ukwuu (Bentham, Mill).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp1: Deontology (Kant): ụfọdụ omume dị mma ma ọ bụ na-ezighị ezi n'ime onwe ha, n'agbanyeghị ihe ga-esi na ya pụta. Ụdị dị mkpa: mee naanị otu ị nwere ike isi mee ka onye ọ bụla mee ihe.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp2: Ụkpụrụ omume ọma (Aristotle): lekwasị anya na agwa, ọ bụghị iwu. Onye ezi omume na-ahọrọ akara ọla edo n'etiti oke oke.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp3: Contractarianism (Rawls): ikpe ziri ezi bụ ihe ndị nwere ezi uche ga-ekwenye n'azụ 'ihe mkpuchi nke amaghị ihe' (na-amaghị ọnọdụ ha na ọha mmadụ).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp4: Ụkpụrụ omume etinyere: ka echiche ndị a na-enye ezi arụmụka - euthanasia, ikike anụmanụ, AI, ikpe ziri ezi nke ihu igwe.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_name: Ọchịchị onye kwuo uche ya na ọchịchị
learnSch_social_studies_f0_desc: Ịghọta ka gọọmentị si arụ ọrụ dị mkpa maka ịbụ nwa amaala na-arụsi ọrụ ike. Usoro ọchịchị onye kwuo uche ya na-echekwa ikike, ikike dị iche iche, ma nye ụmụ amaala olu site na ntuli aka.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_task: Kọwaa ngalaba gọọmentị atọ dị na mba gị. Nye otu ihe atụ nke ike alaka nke ọ bụla.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp0: Ọchịchị onye kwuo uche: ikike dị n'aka ndị mmadụ, gosipụtara site na ntuli aka efu na ikike echedoro.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp1: Nkewa nke ikike: ndị omebe iwu (na-eme iwu), Executive (mejuputa iwu), ikpe (nsụgharị iwu).
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp2: Usoro Federal na-ekewa ike n'etiti gọọmentị etiti na mpaghara (dịka Germany, USA).
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp3: Ikike mmadụ bụ ihe zuru ụwa ọnụ, ikike a na-apụghị ịgbagha agbagha (dịka ọmụmaatụ nkwupụta UN banyere ikike mmadụ, 1948).
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp4: Ndị omeiwu vs usoro onye isi ala: na usoro ndị omeiwu, ndị isi na-esite n'ụlọ omebe iwu.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_desc: Ọdịnala, akụ na ụba, ụlọ ọrụ, na ike akụkọ ihe mere eme na-etolite ọha mmadụ. Ọmụmụ ihe gbasara mmekọrịta ọha na eze na omenala na-enyere anyị aka ịghọta ahaghị nhata, njirimara, na mgbanwe mmekọrịta ọha na eze.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_task: Nye otu ihe atụ nke otú ijikọ ụwa ọnụ si gbanwee ndụ kwa ụbọchị na obodo gị. Mmetụta ahụ ọ dị mma, adịghị mma, ma ọ bụ ha abụọ? Kọwaa.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp0: Mmekọrịta: usoro nke ndị mmadụ n'otu n'otu na-amụta ụkpụrụ, ụkpụrụ na ọrụ nke obodo ha.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp1: Social stratification: ahaziri ahaghị nhata na ọha mmadụ (klas, okike, agbụrụ).
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp2: Omenala: ụkpụrụ, nkwenye, omume na akara na-ejikọta otu ọnụ.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp3: Ijikọ ụwa ọnụ emeela ka mgbanwe omenala na ndakọrịta akụ na ụba dịkwuo ngwa.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp4: Ọgụgụ mgbasa ozi: inyocha isi mmalite maka nhụsianya, echiche, na ihe akaebe bụ nka dị egwu nke narị afọ nke 21.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_desc: Epistemology na-ajụ: gịnị ka anyị nwere ike ịma, oleekwa otú anyị si mara ya? Ọ na-enyocha isi mmalite na oke nke ihe ọmụma mmadụ - echiche, ahụmahụ, echiche, na ikike.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_task: Ọ ga-ekwe omume ịmara ihe n'ụzọ zuru oke? Dee nzaghachi nke ahịrị 4 site n'aka onye nwere ezi uche na n'echiche nke mmụọ.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp0: Rationalism (Descartes, Kant): echiche bụ isi ihe ọmụma. 'Cogito ergo sum' - Echere m, ya mere m bụ.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp1: Empiricism (Locke, Hume): ihe ọmụma sitere na ahụmịhe mmetụta. Uche na-amalite dị ka oghere oghere (tabula rasa).
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp2: Obi abụọ: anyị kwesịrị inwe obi abụọ na nkwupụta niile ma nabata naanị ihe enwere ike igosipụta.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp3: Justified True Belief (Plato): ihe ọmụma = ihe bụ eziokwu, ị kwenyere na ya, ma ị nwere nkwenye.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp4: Nsogbu Gettier na-egosi na ezi nkwenye ziri ezi anaghị ezuru ihe ọmụma mgbe niile.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_name: Nkà ihe ọmụma nke uche na nnwere onwe ime
learnSch_philosophy_f1_desc: Gịnị bụ uche? Ànyị nweere onwe anyị ime ezi nhọrọ? Ajụjụ ndị a na-anọdụ na njikọ nke nkà ihe ọmụma, neuroscience, na ndụ kwa ụbọchị.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_task: Ụmụ mmadụ hà nwere onwe ha n'ezie? Dee arụmụka nke ahịrịokwu 5 maka ndakọrịta ma ọ bụ mkpebi siri ike.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp0: Dualism (Descartes): uche na ahụ bụ ihe dị iche iche. Nsogbu: kedu ka ha si emekọrịta?
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp1: Ime ahụ: uche bụ ihe sitere na ọrụ ụbụrụ.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp2: Ọrụ: A na-akọwa ọnọdụ uche site na ọrụ ha na-arụ, ọ bụghị ihe anụ ahụ ha.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp3: Nsogbu siri ike nke nsụhọ: kedu ihe kpatara nhazi anụ ahụ ji ebute ahụmịhe nke onwe?
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp4: Nkwekọrịta: nnwere onwe na mkpebi siri ike nwere ike ibikọ ọnụ - nnwere onwe = ime ihe dịka ihe kpatara gị si dị, ọ bụrụgodị na kpatara ya.
learnSch_technology_f0_desc: Echiche imewe bụ ụzọ gbadoro ụkwụ na mmadụ iji dozie nsogbu n'ichepụta na n'usoro. A na-eji ya na imepụta ngwaahịa, injinia, UX, na ihe ọhụrụ n'ofe ụlọ ọrụ niile.
learnSch_technology_f0_task: Họrọ nsogbu n'ụlọ akwụkwọ gị. Tinye usoro echiche 3 nke mbụ: kọwaa nsogbu ahụ, kọwaa onye ọ metụtara, wee mepụta echiche 3.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp0: Nkeji 5: Mmetụta ọmịiko → Kọwaa → Ideate → Prototype → Ule.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp1: Nwee mmetụta ọmịiko: ghọta ezigbo mkpa ndị ọrụ site na nyocha na nleba anya.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp2: Ideate: mepụta ọtụtụ echiche na-enweghị ikpe; otutu tupu mma.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp3: Prototype: wuo ụdị ngwa ngwa, dị ọnụ ala iji nwalee echiche tupu itinye ego.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp4: Iteration: imewe bụ okirikiri; nzaghachi na-eme ka ụdị ọ bụla dịkwuo mma.
learnSch_technology_f1_desc: Ọgụgụ dijitalụ pụtara ịghọta ka teknụzụ si arụ ọrụ, ka esi eji data eme ihe, yana otu esi agagharị ụwa dijitalụ n'enweghị nsogbu na nke ọma. AI na-agbanwe mpaghara ọ bụla.
learnSch_technology_f1_task: Depụta ụdị data nkeonwe atọ ekwentị gị na-anakọta. Maka nke ọ bụla, kọwaa otu ihe ize ndụ na otu uru nke nchịkọta data ahụ.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp0: Algorithms bụ usoro nzọụkwụ nke kọmputa na-agbaso. Ha na-akwado ọchụchọ, ndụmọdụ na AI.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp1: Ịmụ igwe: sistemu na-emeziwanye site na data na-edoghị ya nke ọma.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp2: Nzuzo data: ghọta ihe ngwa na-anakọta gbasara gị yana otu esi eji ya.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp3: Ozi na-ezighi ezi: adịgboroja miri emi, afụ nzacha, na nkwalite algọridim na-eme nyocha dị oke mkpa.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp4: Ihe ndabere cybersecurity: jiri okwuntughe siri ike, mee 2FA, mata mbọ phishing.
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_desc: Edere Arabik aka nri-ruo-ekpe (RTL) na-eji mkpụrụedemede 28. Ụdị mkpụrụedemede na-agbanwe dabere na ọnọdụ dị n'okwu (mbụ, etiti, ikpeazụ, dịpụrụ adịpụ). Arabic na-eji ọnụọgụ Arabic-Indic nke Ọwụwa Anyanwụ (٠١٢٣٤٥٦٧٨٩) - ọnụọgụ ọdịda anyanwụ 0-9 sitere na ndị a n'akụkọ ihe mere eme.
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_task: Dee nọmba 1–10 na ọnụọgụ Arabic-Indic Eastern (١ ٢ ٣ ...). Tulee nke ọ bụla na ogbo ya nke Ọdịda Anyanwụ. Wee dee okwu Arabic maka "nọmba" (رقم – raqm).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp0: A na-agụ ma dee Arabic site n'aka nri gaa n'aka ekpe (RTL).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp1: Mkpụrụedemede nwere mkpụrụedemede 28; Ọtụtụ bụ consonants. A na-egosikarị ụdaume dị ka ụda olu (harakāt).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp2: Akwụkwọ ozi ọ bụla nwere ihe ruru 4 ụdị: dịpụrụ adịpụ (م), mbido (مـ), medial (ـمـ), ikpeazụ (ـم).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp3: Arabic na-eji ọnụọgụ Arabic-Indic Ọwụwa Anyanwụ: ٠ ١ ٢ ٣ ٤ ٥ ٦ ٧ ٨ ٩ (0–9). Ọnụọgụ Western 0-9 sitere na ndị a site na mgbakọ na mwepụ Islam ochie - okwu ahụ bụ "nọmba Arab" na West n'ezie na-ezo aka na mmalite ndị a dị n'Ebe Ọwụwa Anyanwụ.
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp4: A na-eji Arabic Standard Modern (Fuṣḥā) na agụmakwụkwọ na mgbasa ozi; Olumba Darija/Levantine/Gulf dị iche iche site na mpaghara.
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_desc: Ụtọasụsụ Arabik gbadoro ụkwụ na mgbọrọgwụ mkpụrụedemede atọ (جذور) nke na-ewepụta okwu ndị metụtara ya. Nouns nwere grammatical okike (nwoke/nwoke), ọnụọgụ (otu/otu abụọ/ọtụtụ), na ikpe. A na-ejikọta ngwaa maka mmadụ, okike, na ọnụọgụgụ.
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_task: Chọpụta mkpụrụ okwu mgbọrọgwụ nke: كَاتِب (onye edemede), مَكْتُوب (dere), كِتَابَة (ederede). Kedu ihe bụ mgbọrọgwụ nkịtị?
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp0: Usoro mgbọrọgwụ nke atọ: mgbọrọgwụ ك-ت-ب (k-t-b) na-enye: كَتَبَ (kataba, o dere), كِتَاب (kitāb, akwụkwọ), مَكْتَبَة (maktaba, ọbá akwụkwọ).
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp1: Aha aha bụ nwoke ma ọ bụ nwanyị. Aha aha nwanyị na-ejedebe na ة (tā' marbūṭa).
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp2: A na-emepụta abụọ site na ịgbakwunye ان- (nominative) na aha: كِتَابَان = akwụkwọ abụọ.
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp3: Ọtụtụ ndị gbajiri agbaji: ọtụtụ plural Arabic na-agbanwe ụdaume dị n'ime, dịka ọmụmaatụ. كِتَاب → كُتُب (akwụkwọ).
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp4: Verb-subject-object (VSO) bụ usoro okwu ndabara na Arabic oge gboo; SVO bụ ihe a na-ahụkarị na Arab Standard Modern.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_desc: Iwulite okwu Arabic dị mfe mgbe ị ghọtara usoro mgbọrọgwụ. Ekele nkịtị, ọnụọgụgụ, na okwu kwa ụbọchị na-enye gị ntọala maka nzikọrịta ozi n'ezie.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_task: Tụgharịa asụsụ n'asụsụ Arabik: 'Ọ na-agụ akwụkwọ.' (nke ọma). Wee dee ahịrịokwu ahụ site na iji ngwaa-nke mbụ (VSO) usoro oge gboo.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp0: Ekele: السلام عليكم (As-salāmu ʿalaykum) — Udo diri gi. Azịza: وعليكم السلام.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp1: Ọnụ Ọgụgụ: وَاحِد (1), اثْنَان (2), ثَلَاثة (3), أَرْبَعَة (4), خَمْسَة (5), سِتَّة (6), سَبْعَة (7), ثَمَانِيَة), ثَمَانِيَة (8), عَةَ (8), عَتَة (10).
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp2: Ụbọchị: الأحد (Sunday), الاثنين (Monday), الثلاثاء (Tuesday), الأربعاء (Wednesday), الخميس (Thursday), الجمعة (Friday), السبت (Saturday).
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp3: Ngwaa nkịtị: ذَهَبَ (dhahaba, ịga), أَكَلَ (akala, iri nri), قَرَأَ (qara'a, ịgụ), كَتَبَ (kataba, ide ihe).
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp4: Formal vs informal: A na-eji Arabic Standard Modern na agụmakwụkwọ; Olumba okwu dị iche iche n'ofe ụwa Arab.
learnSch_french_language_f0_desc: Ịkpọ okwu French nwere ike bụrụ ihe ịma aka maka ndị na-asụ bekee n'ihi ụdaume imi, mkpụrụedemede nkịtị, na njikọ. Ịma ụda n'isi ụtụtụ na-eme ka ikwu okwu na nghọta dịkwuo mfe.
learnSch_french_language_f0_task: Gụpụta n'olu dara ụda: 'Les enfants ont un ami anglais.' Kanye akara njikọ ndị ịchọrọ ịme. Mee 3 ugboro.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp0: Udaume imi: en/em, in/im/ain/ein, on/om, un — a naghị akpọ consonant ikpeazụ: 'bon' = /bɔ̃/.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp1: Akwụkwọ ozi ndị gbachiri nkịtị: consonants ikpeazụ na-agbachikarị nkịtị (dịka 'vous' = /vu/), ewezuga n'ihu ụdaume (njikọ).
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp2: Njikọ: a na-akpọ consonant ikpeazụ na-agbachi nkịtị mgbe okwu na-esote malitere na ụdaume: 'les amis' = /le.z‿ami/.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp3: R na French bụ ụda guttural (uvular), n'adịghị ka Bekee r.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp4: Akara ụda olu: é (emechiri e), è (oghe e), ê (akụkọ ihe mere eme), ç ( soft c = /s/), î, ô, û (nke na-abụkarị akụkọ ihe mere eme).
learnSch_french_language_f1_desc: Ụtọ ụtọ asụsụ French na-eji aha ndị nwoke na nwanyị, njikọ ngwaa gafere mmadụ 6, yana ọtụtụ ihe dị iche iche. Nkà kacha mkpa bụ ịmụta ugbu a, gara aga (passé composé), na oge na-ezughị okè.
learnSch_french_language_f1_task: Jikọta 'parler' (ikwu okwu) n'ọnọdụ dị ugbu a maka mmadụ 6 niile. Wee were passé composé dee ahịrịokwu abụọ.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp0: Aha French niile bụ nwoke ma ọ bụ nwanyị: le livre (m.), la table (f.). Akụkọ kwenyere: un/une, le/la, les.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp1: Adjectives kwekọrịtara na okike na ọnụọgụgụ: un grand livre / une grande maison.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp2: Passé composé = avoir/être + gara aga participle: j'ai mangé (m eri), il est allé (ọ gara).
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp3: Ezughi oke (imparfait) na-akọwa ọnọdụ gara aga na-aga n'ihu: je mangeais (m na-eri nri), il faisait chaud.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp4: Negation: ne ... pas gbara ngwaa ahụ gburugburu: Je ne sais pas (Amaghị m).
learnSch_french_language_f2_desc: Ide na French chọrọ nlebara anya na iwu nkwekọrịta, akara edemede (oghere tupu !? ; :), na ndebanye aha. Nhazi doro anya - mmeghe, mmepe, mmechi - bụ isi na ederede agụmakwụkwọ French.
learnSch_french_language_f2_task: Dee nkeji okwu French dị 6 n'oge ọkacha mmasị gị. Jiri opekata mpe njikọ okwu 3 yana otu subjunctive.
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp0: Ederede French na-agbakwunye oghere tupu: ; ! ? na n'ime "guillemets" (akara ngụ).
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp1: Ihe subjunctive (subjonctif) na-egosipụta obi abụọ, mmetụta, ma ọ bụ mkpa: Il faut que tu viennes.
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp2: Njikọ okwu: d'abord (mbụ), ensuite/puis (mgbe ahụ), enfin (n'ikpeazụ), cependant (agbanyeghị), en effet (n'ezie).
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp3: Ihe owuwu na-abụghị nke mmadụ na-ahụkarị: Il est important de + infinitive; Na peut dire que...
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp4: Ọkpụkpọ akwụkwọ ozi: Madame/Monsieur (mmeghe nke ọma), Veuillez agréer l'expression de mes salutation distinguées (dị nso).
learnSch_spanish_language_title: Asụsụ Spanish || Mkpọkpọ okwu na ihe ndabere
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_name: Spanish bụ asụsụ na-agbanwe agbanwe n'usoro ụda - a na-akpọ okwu kpọmkwem dịka edere ya. Nke a na-eme ka ọ bụrụ otu n'ime asụsụ ndị mbido nwere ike ịnweta. Ịma ụda na usoro ụda olu n'oge bụ isi ihe.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_desc: Kaa akara na nrụgide na: universidad, hablar, árbol, joven. Tinye iwu ndabara wee lelee nke chọrọ akara ụdaolu.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_task: Spanish nwere ụdaume 5 dị ọcha: a, e, i, o, u - niile a na-akpọkarị.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp0: Akwụkwọ ozi ñ na-ada ka 'ny' (España, mañana). Abụọ ll na-ada ka 'y' n'ọtụtụ olumba.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp1: Nchegbu: okwu na-agwụ na ụdaume, n, ma ọ bụ s na-arụsi ọrụ ike na syllable nke abụọ ruo nke ikpeazụ. Akara ụda olu (á, é) kagburu nke a.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp2: Akwụkwọ ozi h na-agbachi nkịtị mgbe niile: hola = /ola/.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp3: Olumba: Castilian (Spain) na-eji /θ/ maka c/z; Spanish Latin America na-eji /s/.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_desc: Ụtọ ụtọ asụsụ Spanish bụ usoro na oge niile. Ịmụta aha okike, njikọ ngwaa, na oge abụọ gara aga (preterite na ezughị okè) na-enye gị ngwaọrụ iji jiri obi ike na-ekwurịta okwu.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_task: Kọwaa mgbe ị ga-eji ser vs. estar. Dee ahịrịokwu atụ 4: 2 na ser, 2 na estar.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp0: Aha aha bụ nwoke ma ọ bụ nwanyị: el libro (m.), la mesa (f.). Adjectives kwetara: un libro intereresante / una mesa interesante.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp1: Ser vs. estar: ha abụọ pụtara 'ịbụ'. Ser = àgwà na-adịgide adịgide; estar = steeti nwa oge: Soy médico / Estoy cansado.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp2: Preterite (indefinido) = emechara gara aga: Ayer comí pizza. Ezughi oke (iperfecto) = aga aga aga: Cuando era niño, jugaba...
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp3: Ngwaa na-atụgharị uche: me lavo (Ana m asa onwe m), se llama (aha ya bụ).
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp4: Subjunctive maka ọchịchọ/obi abụọ: Quiero que vengas. Ọ nwere ike ime.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_desc: Edemede Spanish na-esote mgbakọ doro anya. Ederede agụmakwụkwọ na-eji akwụkwọ ndebanye aha, ebe nkwurịta okwu kwa ụbọchị na-ekpo ọkụ na nke ziri ezi. Iwu siri ike nke njikọ na subjunctive na-ebuli ederede gị elu.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_task: Dee obere ozi-e (ahịrịokwu 6) n'asụsụ Spanish na-akpọ enyi gị ka ọ bịa oriri ụbọchị ọmụmụ. Jiri akwụkwọ ndebanye aha na nke nkịtị - wee tulee ha.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp0: Spanish na-eji ajụjụ tụgharịrị ¿ na mkpu ¡akara na mmalite nke ahịrịokwu.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp1: Ndebanye aha aha: usted (formal gị), enweghị nkwekọrịta, subjunctive maka arịrịọ nkwanye ùgwù.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp2: Njikọ: sin embargo (agbanyeghị), además (ọkwa), por lo tanto (ya mere), aunque (ọ bụ ezie), es decir (ya bụ).
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp3: Akwụkwọ ozi mmeghe: Estimado/a Sr./Sra. + aha nna. Mmechi: Le saluda atentamente / Un cordial saludo.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp4: Nhazi edemede: introducción (tesis), desarrollo (argumentos con ejemplos), nkwubi okwu.
learnSch_english_as_foreign_language_f0_: Ụtọasụsụ Bekee dị mfe na nhazi mana ọ nwere ọtụtụ ụkpụrụ na-adịghị agafe agafe. Ịghọta oge, akụkọ, na ngwaa modal bụ isi ihe na-eme ka nkwurịta okwu ziri ezi.
Degharịa ahịrịokwu ndị a na-arụsi ọrụ ike n'olu na-agafe agafe: (1) 'Onye nkuzi kọwara nkuzi ahụ.' (2) 'Ndị ọkà mmụta sayensị chọpụtara ụdị ọhụrụ.'
Bekee nwere ngwaa iri na abụọ. Ihe na-emekarị: ugbu a dị mfe (M na-arụ ọrụ), ugbu a na-aga n'ihu (Ana m arụ ọrụ), n'oge gara aga (m na-arụ ọrụ), ugbu a zuru okè (m arụ ọrụ).
Edemede: 'a/an' maka aha na-abụghị nke akọwapụtara (akwụkwọ); 'the' for specific nouns (akwụkwọ anyị tụlere).
Ngwaa ụdịdị (nwere ike, nwere ike, ga-, kwesịrị, ga-eme, nwere ike, nwere ike) igosipụta ikike, ikike, ọrụ, ma ọ bụ ihe puru omume.
Ọnọdụ: Ọ bụrụ + dị mfe gara aga → ga-enweghị njedebe (ọnọdụ nke abụọ: Ọ bụrụ na enwere m oge, m ga-eme njem).
Olu na-agafe agafe: Ihe ahụ na-aghọ isiokwu: 'Onye mmụta ahụ dere akwụkwọ ahụ.'
learnSch_english_as_foreign_language_f1_: Nghọta agụmagụ siri ike pụtara ịghọta ihe pụtara n'ụzọ doro anya, ime ntụnye, na ịtụle ebumnuche na usoro odee. Ọ dị mkpa maka ịga nke ọma agụmakwụkwọ na isiokwu ọ bụla.
Gụọ akụkọ akụkọ nwere otu paragraf ọ bụla. Dee: (1) echiche bụ́ isi, (2) otu ihe àmà e nyere, (3) o yikarịrị ka nzube onye dere ya bu.
Skimming: gụọ ngwa ngwa ka ị nweta echiche bụ isi. Nyocha: chọọ nkọwa ndị akọwapụtara.
Ntụle: ịgụ 'n'etiti ahịrị' - gịnị ka a na-ekwu ma ọ bụghị kpọmkwem?
Ebumnobi onye odee: ime ka a mara, mee ka mmadụ kweta, nwee obi ụtọ, ma ọ bụ kọwaa.
Okwu dị n'okwu gbara ya gburugburu: jiri okwu gbara ya gburugburu rụpụta ihe okwu amaghi ama pụtara.
Ọgụgụ dị mkpa: chọpụta ihe ndị a na-ekwu, nyochaa ihe akaebe, na echiche ajụjụ.
learnSch_english_as_foreign_language_f2_: Edemede Bekee nke agụmakwụkwọ na-eso usoro nkwekọrịta doro anya: ndebanye aha ahaziri ahazi, usoro okwu ziri ezi na usoro ezi uche dị na ya. Ịme mgbakọ ndị a na-enyere aka na ule, ngwa mahadum, na ndụ ọkachamara.
Dee okwu mmeghe nke ahịrị 5 maka edemede na: 'Mmetụta nke mgbasa ozi ọha na eze na ahụike uche afọ iri na ụma.' Tinye nkwupụta tesis.
Nhazi edemede: Okwu mmeghe (nko + okirikiri +), Ahụ (isi, ihe akaebe, nkọwa kwa paragraf), Mkpebi (nkwụghachi akwụkwọ akụkọ + mkpa ka ukwuu).
Nkwupụta edemede: otu ahịrịokwu doro anya na-ekwupụta isi arụmụka nke edemede ahụ.
Asụsụ mgbochi n'akwụkwọ agụmakwụkwọ: 'Enwere ike ịrụ ụka na…', 'Ihe akaebe na-egosi…', 'Nke a nwere ike igosi…'
Zenarị asụsụ nkịtị: ejila nkwekọrịta (emela → emela), nkwubi okwu, ma ọ bụ akụkọ onye mbụ ọ gwụla ma ajụrụ ya.
Ntụ aka: rụtụ aka na isi mmalite nke ọma (APA, MPLA, Harvard) ka ịzenarị mpụ.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_desc: Calculus bụ mgbakọ na mwepụ nke mgbanwe. Mgbakọ dị iche iche na-achọpụta ọnụego mgbanwe (mkpụrụkpụ); integral mgbako na-achọta ọnụọgụgụ (integrals). Ọ na-akwado physics, engineering, Economics, na niile quantitative sayensị.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_task: Chọta mwepu nke f(x) = 3x³ - 2x² + 5x - 7. Gosi nzọụkwụ ọ bụla site na iji iwu ike.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp0: Oke na-akọwa uru otu ọrụ na-abịarute ka x na-abịaru nso n'otu ebe.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp1: Mwepụta: f′(x) = ọnụego mgbanwe. Maka f(x) = xⁿ, f'(x) = nxⁿ⁻¹ (iwu ike).
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp3: Integral = mpaghara n'okpuru mgbanaka. ∫xⁿ dx = xⁿ⁺¹/(n+1) + C.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp4: Isi ihe dị mkpa nke mgbako: dị iche iche na mwekota bụ arụrụ arụ na-agbanwe agbanwe.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_desc: Linear algebra bụ mgbakọ na mwepụ nke vectors, matrices na mgbanwe ahịrị. Ọ dị mkpa na mmụta igwe, eserese kọmputa, injinia na sayensị data.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_task: Mmụba matrix A = [[1,2], [3,4]] site na matriks B = [[5,6], [7,8]]. Gosi mgbako niile.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp0: Vector nwere oke na ntụzịaka. Enwere ike ịgbakwunye vectors na nha.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp1: Matrix na-anọchi anya mgbanwe ahịrị ma ọ bụ usoro nha anya.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp2: Matrix multiplication abụghị commutative: AB ≠ BA n'ozuzu.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp3: Mkpebi: scalar nke na-egosi ma matriks enweghị ike ịtụgharị. det (A) = 0 → ọ bụghị ntụgharị.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp4: Eigenvalues ​​na eigenvectors: Av = λv. Ejiri ya na PCA, physics na Google's PageRank.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_name: Ndekọ ọnụ ọgụgụ na puru omume
learnUni_mathematics_f2_desc: Ọnụọgụ mahadum na-esi na nkọwa gaa na nke enweghị isi - na-eji data nlele iji nweta nkwubi okwu gbasara ọnụ ọgụgụ mmadụ. Ozizi nke puru omume na-enye ntọala siri ike.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_task: Ihe atụ nke ụmụ akwụkwọ 30 pụtara ịdị elu 170 cm, SD 8 cm. Gbakọọ oge ntụkwasị obi 95%.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp0: Random variable: mgbanwe nke uru nke ihe omume na-ekpebi uru ya.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp1: Nkesa nkịtị: mgbịrịgba mgbịrịgba, pụtara = etiti = ọnọdụ; 68-95-99.7 iwu.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp2: Nnwale echiche: H₀ (null) vs H₁ (ọzọ). p-uru <0.05 → jụ H₀.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp3: Ogologo oge ntụkwasị obi: oke nke ezi oke dabere na ekwe omume ekwuputara.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp4: Ọnụọgụ njikọ r: -1 = adịghị mma zuru oke, 0 = enweghị njikọ ahịrị, +1 = ezigbo mma.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_desc: Nha nhata dị iche iche na-akọwa ka ọnụọgụgụ si agbanwe n'ihe gbasara ọnụọgụ ndị ọzọ. Ha bụ asụsụ physics, injinia, bayoloji, na akụnụba - na-egosipụta ihe niile site na mmụba nke ọnụ ọgụgụ mmadụ ruo na mbara ala.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_task: Dozie dy/dx = 2xy na y(0) = 1. Mgbanwe dị iche iche, jikọta, tinye ọnọdụ mbụ.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp0: Otu ODE (nha nhata dị iche iche) na-agụnye usoro mmepụta ihe gbasara otu mgbanwe: dy/dx = f(x, y).
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp1: ODE dịpụrụ adịpụ: dy/dx = g(x) · h (y) → mgbanwe dị iche iche wee jikọta akụkụ abụọ.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp2: ODE linear nke mbụ: dy/dx + P(x) y = Q(x), edozi ya site na ntinye ihe μ = e^∫P(x)dx.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp3: ODE linear nke abụọ nwere ọnụọgụgụ oge niile: ay″ + by′ + cy = 0. dozie site na njirimara njirimara ar² + br + c = 0.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp4: Nsogbu bara uru mbụ (IVP): jiri ọnọdụ mbụ enyere iji chọta ihe ngwọta pụrụ iche mgbe niile C.
learnUni_mathematics_f4_desc: Ọnụọgụ mgbagwoju anya na-agbatị ezigbo ọnụọgụ site na iwebata i = √(-1). Ha dị mkpa na injinịa eletrịkị, nhazi mgbaama, arụ ọrụ quantum, na nyocha dị mgbagwoju anya.
learnUni_mathematics_f4_task: Express z = 1 + i n'ụdị pola. Chọta modulu ya, arụmụka, wee dee ya ka re^(iθ).
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp0: Ọnụọgụ mgbagwoju anya: z = a + bi, ebe a bụ akụkụ dị adị na b akụkụ nke echiche.
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp2: Ụdị polar: z = r (cosθ + i·sinθ) = re^(iθ) (usoro Euler).
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp3: Ihe njirimara Euler: e^(iπ) + 1 = 0 - a na-akpọkarị akara kacha mma na mgbakọ na mwepụ.
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp4: Usoro nke De Moivre: (cosθ + isinθ)ⁿ = cos(nθ) + i·sin(nθ).
learnUni_physics_f0_desc: Mechanics oge gboo na-akọwa mmegharị nke ihe macroscopic site na iji iwu Newton. Mechanics Lagrangian na Hamiltonian bụ mgbanwe dị ike karịa ejiri na physics dị elu.
learnUni_physics_f0_task: Otu kilogram 3 n'oke slide na-agbada n'ọdịdị enweghị esemokwu nke 30º. Gbakọọ osooso ya site na iji iwu 2nd Newton.
learnUni_physics_f0_kp0: Iwu nke abụọ nke Newton n'ụdị vector: ΣF = ma.
learnUni_physics_f0_kp1: Nchekwa oge: ngụkọta oge nke sistemu mechiri emechi na-adịgide.
learnUni_physics_f0_kp2: Nchekwa nke ike: na usoro mechiri emechi, ngụkọta ike arụ ọrụ na-adịgide adịgide.
learnUni_physics_f0_kp3: Angular momentum L = Iω (oge inertia × angular ọsọ).
learnUni_physics_f0_kp4: Mechanics Lagrangian: L = T - V (kinetic mwepu ike ike). Euler-Lagrange nha nha na-enweta mmegharị.
learnUni_physics_f1_name: Electromagnetism na-ejikọta ọkụ eletrik, magnetism na ìhè. Nha nhata anọ Maxwell na-akọwa n'ụzọ zuru ezu ihe nhụsianya electromagnetic ma buru amụma ebili mmiri electromagnetic.
learnUni_physics_f1_desc: Iwu Faraday kwupụta ma nye otu ngwa ụwa n'ezie (dịka jenerato ma ọ bụ ihe ngbanwe).
learnUni_physics_f1_task: Iwu Coulomb: F = kq₁q₂/r² (ike n'etiti ebubo).
learnUni_physics_f1_kp0: Iwu Gauss: mgbagharị ọkụ eletrik site na elu mechiri emechi ∝ ụgwọ agbachiri.
learnUni_physics_f1_kp1: Iwu Faraday: ịgbanwe mgbanwe ndọta na-ebute EMF.
learnUni_physics_f1_kp2: Nha nhata Maxwell na-ebu amụma na ebili mmiri electromagnetic na-aga n'ọsọ ọkụ.
learnUni_physics_f1_kp3: Ìhè bụ ebili mmiri electromagnetic: ubi E na B na-emegharị n'otu n'otu na n'ụzọ nke njem.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_name: Usoro data na-ahazi data nke ọma; algọridim na-ahazi ya. Ịhọrọ nhazi data ziri ezi na algọridim na-ekpebi ma mmemme na-agba ọsọ na milliseconds ma ọ bụ awa na nnukwu datasets.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_desc: Chọgharịa site na ọnụọgụ ọnụọgụ abụọ n'usoro ahaziri [2, 5, 8, 12, 16, 23] na-achọ 12. Nzọụkwụ ole?
learnUni_computer_science_f0_task: N'usoro: nke edobere nha, ohere O(1). Ndepụta ejikọrọ: nha ike, ohere O(n).
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp0: Array: fixed-size, O(1) access. Linked list: dynamic size, O(n) access.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp1: Stack (LIFO) na kwụ n'ahịrị (FIFO): eji emezigharị sistemụ, njem BFS/DFS.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp2: Tebụl hash: O(1) nyocha nkezi site na iji ọrụ hash.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp3: Ọchịchọ ọnụọgụ abụọ: O(log n) - chọrọ data edoziri. Ọchọ Linear: O(n).
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp4: Ihe nrịbama Big-O na-atụ ka oge ọsọ na-esi eto site na nha ntinye: O(1) <O(log n) <O(n) <O(n²).
learnUni_computer_science_f1_desc: Ebe nchekwa data na-echekwa ma hazie data maka iweghachite na nhazi nke ọma. Ebe nchekwa data mmekọrịta na-eji tebụl na SQL; Ebe nchekwa data NoSQL na-ejikwa data emebereghị ma ọ bụ kesaa.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_task: Dee ajụjụ SQL ka ịchọta ụmụ akwụkwọ niile nwere akara n'elu 80 site na tebụl a na-akpọ "ụmụ akwụkwọ" nwere ogidi (id, aha, ọkwa).
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp0: Ebe nchekwa data mmekọrịta na-echekwa data na tebụl (ahịrị = ndekọ, kọlụm = àgwà).
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp1: Ajụjụ ahọpụtara SQL: Họrọ kọlụm SITE na tebụl Ebe ọnọdụ ịtụ site na kọlụm.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp2: Igodo izizi: ihe nchọpụta pụrụ iche maka ahịrị ọ bụla. Igodo mba ọzọ: jikọtara ahịrị gafee tebụl.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp3: JOIN na-ejikọta ahịrị ndị sitere na tebụl dị iche iche: IINER JOIN na-eweghachi ahịrị dabara adaba.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp4: Njirimara ACID: Atomity, Consistency, Kewapụrụ, Ogologo oge - hụ na azụmahịa ndị a pụrụ ịdabere na ya.
learnUni_economics_f0_desc: Macroeconomics na-amụ akụ na ụba n'ozuzu ya: GDP, onu oriri, enweghị ọrụ, amụma ego na mmefu ego. Ụlọ akụ etiti na gọọmentị na-eji ngwa ndị a kwalite uto kwụsiri ike.
learnUni_economics_f0_task: Ọ bụrụ na ụlọ akụ etiti na-ebuli ọmụrụ nwa, gịnị na-eme nbinye ego, itinye ego na onu oriri? Kọwaa usoro mmetụta.
learnUni_economics_f0_kp0: GDP = C + I + G + (X-M): oriri + itinye ego + mmefu gọọmentị + mbupụ net.
learnUni_economics_f0_kp1: Ọnụ ego efu: ịrị elu n'ozuzu ọnụ ahịa. Deflation: daa na ọnụahịa. Ha abụọ nwere ike imerụ ahụ ma ọ bụrụ na oke.
learnUni_economics_f0_kp2: Enweghị ọrụ: esemokwu (n'etiti ọrụ), nhazi (nzube nka), cyclical ( nlaazu).
learnUni_economics_f0_kp3: Ụlọ akụ etiti na-ebuli ọnụego ọmụrụ nwa iji luso onu oriri ọgụ; wedata ha iji kpalite uto.
learnUni_economics_f0_kp4: Akụ na ụba Keynesian: gọọmentị kwesịrị ịbawanye mmefu n'oge nkwụghachi ụgwọ.
learnUni_biology_f0_desc: Usoro ihe omimi nke molecular na-enyocha usoro ihe omimi nke ndụ - DNA replication, transcription, translation, and gene regulation. Ọ bụ ihe ndabere nke biotechnology, ọgwụ, na mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa.
learnUni_biology_f0_task: Nyere usoro DNA ATG-GCC-TAA, kedu usoro mRNA? (Dochie T na U, na A↔T, C↔G)
learnUni_biology_f0_kp0: DNA → RNA → Protein: ozizi etiti nke bayoloji molecular.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp1: Nsụgharị: A na-eṅomi DNA n'ime RNA ozi (mRNA) n'ime oghere.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp2: Ntụgharị asụsụ: ribosomes na-agụ mRNA wee chịkọta amino acid n'ime protein.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp3: A codon bụ usoro 3-nucleotide na-edobe otu amino acid.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp4: CRISPR-Cas9: ngwá ọrụ na-edezi mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa nke nwere ike ibelata ma gbanwee usoro DNA.
learnUni_biology_f1_desc: Genetics na-akọwa otú e si eketa àgwà. Evolution na-akọwa otú ụdị dị iche iche si agbanwe ka oge na-aga site na nhọrọ eke na mgbanwe mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa. Ha jikọtara ọnụ na-akọwa ụdị ndụ dị iche iche.
learnUni_biology_f1_task: Jiri square Punnett gosi obe Aa × Aa. Gịnị bụ genotype na phenotype ruru?
learnUni_biology_f1_kp0: Iwu Mendel: iwu nkewapụ (alleles kewapụrụ n'oge nhazi gamete); iwu nke nnwere onwe iche iche.
learnUni_biology_f1_kp1: Ihe nkpuchi alleles na-achị achị na heterozygote (Aa).
learnUni_biology_f1_kp2: Hardy-Weinberg nha nha: allele frequencies na-adịgide adịgide na enweghị evolushọn.
learnUni_biology_f1_kp3: Nhọrọ eke: ndị nwere àgwà dabara adaba na gburugburu ebe obibi na-adị ndụ ma mụtakwuo.
learnUni_biology_f1_kp4: Mgbanwe bụ isi mmalite nke mgbanwe mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa; ọtụtụ na-anọpụ iche.
learnSch_physics_f3_desc: Thermodynamics na-amụ okpomọkụ, okpomọkụ, na ngbanwe nke ike n'ime ọrụ. Iwu atọ ndị a bụ isi na-achịkwa injin ọkụ ọ bụla, friji, na mmeghachi kemịkalụ n'ụwa. Ịghọta thermodynamics na-akọwa ihe kpatara na engines enweghị ike ịdị mma 100% yana ihe kpatara ice ji agbaze mgbe e metụrụ ya aka.
learnSch_physics_f3_kp0: Okpomọkụ na-atụle nkezi kinetic ike nke ahụ; a na-atụ ya na Kelvin (K) ma ọ bụ Celsius (°C).
learnSch_physics_f3_kp1: Iwu nke 1st nke Thermodynamics: A na-echekwa ike - okpomọkụ agbakwunyere na usoro nhata mgbanwe nke ike dị n'ime yana ọrụ emere (ΔU = Q - W).
learnSch_physics_f3_kp2: Iwu nke abụọ: okpomoku na-esi n'oku na-ekpo ọkụ na-efega n'otu oge, ọ dịghị mgbe ọzọ. Entropy (nsogbu) na-abawanye mgbe niile na usoro dịpụrụ adịpụ.
learnSch_physics_f3_kp3: Ikike okpomọkụ akọwapụtara (c): Q = mcΔT - ike dị mkpa iji bulie 1 n'arọ nke ihe site na 1 Celsius C.
learnSch_physics_f3_kp4: Ịrụ ọrụ nke igwe ọkụ: η = W / Q_hot = 1 - T_cold / T_hot (arụmọrụ Carnot - ihe kachasị elu).
learnSch_physics_f3_task: Ihe mgbochi ígwè 200 g (c = 0.45 J/g·°C) na-ekpo ọkụ site na 20 Celsius ruo 100 Celsius. Ego ole ka ike dị mkpa? Wee gbakọọ arụmọrụ Carnot nke injin na-arụ ọrụ n'etiti 500 K na 300 K.
learnSch_physics_f4_desc: Nkà mmụta sayensị nuklia na-enyocha nhazi nke nuclei atomic na ike ndị na-ejikọta ha ọnụ. Nuclei na-adịghị akwụsi ike na-ahapụ ike dị ka radieshon iji ruo ọnọdụ kwụsiri ike karị. Mmeghachi omume nuklia na-eme ka anyanwụ dị ike, osisi nuklia, ma kọwaa mmalite nke ihe ndị dị na kpakpando.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp0: Nucleus nwere protons (nke ọma) na neutrons (nọpụ iche), nke ike nuklia siri ike jikọtara ọnụ - dị ike karịa mgbagha electrostatic.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp1: Alfa (α) ire ere na-ewepụta oghere helium (2 protons + 2 neutrons). Beta (β) ire ere na-ewepụta ihe eletrọn ma ọ bụ positron. Gamma (γ) ire ere na-ewepụta radieshon ọkụ eletrik dị elu.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp2: Ọkara ndụ: oge ​​ọkara nke ihe nlele redio ga-ere ere. Mgbe n ọkara ndụ gachara, akụkụ nke fọdụrụ bụ (½)ⁿ.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp3: nha oke-ike: E = mc² - obere uka na-atụgharị gaa na nnukwu ike (c = 3 × 10⁸ m/s).
learnSch_physics_f4_kp4: Fission na-ekewa oghere dị arọ (dịka ²³⁵U) na-ewepụta ike; Ngwakọta na-ejikọta oghere ọkụ (dịka ²H + ³H → ⁴He) na-ewepụta ike karịa kwa otu nkeji.
learnSch_physics_f4_task: Isotope redioaktivu nwere ọkara ndụ nke afọ 5. Ọ bụrụ na ịmalite na 80 g, ole ka fọdụrụ mgbe afọ 15 gasịrị? Dee nzọụkwụ ọ bụla. Mgbe ahụ jiri E = mc² chọta ike ewepụtara ma ọ bụrụ na 1 g nke uka gbanwere kpamkpam ka ọ bụrụ ike.
learnSch_physics_f5_desc: Quantum physics na-akọwa omume nke ihe na ume n'ọkwa atọm na subatomic. N'ọkwa a, ụmụ irighiri ihe na-eme ka ebili mmiri, ike na-abịa na ngwugwu pụrụ iche (quanta), na omume nke nha na-emetụta ihe a hụrụ. Quantum physics na-adabere na lasers, semiconductor, na nyocha MRI.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp0: Mmekọrịta Planck: ike nke foton bụ E = hf, ebe h = 6.63×10⁻³⁴ J·s (Planck's constant) na f bụ ugboro.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp1: Mmetụta fotoelectric: ọkụ na-ewepụ electrons site na metal na-ebupụta - na-egosi na ìhè na-akpa àgwà dị ka ụmụ irighiri ihe (foto). Einstein nwetara Nrite Nobel maka nkọwa a.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp2: Wave – urughuru duality: eletrọn (na ihe niile) na-akpa àgwà dị ka ma ebili mmiri na ahụ; de Broglie wavelength λ = h/(mv).
learnSch_physics_f5_kp3: Ụkpụrụ ejighị n'aka Heisenberg: Δx · Δp ≥ ℏ/2 - ị nweghị ike ịma ma ọnọdụ na ike nke urughuru kpọmkwem n'otu oge.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp4: Electrons na-eji ike dị iche na atom; mgbe eletrọn dara n'ọkwa dị ala, ọ na-ewepụta foton nwere ume ya nhata.
learnSch_physics_f5_task: Igwefoto nwere ugboro 6.0 × 10¹⁴ Hz. Gbakọọ ike ya (h = 6.63×10⁻³⁴ J·s). Wee chọta ogologo ikuku eletrọn na-agagharị na 2.0×10⁶ m/s (mass = 9.11×10⁻³¹ n'arọ).
learnSch_physics_f6_desc: Ntụgharị uche pụrụiche nke Einstein (1905) gbanwere physics site n'igosi na ohere na oge abụghị nke zuru oke - ha na-agbatị na mpikota onu dabere na ngwa ngwa. N'ọsọ ọsọ dị nso na ọsọ nke ọkụ, oge na-ebelata, ihe na-ebelata, na oke na-abawanye. Mmetụta ndị a, nke satịlaịtị GPS na ndị na-eme ngwa ngwa kwadoro, na-agbanwe otú anyị si aghọta eluigwe na ala.
learnSch_physics_f6_kp0: Nke mbụ postulate: iwu nke physics bụ otu n'ime ihe niile inertial (na-adịghị accelerating) ntụaka Frames.
learnSch_physics_f6_kp1: 2nd postulate: ọsọ nke ọkụ c = 3×10⁸ m / s na-adịgide adịgide maka ndị niile na-ekiri ya, n'agbanyeghị mmegharị nke isi iyi ma ọ bụ onye na-ekiri ya.
learnSch_physics_f6_kp2: Mgbasa oge: elekere na-akpụ akpụ na-eji nwayọ nwayọ. Δt' = Δt / √ (1 - v²/c²). Ka ị na-aga ngwa ngwa, oge na-adị nwayọọ na-agafe gị.
learnSch_physics_f6_kp3: Mkpebi ogologo: ihe na-akpụ akpụ dị mkpụmkpụ na ntụziaka mmegharị ahụ. L' = L₀ √(1 - v²/c²).
learnSch_physics_f6_kp4: Mass–ene equivalence E = mc²: oke izu ike bụ ụdị ike echekwara. Nke a bụ ya mere mmeghachi omume nuklia na-ahapụ ike dị ukwuu.
learnSch_physics_f6_task: Otu rọketi dị 100 m ogologo na izu ike ma na-aga na 0.8c. Gịnị bụ ogologo ya ka onye na-ekiri ihe tụrụ n'ụwa? Jiri L' = L₀√(1 - v²/c²). Ọzọkwa, n'ime nkeji ole ka nkeji na rọketi dị iche na nkeji 1 n'ụwa?
learnSch_chemistry_f3_desc: Organic chemistry na-amụ ogige ndị nwere carbon. Ikike pụrụ iche nke Carbon imepụta njikọ dị n'akụkụ anọ na-emepụta ihe fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ ụdị ụmụ irighiri ihe dị iche iche - ihe mgbochi ndụ, ọgwụ, mmanụ ọkụ na plastik. Ịme otu ndị na-arụ ọrụ na ụdị mmeghachi omume na-emepe biochemistry, nkà mmụta ọgwụ na sayensị ihe.
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp0: Mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa niile nwere carbon, na-ejikọta ya na hydrogen (C-H) yana mgbe mgbe na O, N, S, ma ọ bụ halogens.
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp1: Hydrocarbons: alkanes (C-C single bond, saturated), alkenes (C = C okpukpu abụọ, unsaturated), alkynes (C≡C triple bond).
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp2: Otu ndị na-arụ ọrụ na-ekpebi njirimara kemịkal: -OH (mmanya), -COOH (carboxylic acid), -NH₂ (amine), -CHO (aldehyde), -C = O (ketone).
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp3: Isomers ihe owuwu nwere otu usoro ihe omimi mana njikọta dị iche iche; stereoisomers nwere otu njikọ mana nhazi oghere dị iche iche.
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp4: Polymers bụ nnukwu ụmụ irighiri ihe e wuru site na nkeji monomer ugboro ugboro: mgbakwunye polymerisation (ethene → polyethene) na condensation polymerisation (amino acid → proteins).
learnSch_chemistry_f3_task: Dezie usoro nhazi nke etanoic acid (CH₃COOH). Chọpụta otu na-arụ ọrụ. Dee nha maka mmeghachi omume ya na sodium hydroxide (NaOH) wee kpọọ aha ngwaahịa a.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_desc: Electrochemistry na-enyocha mmekọrịta dị n'etiti mmeghachi omume kemịkal na ike eletrik. Batrị na-agbanwe ike kemịkal na ọkụ eletrik; electrolysis na-emeghachi omume. Mmeghachi omume redox - nnyefe elektrọn n'etiti ụdị - dị na etiti usoro elektrọnịkị ọ bụla, site na nchara ruo na chajị ekwentị gị.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp0: Oxidation = ọnwụ nke eletrọn (OIL); Mbelata = uru nke eletrọn (RIG). Mmeghachi omume redox ọ bụla nwere usoro abụọ n'otu oge.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp1: N'ime cell galvanic (voltaic), mmeghachi omume redox ozugbo na-akpali ọkụ eletrik. The anode bụ adịghị mma (oxidation); cathode dị mma (mbelata).
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp2: Electrolysis na-eji ike eletrik dị n'èzí na-ebugharị mmeghachi omume na-adịghị ahụ anya - nke a na-eji na-ete ọla, mepụta aluminium, na kewaa mmiri n'ime H₂ na O₂.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp3: Ọkọlọtọ electrode nwere ike (E°): E° dị elu pụtara ihe na-eme ka ihe na-eme oxidising siri ike. Cell voltaji = E ° katode - E°anode.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp4: Iwu Faraday: oke nke ihe etinyere na electrolysis dabara na ụgwọ a gafere (Q = Ọ) yana n'ụkpụrụ molar.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_task: Na electrolysis nke itughari sulfuric acid, dee ọkara-equations na nke ọ bụla electrode. Chọpụta ngwaahịa anode na cathode. Ọ bụrụ na nke ugbu a nke 2 A na-eru maka s500, ole mole eletrọn ka a na-ebufe? (F = 96 500 C/mol)
learnSch_chemistry_f4_tp0: Mmeghachi omume redox na steeti oxidation
learnSch_chemistry_f5_desc: Chemical nha nhata emee na a mechiri emechi usoro mgbe n'ihu na agbara mmeghachi omume na-aga n'ihu na nha nha, ya mere, ịta nke reactants na ngwaahịa na-anọgide na-adịgide adịgide. Ịghọta nha nha dị mkpa maka kemịkalụ ụlọ ọrụ (usoro Haber) na usoro ndu (pH ọbara, ọrụ enzyme).
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp0: Na nha nha, ọnụego nke mmeghachi omume na-aga n'ihu nhata nha nke mmeghachi omume azụ - mkpokọta na-adịgide adịgide mana ọ bụchaghị nhata.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp1: Nha nhata mgbe niile K = [ngwaahịa]^n / [reactants]^m. K>> 1: ngwaahịa ọkacha mmasị. K << 1: ndị na-emeghachi omume masịrị.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp2: Ụkpụrụ Le Chatelier: ọ bụrụ na usoro na nha nha na-akpaghasị, ọ na-agbanwe iji gbochie mgbanwe ahụ ma weghachi nha nha.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp3: Ịba ụba nke ihe na-emeghachi omume na-agbanwe nha nha n'ihu ngwaahịa. Iwepu ngwaahịa na-eme otu ihe ahụ.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp4: Maka gas: nrụgide na-abawanye na-agbanwe nha nha n'akụkụ ya na moles nke gas dị ole na ole. Mmụba okpomọkụ na-akwado ntụziaka endothermic.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_task: N₂(g) + 3H₂(g) ⇌ 2NH₃(g) ΔH = -92 kJ/mol. Buru amụma ngbanwe na nha nha mgbe: (a) na-abawanye nrụgide, (b) na-abawanye okpomọkụ, (c) agbakwunyere N₂ ọzọ. Jiri ụkpụrụ Le Chatelier kọwaa nke ọ bụla.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_tp1: Nha nhata na-agbanwe agbanwe Kc na Kp
learnSch_chemistry_f6_desc: Chemistry gburugburu ebe obibi na-enyocha ka kemịkal si emekọrịta ikuku, mmiri, na ala - yana otu ọrụ mmadụ si agbanwe usoro ndị a. Ọ na-akọwa mgbanwe ihu igwe, mbelata ozone, mmetọ mmiri, na kemịkalụ dị n'azụ ngwọta na-adigide dị ka kemistri akwụkwọ ndụ akwụkwọ ndụ na ihe ndị nwere ike imebi ndụ.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp0: Greenhouse gas (CO₂, CH₄, N₂O, H₂O vapour) banye na re-emit infrared radieshon, okpomọkụ Ụwa elu - griin haus mmetụta.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp1: Mmiri mmiri acid: SO₂ na NOₓ (site na mmanụ ọkụ fossil) na-agbaze n'ime mmiri ozuzo na-akpụ H₂SO₃ na HNO₃, na-eweda pH ma na-emerụ gburugburu ebe obibi.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp2: Mbelata ozone: CFC na-ahapụ Cl· radicals na stratosphere, nke na-emebi ngwa ngwa O₃: Cl· + O₃ → ClO· + O₂ (mmeghachi omume yinye).
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp3: Eutrophication: nitrate na phosphate na-agbapụ site na fatịlaịza na-eme ka ifuru algal na-eme ka ikuku oxygen gbazee ma na-egbu ndụ mmiri.
