learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp4: Ụkpụrụ kemistri akwụkwọ ndụ akwụkwọ ndụ: mmeghachi omume imewe nke na-ebelata ihe mkpofu, na-eji nri nri emeghari, zere ihe mgbaze dị ize ndụ, ma na-ebuli akụ na ụba atọm.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_task: Kọwaa mmeghachi omume yinye zuru ezu nke otu molekul CFC nwere ike ibibi ọtụtụ puku ụmụ irighiri ihe ozone. Dee usoro igodo abụọ a. Wee gbakọọ akụ na ụba atọm nke mmeghachi omume 2H₂ + O₂ → 2H₂O.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_tp0: Mmetụta griin haus na ihu igwe
learnSch_chemistry_f6_tp1: Mmiri acid na oyi akwa ozone
learnSch_chemistry_f6_tp2: Ogo mmiri na kemistri akwụkwọ ndụ akwụkwọ ndụ
learnSch_biology_f3_desc: Genetics bụ sayensị nke ihe nketa - ka esi esi n'aka nne na nna nye ụmụ site na mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa na chromosomes. Ọ na-akwado ọgwụ (ọrịa mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa, ọgwụgwọ ahaziri onwe ya), ọrụ ugbo (ịzụlite ihe ubi), na sayensị forensic (profiling DNA). Ịghọta mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa pụtara ịghọta ihe mere ndị mmadụ n'otu n'otu ji dị iche na otú ọrịa ndị e ketara eketa si ebili.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp0: Genes bụ akụkụ nke DNA na-edepụta maka protein. Mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa ọ bụla nwere otu ọnọdụ (ebe) na chromosome.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp1: Ụmụ mmadụ nwere chromosomes iri abụọ na atọ (ngụkọta 46); otu set nke nne na nna ọ bụla. chromosomes mmekọahụ: XX = nwanyi, XY = nwoke.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp2: Onye na-achị achị (B) masks recessive allele (b) na heterozygote (Bb). Àgwà mgbagha na-apụta nanị mgbe homozygous (bb).
learnSch_biology_f3_kp3: Oghere Punnett na-ebu amụma maka ike nke mkpụrụ genotypes. Otu obe monohybrid Bb × Bb na-enye oke phenotype 3:1.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp4: Àgwà ndị metụtara mmekọahụ (dịka ìsì agba, haemophilia) na-ebu na X chromosome; ụmụ nwoke (XY) na-emetụtakarị.
learnSch_biology_f3_task: Nne na nna abụọ nwere anya aja aja (Bb × Bb) nwere ụmụ. See mpaghara Punnett. Kedu ihe puru omume nke nwata nwere anya na-acha anụnụ anụnụ (bb)? Gịnị bụ genotype na phenotype ruru?
learnSch_biology_f4_desc: Evolushọn bụ mgbanwe n'àgwà eketa nke ọha mmadụ n'ọgbọ. Nhọrọ eke Darwin bụ usoro bụ isi: ndị nwere àgwà mara mma na-adị ndụ ma mụtakwa ọzọ. Evolushọn na-akọwa oke ụdị ndụ dị n'ụwa na ihe jikọrọ ya na ụdị dị iche iche.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp0: Nhọrọ eke: ndị nwere àgwà dabara adaba na gburugburu ebe obibi na-adị ndụ ma mụtakwuo, na-ebufe àgwà ọma nye ụmụ.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp1: Ihe akaebe maka evolushọn: ndekọ fossil, ntụnyere anatomi (ụdị homologue), myiri DNA, biogeography, nkọwapụta hụrụ.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp2: Mmụba dị na DNA bụ isi mmalite nke mgbanwe mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa ọhụrụ. Ọtụtụ na-anọpụ iche; ụfọdụ na-emerụ ahụ; ole na ole na-enye uru.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp3: Nkọwapụta: mgbe ndị mmadụ nọpụrụ iche (geographic, mmeputakwa) ogologo oge zuru oke, ha na-etolite n'ụdị dị iche iche na-enweghị ike ịgbakọ ọnụ.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp4: Mgbochi ọgwụ nje bụ evolushọn na-arụ ọrụ: nje bacteria nwere mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa na-adị ndụ ma mụta nwa, na-eme ka ụdị ndị na-eguzogide ọgwụ na-achịkwa.
learnSch_biology_f4_task: Kọwaa n'ime usoro anọ ka mgbochi nje na-esi etolite n'ime ọnụ ọgụgụ nje site na iji nhọrọ eke. Mgbe ahụ kọwaa ụdị ihe àmà abụọ dị iche iche maka evolushọn ma kọwaa ihe nke ọ bụla na-egosi.
learnSch_biology_f5_desc: Osisi bụ ndị bụ isi na-emepụta ihe fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ ihe niile dị ndụ - ha na-ejide ike anyanwụ ma gbanwee ya ka ọ bụrụ ihe ọkụkụ site na photosynthesis. Ịghọta usoro ihe ọmụmụ ihe ọkụkụ na-ekpuchi usoro (mgbọrọgwụ, ị ga, epupụta, ifuru), photosynthesis, mmeputakwa, na ọrụ dị mkpa osisi na-arụ n'ịhazi ikuku ụwa na inye ndụ ndụ.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp0: Photosynthesis: 6CO₂ + 6H₂O + ike ọkụ → C₆H₁₂O₆ + 6O₂. Ọ na-apụta na chloroplasts nwere chlorophyll.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp1: A na-emegharị akwụkwọ maka photosynthesis: nnukwu ebe dị elu, dị gịrịgịrị, epidermis transperent, stomata maka ntinye CO₂, na netwọk vaskụla bara ụba.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp2: Xylem na-ebufe mmiri na mineral site na mgbọrọgwụ gaa na akwụkwọ. Phloem na-ebuga shuga site na akwụkwọ ya gaa n'osisi ndị ọzọ.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp3: Ntugharị: mmiri na-ekupụ site na stomata, na-ebuli mmiri elu site na xylem (iyi transspiration).
learnSch_biology_f5_kp4: Mmeputakwa osisi: osisi okooko na-eji pollination (nfefe pollen) na fatịlaịza na-amị mkpụrụ; mkpụrụ na-agbasasị n'ebe ọhụrụ.
learnSch_biology_f5_task: Chepụta nnwale iji nwalee ma ike ọkụ na-emetụta ọnụego photosynthesis na pondweed. Kwupụta mgbanwe ndị nọọrọ onwe ha, dabere na ndị a na-achịkwa. Buru amụma ma kọwaa nsonaazụ ya.
learnSch_biology_f6_desc: Microbiology bụ ọmụmụ nke microscopic ntule - nje bacteria, nje, fungi na protists. Obere ihe ndị a na-akpụzi ahụike mmadụ, ọrụ ugbo, mmepụta nri, na okirikiri carbon zuru ụwa ọnụ. Ịghọta ụmụ nje dị mkpa maka ọgwụ (ọgwụ nje, ọgwụ ịgba ọgwụ mgbochi ọrịa), nkà na ụzụ biotechnology, na ịghọta ọrịa.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp0: Bacteria bụ prokaryotes (enweghị oghere). Ọtụtụ adịghị njọ ma ọ bụ bara uru; ụfọdụ bụ nje na-ebute ọrịa dịka ụkwara nta na ọgbụgbọ.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp1: Nje virus abụghị mkpụrụ ndụ - ha bụ eriri DNA / RNA na uwe protein. Ha na-emepụtaghachi naanị site n'ịkwado ígwè ọrụ cell host.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp2: Ọgwụ nje na-egbu ma ọ bụ na-egbochi nje bacteria mana ọ baghị uru megide nje (oyi nkịtị, flu). Ịṅụbiga mmanya ókè na-akpali iguzogide nje.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp3: Usoro ahụ ji alụso ọrịa ọgụ: ihe nchebe na-abụghị nke a kapịrị ọnụ (akpụkpọ ahụ, phagocytes) na ihe nchebe kpọmkwem (lymphocytes na-emepụta ọgwụ mgbochi). Ịgba ọgwụ mgbochi ọrịa na-azụ usoro ahụ ji alụso ọrịa ọgụ na-ebuteghị ọrịa.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp4: Microbes bara uru: nje bacteria na-enyere aka mgbaze; fungi na-emepụta ọgwụ nje (penicillin sitere na Penicillium); yist ferments sugars maka achịcha na biya.
learnSch_biology_f6_task: Tụlee usoro nke nje bacteria na nje. Kọwaa ihe mere ọgwụ nje ji arụ ọrụ n'otu ma ọ bụghị nke ọzọ. Kọwaa ụzọ abụọ ahụ ahụ si echebe onwe ya pụọ ​​n'ọrịa nje.
learnSch_biology_f6_tp2: Microbes bara uru na ọgwụ nje
learnSch_computer_science_f3_desc: A haziri usoro data ụzọ iji chekwaa na ịnweta data; algọridim bụ usoro nzọụkwụ site na iji dozie nsogbu. Ịhọrọ nhazi data ziri ezi na algọridim na-ekpebi ma mmemme na-agba ọsọ na milliseconds ma ọ bụ awa. Isiokwu a bụ ọkpụkpụ azụ nke mmepe ngwanrọ dị mma.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp0: Arrays na-echekwa ihe na usoro edozi; ohere site index bụ O(1). Ndepụta na-enye ohere nha dị ike mana enwere ike ịnweta nwayọ nwayọ.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp1: Stacks (LIFO - ikpeazụ na, nke mbụ pụta) na kwụ n'ahịrị (FIFO - nke mbụ na, nke mbụ) jikwaa mkpokọta iwu maka ikpe eji eme ihe.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp2: Ọchịchọ Linear na-enyocha ihe niile (O(n)); ọchụchọ ọnụọgụ abụọ na-achọ data ahaziri ahazi wee webie oghere ọchụchọ nke ọ bụla nzọụkwụ ọ bụla (O(log n)).
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp3: Ụdị afụ na-atụnyere ihe ndị dị n'akụkụ wee gbanwee ha (O(n²)). Jikọta ụdị nkewa na ejikọta ugboro ugboro (O(n log n)) - ngwa ngwa maka nnukwu data.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp4: Big-O notation na-akọwa arụmọrụ algọridim: O(1) na-adịgide adịgide, O(n) bụ ahịrị, O(n²) bụ quadratic - nke dị ala ka mma maka nnukwu ntinye.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_task: Chọpụta ụdị afụ na ndepụta [5, 3, 8, 1, 4]. Gosi ngafe ọ bụla. Gụọ mkpokọta ntụnyere na swaps. Wee dee pseudocode maka ọchụchọ ọnụọgụ abụọ na ndetu ahaziri.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_desc: Ebe nchekwa data bụ nchịkọta data ahaziri ahazi. Ebe nchekwa data mmekọrịta na-echekwa data na tebụl ejiri igodo jikọtara ya. SQL na-enye gị ohere ịmepụta, jụọ ajụjụ, melite ma hichapụ ndekọ. Ebe nchekwa data na-enye ike ngwa ngwa ọ bụla sitere na sistemụ njikwa ụlọ akwụkwọ ruo na nyiwe mgbasa ozi mmekọrịta.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp0: Ebe nchekwa data mmekọrịta na-echekwa data na tebụl (ahịrị = ndekọ, kọlụm = ubi). Ejikọtara tebụl site na igodo isi na nke mba ọzọ.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp1: Isi igodo: ihe nchọpụta pụrụ iche maka ndekọ ọ bụla na tebụl. Igodo mba ọzọ: na-ejikọta otu tebụl na igodo isi nke ọzọ.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp2: Ajụjụ ahọpụtara SQL: Họrọ kọlụm SITE na tebụl Ebe ọnọdụ ịtụ site na kọlụm. Ọmụmaatụ: Họrọ aha SITE ụmụ akwụkwọ ebe akara = 'A'.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp3: Nkịtị na-ebelata mbiputegharị data site na nkewa tebụl ka a na-echekwa ibe data ọ bụla naanị otu ugboro.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp4: Ọrụ CRUD: Mepụta (INSERT), Gụọ (Họrọ), Mmelite (Nwelite), Hichapụ (Hichapụ) - omume nchekwa data anọ bụ isi.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_task: Chepụta nchekwa data dị mfe maka ọbá akwụkwọ ụlọ akwụkwọ (akwụkwọ, ụmụ akwụkwọ, mgbazinye ego). Kọwaa ma ọ dịkarịa ala tebụl 3, ubi ha, na mmekọrịta. Wee dee ajụjụ SQL ka ịchọta akwụkwọ niile na mbinye ego ugbu a nye nwa akwụkwọ ID 42.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_desc: Netwọk na-ejikọ kọmputa iji kesaa data na akụrụngwa. Ịntanetị bụ netwọk kasị ukwuu n'ụwa - netwọk nke netwọk. Ịghọta otú data si eme njem (protocol, adreesị IP, DNS) na otu esi echekwa ya (ezoro ezo, firewalls) dị mkpa na afọ dijitalụ.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp0: LAN (Network Mpaghara Mpaghara): jikọọ ngwaọrụ na obere mpaghara. WAN (Wide Area Network): na-ejikọ LAN n'ebe dị anya - ịntanetị bụ WAN.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp1: Adreesị IP: akara ọnụọgụ pụrụ iche maka ngwaọrụ ọ bụla na netwọk (dịka 192.168.1.1 maka IPv4). DNS tụgharịrị aha ngalaba (google.com) gaa na adreesị IP.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp2: TCP/IP protocol suite: Usoro njikwa nnyefe na-eme ka ngwugwu data rute n'ụzọ ziri ezi; Internet Protocol na-eduzi ha.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp3: HTTP (HyperText Nyefee Protocol) na-ebufe ibe weebụ. HTTPS na-agbakwụnye izo ya ezo TLS - akara mkpọchi na-egosi ezoro ezo njikọ gị.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp4: Mgbanwe nke ngwugwu: A na-ekewa data n'ime ngwugwu, chụpụrụ nke ọ bụla n'onwe ya n'ofe netwọk ahụ, wee gbakọta na ebe a na-aga.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_task: Chọpụta ihe na-eme mgbe ị pịnyere 'www.example.com' n'ime ihe nchọgharị wee pịa Tinye - site na nyocha DNS ruo na ịnweta ibe weebụ. Kpọọ protocol na nzọụkwụ ọ bụla metụtara.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_tp2: Nchekwa: HTTPS na izo ya ezo
learnSch_language_arts_f3_desc: Rhetoric bụ nka nke nkwurịta okwu na-eme ka mmadụ kwenye - iji asụsụ eme ihe nke ọma iji mee ka ndị na-ege ntị mara, kwenye, ma ọ bụ kpalie ndị na-ege ntị. Arụmụka na-akụziri gị ka ị wulite arụmụka ezi uche dị na ya, nke dabere na ihe akaebe na ịchọpụta na imegide echiche na-adịghị ike. Nkà ndị a dị mkpa maka arụmụka, edemede, usoro iwu, na ndụ obodo.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp0: Ụdị nkwenye atọ nke Aristotle: Ethos (ntụkwasị obi nke ọkà okwu), Pathos (mkpegharị mmetụta uche), Logos (arụmụka ezi uche na ihe akaebe).
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp1: Arụmụka siri ike nwere: nkwupụta doro anya (akwụkwọ akụkọ), ihe na-akwado, ihe akaebe, na nzaghachi na mgbagha.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp2: Echiche ezi uche dị na ya na-emebi arụmụka: ad hominem (na-awakpo onye ahụ), onye ahịhịa (na-akọwahie echiche megidere), dichotomy ụgha (naanị nhọrọ abụọ ka a na-enye).
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp3: Echiche ngbanwe na-esi na ụkpụrụ izugbe gaa na nkwubi okwu ụfọdụ (mmadụ niile na-anwụ anwụ; Socrates bụ mmadụ; ya mere Socrates na-anwụ anwụ).
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp4: Echiche na-akpali akpali na-enweta nkwubi okwu n'ozuzu site na nleba anya kpọmkwem - dị ike mana ọ nwere ike ịdị njọ ma ọ bụrụ na ihe atụ anaghị anọchi anya ya.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_task: Gụọ mpempe echiche akwụkwọ akụkọ. Chọpụta isi ihe na-ekwu, ihe akaebe na-akwado atọ, ndị e bu n'obi na-ege ntị, na otu ụgha ezi uche dị na ya (ọ bụrụ na ọ dị). Wee dee arụmụka okwu 200 site na iji ụdị atọ nke Aristotle.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_tp1: Echiche ezi uche dị na ya
learnSch_history_f2_name: Akụkọ ihe mere eme nke oge a (1500–1900)
learnSch_history_f2_desc: Oge ọgbara ọhụrụ gbanwere ụwa site na nyocha, mgbanwe, na mmepụta ihe. Mgbasawanye nke Europe jikọtara kọntinent dị iche iche, Enlightenment gbara ọdịnala aka mgba na ezi uche, mgbanwe ọchịchị onye kwuo uche ya gbanwere ọchịchị, na mgbanwe mmepụta ihe gbanwere otú ndị mmadụ si ebi na arụ ọrụ - ịtọ ntọala maka ụwa nke oge a.
learnSch_history_f2_kp0: Age nke nyocha (1400s-1600s): Ndị ike Europe (Portugal, Spain, England, Netherlands) gafere na America, Africa, na Asia, na-ekepụta netwọk azụmahịa zuru ụwa ọnụ na alaeze ukwu colonial.
learnSch_history_f2_kp1: Mgbanwe Sayensị na Ọmụma (1600s–1700s): ndị na-eche echiche dịka Galileo, Newton, Locke, na Voltaire ji ezi uche na nleba anya na-ama ikike ụka na ike ọdịnala aka.
learnSch_history_f2_kp2: Mgbanwe nke America (1776) na Mgbanwe nke French (1789): mmụọ nsọ sitere na echiche Enlightenment, okpuru ọchịchị na ụmụ amaala kwaturu ọchịchị eze iji guzobe ikike, iwu iwu, na ọbụbụeze ama ama.
learnSch_history_f2_kp3: Mgbanwe ụlọ ọrụ (1760s–1850s): malitere na Britain - coal, injin uzuoku, ụlọ ọrụ mmepụta ihe, na ụzọ ụgbọ oloko gbanwere obodo ndị dabere na ọrụ ugbo ka ọ bụrụ akụ na ụba obodo mepere emepe.
learnSch_history_f2_kp4: Ọchịchị Colonialism: Mba Europe chịrị Africa, Eshia, na America - na-ewepụta ihe onwunwe, na-achụpụ ndị mmadụ, na-ahapụkwa ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị na omenala na-adịte aka.
learnSch_history_f2_task: Họrọ otu mmemme site na 1500–1900 (dịka Mgbanwe mgbanwe French). Kọwaa: (a) ihe atọ kpatara ya, (b) ihe omume abụọ bụ́ isi, (c) ihe abụọ ga-esi na ya pụta ogologo oge. Jiri ụbọchị na ndị mmadụ kpọmkwem.
learnSch_history_f3_name: Akụkọ ụwa nke narị afọ nke 20
learnSch_history_f3_desc: Narị afọ nke 20 wetara agha ụwa, ọchịchị aka ike, ịchịisi ọchịchị, na Agha Nzuzo - na-emegharị mba ọ bụla n'ụwa. Ọ bụkwa narị afọ nke ọganihu dị ịtụnanya: mmeri nke fasizim, ịrị elu nke ikike mmadụ, ọdịda ọnwa, na mgbanwe dijitalụ. Ịghọta ya dị mkpa ịghọta ụwa nke taa.
learnSch_history_f3_kp0: Agha Ụwa Mbụ (1914–1918): kpatara ogbugbu nke Archduke Franz Ferdinand; kpatara ịhụ mba n'anya, imperialism, militarism, na usoro njikọ aka. ~17 nde nwụrụ.
learnSch_history_f3_kp1: Agha Ụwa nke Abụọ (1939–1945): Nazi Germany, Fascist Italy, na Imperial Japan megide ndị Allies. Mgbukpọ ahụ gburu ~ 6 nde ndị Juu. Emechara na bọmbụ atọm na Hiroshima na Nagasaki.
learnSch_history_f3_kp2: Agha Nzuzo (1947-1991): esemokwu echiche na geopolitical n'etiti USA (isi obodo, ochichi onye kwuo uche) na USSR (Communism). Agha proxy, Ọsọ Space, agbụrụ ngwá agha nuklia, na mgbidi Berlin kewara ụwa.
learnSch_history_f3_kp3: Decolonization (1945–1975): mmegharị nnwere onwe na Africa, Asia, na Middle East kwụsịrị alaeze ukwu ndị Europe na-achị. Ọtụtụ mgbe, esemokwu na enweghị ntụkwasị obi na-esonyere ya.
learnSch_history_f3_kp4: United Nations tọrọ ntọala 1945 iji nọgide na-enwe udo; Nkwuwapụta zuru ụwa ọnụ nke ikike mmadụ nakweere 1948 - ma nzaghachi ozugbo maka arụrụala WWII.
learnSch_history_f3_task: Tulee ihe kpatara na nsonazụ nke WWI na WWII. Mepụta tebụl nwere: Isi ihe kpatara, isi ntụgharị isi, ọnụọgụ ọnwụ, nnukwu nsonaazụ. Mgbe ahụ kọwaa otú WWII si dugara ozugbo na Agha Nzuzo.
learnSch_history_f4_name: Ụzọ akụkọ ihe mere eme & nyocha isi mmalite
learnSch_history_f4_desc: Akụkọ ihe mere eme abụghị naanị ụbọchị na ihe omume - ọ bụ nkọwa nke ihe akaebe. Ndị ọkọ akụkọ ihe mere eme na-enyocha isi mmalite (akwụkwọ mbụ, artefacts) na isi mmalite abụọ (akwụkwọ ọgụgụ, akụkọ ndụ) iji wughachi ihe gara aga. Ịmụ ka esi enyocha isi mmalite nke ọma na-eme ka ị bụrụ onye nyocha, onye na-eche echiche na nwa amaala ka mma.
learnSch_history_f4_kp0: Isi mmalite: emepụtara n'oge ihe omume (akwụkwọ akụkọ, foto, nkwekọrịta, akwụkwọ akụkọ). Isi mmalite nke abụọ: emechara emechaa, na-akọwa isi mmalite (biography, akwụkwọ akụkọ, akwụkwọ ọgụgụ).
learnSch_history_f4_kp1: Nyocha SOAPS: Isi mmalite, oge, ndị na-ege ntị, ebumnuche, isiokwu - usoro maka ịghọta akwụkwọ akụkọ ọ bụla.
learnSch_history_f4_kp2: Ntụkwasị obi vs. bara uru: isi iyi na-adịghị mma ka nwere ike ịba uru dị ka ihe akaebe nke ihe onye edemede ahụ kwenyere ma ọ bụ ihe mgbasa ozi dị n'oge ahụ.
learnSch_history_f4_kp3: Ihe kpatara vs. mmekọrịta: naanị n'ihi na ihe abụọ na-emekọ ọnụ apụtaghị na otu kpatara nke ọzọ. Ndị ọkọ akụkọ ihe mere eme na-achọ ihe akaebe nke njikọ kpọmkwem.
learnSch_history_f4_kp4: Akụkọ ihe mere eme bụ ọmụmụ ka esi dee na ịkọwa akụkọ ihe mere eme. Otu ihe omume ahụ (dịka Mgbanwe mgbanwe French) nwere ike ịhụ ya n'ụzọ dị iche site na ndị ọkọ akụkọ ihe mere eme dị iche iche.
learnSch_history_f4_task: Chọta okwu ma ọ bụ leta akụkọ ihe mere eme site na oge ọ bụla. Tinye nyocha SOAPS. Nyochaa ihe a pụrụ ịdabere na ya (tụlee ọnọdụ na nzube nke onye edemede) na uru ya (ajụjụ ndị akụkọ ihe mere eme ọ na-enyere aka zaa?).
learnSch_geography_f2_name: Maapụ & Ihe osise || Maapụ bụ ngwa ọrụ siri ike maka ịnọchite anya ozi gbasara ohere. Cartography bụ sayensị na nka nke ime maapụ. Site na mbadamba ụrọ oge ochie ruo na ihe oyiyi satịlaịtị GPS, maapụ eduzi nyocha, na-akpụzi ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị, ma nwee nghọta nke ụwa anyị. Ịgụ na ịmepụta mapụ bụ nkà dị mkpa mpaghara.
learnSch_geography_f2_desc: Ọkwa: oke dị n'etiti anya na maapụ na ebe dị anya n'ụwa. Maapụ ọnụ ọgụgụ 1:50,000 pụtara 1 cm = 500 m.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp0: Ntụaka grid: ahịrị latitude (n'ahịrị, tụọ ugwu/ndịda) na longitude ( vetikal, nha ọwụwa anyanwụ/ọdịda anyanwụ) chọta ebe ọ bụla n'ụwa.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp1: Ahịrị nhịahụ jikọtara isi ihe nha nha nha elu; contours nwere oghere chiri anya = mkpọda ugwu; ọtụtụ oghere = mkpọda dị nro.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp2: Atụmatụ map na-agbagọ elu ụwa gbagọrọ agbagọ na maapụ dị larịị. Ntụle Mercator na-echekwa udi mana ọ na-agbagọ nha; Ntụle Peters na-echekwa mpaghara mana ọ na-agbagọ udi.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp3: GIS (Sistemụ Ozi Geographic) na-edobe ọtụtụ usoro data (ọnụ ọgụgụ mmadụ, ojiji ala, ihu igwe) na maapụ dijitalụ maka nyocha na ime mkpebi.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp4: Iji map topographic (ma ọ bụ see nke gị), chọpụta: (a) mkpọda mkpọda, (b) ndagwurugwu, (c) elu ugwu. Dee ntụaka grid 6 maka nzuko. Gbakọọ ezigbo anya nke ụzọ 4 cm na maapụ 1:50,000.
learnSch_geography_f3_desc: Ihu igwe bụ ọnọdụ dị mkpụmkpụ nke ikuku; ihu igwe bụ nkezi ogologo oge. Mpaghara ihu igwe nke ụwa - site na okpomọkụ ruo na polar - na-eji latitude, ebili mmiri nke oke osimiri, elu, na ifufe na-efe efe na-akpụzi ya. Ịghọta usoro ihu igwe dị oke mkpa maka ọrụ ugbo, nkwadebe ọdachi, na ikwado mgbanwe ihu igwe.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp0: Ihe na-emetụta ihu igwe: latitude (akuku anyanwụ), elu (okpomọkụ dara ~ 6.5 Celsius C kwa 1000 m), anya site n'oké osimiri, oke osimiri, ifufe na-emeri.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp1: Ihu igwe okpomọkụ: na-ekpo ọkụ na mmiri mmiri kwa afọ, n'akụkụ equator. Mediterenian: oge ​​ọkọchị na-ekpo ọkụ, oyi mmiri dị nro. Polar: oyi na-adịgide adịgide, ntakịrị mmiri ozuzo.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp2: Mmiri mmiri ozuzo n'ihu: ikuku na-ekpo ọkụ na oyi na-ezukọ; ikuku na-ekpo ọkụ na-ebili n'oyi, na-ajụ oyi, na condens. A na-ahụkarị na etiti latitudes (UK, Germany).
learnSch_geography_f3_kp3: Usoro mmiri: evaporation → condensation (igwe ojii kpụrụ) → ọdịda → elu-agba ọsọ / infiltration → azụ na evaporation.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp4: Mgbanwe ihu igwe: ịrị elu CO₂ na-abawanye mmetụta griin haus, na-ebute okpomoku zuru ụwa ọnụ, ihe omume ihu igwe ka njọ, oke oke osimiri, na mgbanwe mpaghara ihu igwe.
learnSch_geography_f3_task: Tụlee ọnọdụ ihu igwe nke ebe oke ọhịa na-ekpo ọkụ na ọnọdụ ọzara. Maka nke ọ bụla: steeti pụtara okpomọkụ kwa afọ, mmiri ozuzo kwa afọ, ihe na-akpata, na mgbanwe abụọ nke ihe ndị dị ndụ bi n'ebe ahụ.
learnSch_geography_f3_tp2: Ihu ihu igwe na okirikiri mmiri
learnSch_economics_f2_name: Azụmahịa mba ụwa & ijikọ ụwa ọnụ
learnSch_economics_f2_desc: Azụmahịa mba ụwa na-eme ka mba dị iche iche mara ihe ha na-emepụta nke ọma na ịzụ ahịa maka ihe ọ bụla ọzọ. Ijikọ ụwa ọnụ - njikọ na-abawanye ụba nke akụ na ụba, ọdịbendị, na ndị mmadụ - ebula ọtụtụ narị nde mmadụ pụọ na ịda ogbenye mana ewepụtala ahaghị nhata na ihe ịma aka gburugburu ebe obibi.
learnSch_economics_f2_kp0: Uru atụnyere: obodo kwesịrị ọkachamara n'ịmepụta ngwaahịa ebe ohere ohere ya dị ntakịrị, wee ahia - ọbụlagodi na ọ ka mma na ihe niile.
learnSch_economics_f2_kp1: Mbupu: ngwaahịa na ọrụ a na-ere na mba ofesi (ego maka mba). Mbubata: ngwongwo na ọrụ ndị a zụtara na mba ọzọ (emefu).
learnSch_economics_f2_kp2: Ihe mgbochi ahia: tarifu (ụtụ isi na mbubata), quotas (oke mbubata), embargoes (mkpokọta mmachibido iwu) - chebe ụlọ ọrụ ụlọ mana bulie ọnụ ahịa maka ndị na-azụ ahịa.
learnSch_economics_f2_kp3: Nkwekọrịta azụmaahịa efu (dịka EU Single Market, NAFTA) na-ebelata ihe mgbochi n'etiti mba ndị otu, na-ebuli azụmahịa na uto akụ na ụba.
learnSch_economics_f2_kp4: Nhazi nke ahia: mbupu - mbubata. Mgbakwunye ahia pụtara na a na-ebupụ karịa; mwepu ahia pụtara na a na-ebubata karịa.
learnSch_economics_f2_task: Mba A nwere ike imepụta kọmpụta 100 MA ọ bụ tọn ọka 200 kwa afọ. Mba B nwere ike imepụta kọmputa 60 MA ọ bụ tọn 180 nke ọka wit. Gosi obodo nke nwere uru atụnyere na ngwaahịa ọ bụla wee kọwaa ihe kpatara ha abụọ ji rite uru na ọpụrụiche na azụmaahịa.
learnSch_economics_f2_tp1: Ihe mgbochi ahia na ahia efu
learnSch_economics_f3_desc: Ego nkeonwe na-ekpuchi njikwa ego bara uru: ịkpata ego, ịchekwa ego, itinye ego, ịgbazinye ego na itinye ego. Ịmụ akwụkwọ gbasara ego na-enyere gị aka izere ọnyà ụgwọ, wuo akụ na ụba, na ime mkpebi ndị ziri ezi n'oge ndụ gị nile - site na ọrụ mbụ gị ruo ezumike nká. A naghị akụzi nkà ndị a mana ọ dị mkpa n'ụwa niile.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp0: Atụmatụ mmefu ego na-ekenye ego gị n'ofe mkpa (ụlọ, nri), ihe (ihe ntụrụndụ), na ego. Iwu 50/30/20: 50% mkpa, 30% chọrọ, 20% ego.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp1: Ọmụrụ nwa jikọtara ọnụ: ọmụrụ nwa na-enweta ma ọmụrụ nwa isi yana ọmụrụ nwa. €1,000 na 5% ọmụrụ nwa afọ na-aghọ €1,629 mgbe afọ 10 gachara.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp2: Ezigbo ụgwọ (mbinye ego, mbinye ego ụmụ akwụkwọ) nwere ike wulite akụ na ụba ma ọ bụ nkà. Ụgwọ ọjọọ (kaadị kredit nke ọmụrụ nwa dị elu, nbinye ụbọchị ịkwụ ụgwọ) na-amanye gị ọnyà n'usoro ịkwụ ụgwọ.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp3: Ọnụ ego efu na-emebi ikike ịzụrụ ihe: ọ bụrụ na onu oriri bụ 3% na ego gị na-enweta 1%, ego gị na-efunahụ ezigbo uru kwa afọ.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp4: Diversification: ịgbasa ntinye ego n'ofe akụ dị iche iche (ebuka, agbụ, ihe onwunwe) na-ebelata ihe ize ndụ - 'etinyela akwa gị niile n'otu nkata'.
learnSch_economics_f3_task: Mepụta mmefu ego kwa ọnwa maka nwa akwụkwọ na-enweta € 800 / ọnwa. Wepụta ego site na iji iwu 50/30/20. Wee gbakọọ ego ole €500 na-eto n'ime afọ 5 na mmasị 4% kwa afọ: A = P(1 + r) ^ n.
learnSch_economics_f3_tp2: Ụgwọ, ntinye ego, na onu oriri
learnSch_earth_science_f2_desc: Oke osimiri na-ekpuchi 71% nke elu ụwa ma na-achịkwa ihu igwe, na-emepụta ikuku oxygen, ma na-akwado ụdị ndụ dị iche iche pụrụ iche. Usoro mmiri na-aga n'ihu na-akpali mmiri n'etiti oke osimiri, ikuku, na ala, na-eme ka Ụwa bụrụ naanị mbara ala nwere mmiri mmiri n'elu ya - ọnọdụ bụ isi maka ndụ.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp0: Usoro mmiri: evaporation (mmiri mmiri na gas, nke ike anyanwụ na-ebugharị) → condensation (gas na ụmụ irighiri mmiri, na-akpụ ígwé ojii) → mmiri ozuzo (mmiri, snow) → ịgbapụ na ntinye → laghachi na evaporation.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp1: Oké osimiri na-echekwa okpomọkụ na ihu igwe na-adịghị mma: ha na-amịkọrọ CO₂ na okpomọkụ site na anyanwụ, na-ahapụ ya nwayọọ nwayọọ ma na-eme ka okpomọkụ dị elu.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp2: Oke osimiri (dịka Gulf Stream) na-ebufe okpomọkụ gburugburu ụwa, na-ekpo ọkụ ma ọ bụ na-ajụ oyi n'akụkụ osimiri dị anya site na equator.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp3: Acid acidification nke oke osimiri: ka CO₂ na-agbaze n'ime mmiri oké osimiri, ọ na-etolite carbonic acid (H₂CO₃), na-eweda pH na egwu coral reefs na shellfish.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp4: Mmiri dị n'ime ala: mmiri na-echekwa n'ime ala aquifers. Mwepụta n'elu na-ebelata aquifers ngwa ngwa karịa ka ha na-ebufe - okwu nchekwa mmiri zuru ụwa ọnụ na-eto eto.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_task: See ma denye aha okirikiri mmiri nke ọma. Maka ọkwa nke ọ bụla, kwupụta usoro anụ ahụ dị na ya (ekuku, condensation, wdg) na isi iyi ike na-anya ya. Mgbe ahụ kọwaa ihe abụọ mmadụ na-eme na-akpaghasị okirikiri mmiri.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_desc: Ihe ize ndụ eke - ala ọma jijiji, ugwu mgbawa, mbufịt mbufịt, ajọ ifufe - na-esite n'ime ụwa na ike ikuku. Ịghọta ihe kpatara ya, nkesa, na mmetụta ha na-enye ọha mmadụ aka ịkwado, belata mmebi ma chekwaa ndụ. Ihe ize ndụ dị n'ahụ mmadụ na-adabere n'ihe gbasara mmekọrịta ọha na eze na nke akụ na ụba dị ka ihe ize ndụ anụ ahụ n'onwe ya.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp0: Ala ọma jijiji na-eme na ókèala plate tectonic (mgbanwe, mbibi, na-ewuli elu). Ọnụ ọgụgụ dị ukwuu nke Richter / oge na-atụ ntọhapụ ike; Nkeji ọ bụla = × 32 ugboro ike karịa.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp1: Volcanoes na-etolite na mpaghara subduction (mgbawa, viscous lava) na n'ebe ndị na-ekpo ọkụ/oke ala (effusive, runny lava, eg Iceland, Hawaii).
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp2: Tsunami bụ nnukwu ebili mmiri nke oke osimiri na-ebute site na ala ọmajiji dị n'okpuru osimiri ma ọ bụ mgbawa ugwu mgbawa. Oké mbufịt mbufịt 2004 India gburu ~ 230,000 mmadụ.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp3: Cyclone okpomọkụ (oké ifufe/typhoons) na-etolite n'elu mmiri na-ekpo ọkụ (≥26°C). Ha na-ebute oke ifufe, oke mmiri ozuzo, na idei mmiri.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp4: Ihe ize ndụ sitere n'okike na-adabere na ịda ogbenye, ịdị mma ụlọ, usoro ịdọ aka ná ntị, na ọchịchị - mba ndị ka daa ogbenye na-ata ahụhụ na-enweghị oke.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_task: Tụlee ihe kpatara na mmetụta nke nnukwu ala ọma jijiji (dịka Haiti 2010) na nnukwu mgbawa mgbawa (dịka ugwu Pinatubo 1991). Jiri tebụl: Ihe kpatara, ịdị ukwuu, Mmetụta mbụ, mmetụta nke abụọ, nzaghachi mmadụ.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_tp2: Ihe ize ndụ, adịghị ike, na njikwa
learnSch_health_f2_desc: Enyemaka mbụ bụ enyemaka ozugbo enyere onye merụrụ ahụ ma ọ bụ ọrịa tupu enyemaka ahụike ọkachamara abịarute. Ịmara enyemaka mbụ na-azọpụta ndụ - gụnyere 'agbụ nke nlanarị' na njide obi. Ọmụma nchekwa onwe onye na-enyere aka igbochi ihe mberede, mata ihe egwu, ma mee mkpebi dị mma na mberede.
learnSch_health_f2_kp0: Nnyocha mbụ (ABCDE): Ụgbọ elu, iku ume, okirikiri, nkwarụ (ọkwa nke nsụhọ), ngosi (mmerụ ahụ a na-ahụ anya).
learnSch_health_f2_kp1: CPR (Resuscitation Cardiopulmonary): 30 mkpakọ obi na 5-6 cm omimi na ~ 100-120 kwa nkeji, mgbe ahụ 2 na-eku ume. Tinyegharịa ruo mgbe enyemaka rutere.
learnSch_health_f2_kp2: Ọkwa mgbake: maka onye amaghị ihe ma ọ na-eku ume - na-egbochi ịta ahụhụ ma na-eme ka ụzọ ikuku mepere emepe.
learnSch_health_f2_kp3: Maka ọkụ: dị jụụ n'okpuru mmiri mmiri dị jụụ maka nkeji iri. Ejila ice, bọta, ma ọ bụ ntacha eze. Na-ekpuchi uwe dị ọcha na-adịghị mma.
learnSch_health_f2_kp4: Ịkpọ ọrụ mberede: kwupụta ọnọdụ gị, ụdị ihe mberede ahụ na ọnụọgụ ndị ọ metụtara. Nọrọ n'ahịrị wee soro ntuziaka.
learnSch_health_f2_task: Dee ntuziaka nzọụkwụ maka ịzaghachi onye dara ada na-anabataghị ya. Gụnye: ịlele maka nchekwa, nyochaa nsụhọ, ịkpọ maka enyemaka, nzọụkwụ CPR, na mgbe ịkwụsị. Tinye ọnụ ọgụgụ dị nso (ọnụego mkpakọ, omimi).
learnSch_health_f2_tp2: Ọkụ, ọbara ọgbụgba, na ịma jijiji
learnSch_arts_f1_desc: Ndị na-ese ihe na-ahọrọ site na usoro na ihe dị iche iche - ịse, eserese, mbipụta akwụkwọ, ihe ọkpụkpụ, nka dijitalụ - nke ọ bụla nwere àgwà na ojiji dị iche iche. Ịghọta usoro mgbasa ozi nka dị iche iche na-enyere gị aka ịhọrọ ngwá ọrụ ziri ezi maka ebumnuche nka gị, wee wulite okwu iji kparịta ma nyochaa ọrụ nka nke ọma.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp0: Mgbasa ozi ịse: pensụl (graphite), unyi, ink - nke ọ bụla na-arụpụta ahịrị dị iche iche, ụda na udidi. Usoro ndo: ịkụnye, cross-hatching, stippling, mixing.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp1: Mgbasa ozi eserese: agba mmiri (transparent, ebe ọkụ na-enweghị ihe osise), acrylics (mmiri dabeere na mmiri, ihicha ngwa ngwa, ngwa ngwa), mmanụ (ịkpọcha ngwa ngwa, agba ọgaranya, usoro glazing omenala).
learnSch_arts_f1_kp2: Mbipụta: mbipụta enyemaka (linocut - ịpụpụ ịhapụ imewe), mbipụta ihuenyo, etching - ọtụtụ mbipụta yiri ya site na otu matriks.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp3: Ihe akpụrụ akpụ: mgbakwunye (ụdị ụrọ, mgbakọ), mwepu (nkume a tụrụ atụ ma ọ bụ osisi), nkedo (ọla kọpa, resin). Nrụnye nwụnye na-eji ohere n'onwe ya dị ka onye na-ajụ ase.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp4: Ngwá ọrụ nka dijitalụ (Procreate, Photoshop, Blender) na-emegharị ma gbatịa usoro ọdịnala - akwa, brushes, na ihe ngosi 3D - mana chọrọ ịma otu ụkpụrụ dị n'okpuru.
learnSch_arts_f1_task: Họrọ otu ihe osise na otu usoro nka ị na-ejibeghị mbụ. Nyochaa akụrụngwa ya, wee mepụta ọmụmụ ihe site na iji usoro ahụ. Dee okwu 150 iji nyochaa ihe na-arụ ọrụ, ihe siri ike, na otú usoro mgbasa ozi si metụta nsonaazụ.
learnSch_arts_f2_desc: Agba bụ ihe a na-ahụ anya kachasị ike - ọ na-akpali mmetụta, na-emepụta omimi ma na-eduzi anya onye na-ekiri ya. Ozizi agba na-akọwa mmekọrịta dị n'etiti agba na otu esi eji ha kpachapụ anya. Site na agba agba gaa na ngwakọta anya, njikwa agba na-agbanwe mmetụta nke ihe osise ọ bụla.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp0: Agba nke mbụ (RYB maka agba: uhie, odo, acha anụnụ anụnụ) enweghị ike ịme site na ịgwakọta. A na-eme agba nke abụọ (oroma, akwụkwọ ndụ akwụkwọ ndụ, odo odo) site na primaries abụọ.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp1: Agba agbakwunyere na-anọdụ ala n'ihu ibe ha na wiil agba (dịka uhie-acha ndụ ndụ, acha anụnụ anụnụ-oroma). Edobere n'akụkụ ha na-ewusi ibe ha ike; agwakọta ha neutralize ka isi awọ / aja aja.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp2: Okpomọkụ agba: agba na-ekpo ọkụ (acha ọbara ọbara, oroma, odo) na-enwe ume ma na-aga n'ihu n'anya. Ụcha dị mma (blues, greens, purples) na-adị jụụ ma laghachi azụ.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp3: Tint = agba + ọcha (ọcha). Ndo = agba + oji (ọchịchịrị). Ụda = agba + isi awọ. Ndị a na-emepụta oke uru na ihe osise.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp4: Atụmatụ agba nke ihe atụ (agba dị n'akụkụ) na-emepụta nkwekọ. Atụmatụ triadic (agba atọ nwere nha nhata) na-emepụta ọdịiche dị egwu. Monochromatic na-eji otu hue na ụkpụrụ dị iche iche.
learnSch_arts_f2_task: Mepụta wiil agba na-egosi hues 12 niile (3 primary, 3 secondary, 6 tertiary). Mgbe ahụ, tee ma ọ bụ see obere oghere abụọ n'akụkụ site na iji ụzọ nkwado ma kọwaa mmetụta a na-ahụ anya. Jiri nkọwa kọwaa: tint, ndò, na ụda nke otu agba.
learnSch_music_f1_desc: A na-ejikọta ngwá egwú ụwa n'ime ezinụlọ site n'otú ha si emepụta ụda. Ụdị egwu - site na oge gboo ruo jazz ruo hip-hop - na-egosipụta omenala, akụkọ ihe mere eme, na ọnọdụ ọha. Ịmara ngwa na ụdị dị iche iche na-enye gị ma okwu bara uru yana ekele dị ukwuu maka egwu dị ka ụdị nka dị ndụ, na-agbanwe agbanwe.
learnSch_music_f1_kp0: Ezinụlọ ndị eji eme ihe: eriri (violin, guitar - eriri na-ama jijiji), ikuku nkụ (ọjà, clarinet - kọlụm ikuku na-ama jijiji), ọla (opi, trombone - egbugbere ọnụ na-egbu egbu), ụda (ụgba, xylophone - kụrụ), keyboard (piano, akụkụ - ọtụtụ usoro).
learnSch_music_f1_kp1: Akụkụ ndị egwu egwu: eriri, ikuku nkụ, brass, percussion. Onye nduzi na-ahazi ngalaba niile na-eji mmegharị ahụ na baton.
learnSch_music_f1_kp2: Egwu oge gboo (1750–1820): Ụdị ahaziri (sonata, symphony, concerto), ndị na-agụ egwú dị ka Mozart, Haydn, Beethoven. Egwu ihunanya (1820–1900): ngosipụta mmetụta uche karịa, nnukwu egwu egwu, Brahms, Tchaikovsky, Wagner.
learnSch_music_f1_kp3: Jazz (1900s, African-American si malite): nkwalite, syncopation, swing rhythm. Ụdị-ụdị: bebop, jazz dị jụụ, ngwakọta. Blues: oku na-aza, ụdị mmanya iri na abụọ.
learnSch_music_f1_kp4: Pop na nkume (1950s–): gita eletriki, bass, drum, olu. Hip-hop (1970s, Bronx NY): DJing, sampling, rapping, breakdancing — mmegharị omenala zuru oke.
learnSch_music_f1_task: Gee ntị n'otu akụkụ sitere na ụdị abụọ dị iche iche nke ọ bụla (dịka egwu egwu Beethoven na egwu blues). Maka nke ọ bụla: chọpụta ngwa eji eme ihe, tempo, ike, ọnọdụ, na otu ihe egwu akọwapụtara maka ụdị ahụ. Tụlee ha na tebụl.
learnSch_music_f1_tp1: Egwu oge gboo na nke ihunanya
learnSch_music_f1_tp2: Jazz, blues, na ụdị nke oge a
learnSch_music_f2_desc: Akụkọ egwu egwu na-achọpụta etu ụdị egwu, ngwa na echiche siri pụta gafee ọtụtụ narị afọ na omenala. Site na abụ Gregorian ruo egwu egwu Beethoven ruo egwu ịgba egwu eletrọnịkị, oge ọ bụla na-egosipụta ụkpụrụ ọha, teknụzụ na echiche ụwa. Ịghọta akụkọ ihe mere eme egwu na-eme ka ekele dịkwuo elu ma tinye egwu dị ugbu a na ọnọdụ.
learnSch_music_f2_kp0: Oge ochie (500–1400): Gregorian abụ (monophonic, egwu olu na-esoghị maka ụka). Renaissance (1400-1600): polyphony (ọtụtụ akụkụ ụda nke onwe ha); egwu ụwa na-apụta.
learnSch_music_f2_kp1: Baroque (1600–1750): J.S. Bach, Handel, Vivaldi. Ntụgharị ihe ịchọ mma, basso continuo, ụdị: fugue, suite, oratori. Opera chepụtara na Florence (~ 1600).
learnSch_music_f2_kp2: Oge gboo (1750-1820): itule, doo anya, mmepe nke symphony, sonata ụdị, eriri quartet. Mozart, Haydn, mbụ Beethoven.
learnSch_music_f2_kp3: Oge ihunanya (1820-1900): ike mmetụta uche, egwu mmemme (na-akọ akụkọ), ịhụ mba n'anya (Grieg, Sibelius, Dvořák), ndị egwu egwu gbasaara nke ukwuu.
learnSch_music_f2_kp4: Narị afọ 20: Modernism (Stravinsky, Schoenberg's 12-tone system), Jazz Age, Rock & Roll revolution (1950s), minimalism (Philip Glass), na mgbanwe dijitalụ na-emepụta egwu kọmputa na kọmputa.
learnSch_music_f2_task: Mepụta usoro iheomume nke egwu Western site na 500 OA ruo ugbu a. Maka oge ọ bụla: dee aha, ụbọchị, ndị na-ede ihe / ndị na-ese ihe, otu ihe egwu egwu, na otu ngwa ma ọ bụ ụdị njirimara. Kọwaa ma ọ bụ kọwapụta otu akụkụ egwu sitere na oge ọ bụla.
learnSch_music_f2_tp0: Oge ochie, Renaissance, Baroque || Oge gboo na nke ihunanya
learnSch_physical_education_f1_name: Egwuregwu otu egwuregwu na-azụlite nkà anụ ahụ, echiche akọ, nkwurịta okwu, na idu ndú. Ma bọọlụ, basketball, volleyball, ma ọ bụ bọọlụ aka - nke ọ bụla na-achọ nghọta nke iwu, ọnọdụ, na atụmatụ otu. Ịmụta ịgụ egwuregwu na ime mkpebi ngwa ngwa dị mkpa dị ka ike anụ ahụ.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_desc: Nkwukọrịta: ịkpọ maka bọọlụ, ịhazi nchekwa, na ịgba ndị otu egwuregwu ume dị mkpa dị ka nka nka na egwuregwu otu egwuregwu.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp0: Usoro na football: nhazi (4-4-2, 4-3-3) na-ekpebi ka esi edobe ndị egwuregwu. Ịpị elu ọkwa dị elu vs. nchebe miri emi bụ ụzọ dị iche iche dị iche iche.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp1: Ime mkpebi: ndị egwuregwu kachasị mma na-enyocha gburugburu ebe obibi ha mgbe niile, na-atụ anya mmegharị ọzọ, wee họrọ nhọrọ nke ga-abara ndị otu ahụ uru karịa igosi nka onye ọ bụla.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp2: Iwu dị maka izi ezi na nchekwa. Ịghọta iwu offside (bọọlụ bọọlụ), ihuenyo iwu na-akwadoghị (bọọlụ basketball), ma ọ bụ mmejọ ntụgharị (volleyball) na-egbochi mmejọ na ntaramahụhụ.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp3: Ọchịchị na egwuregwu: ndị isi na-akpali ma na-ekwurịta okwu; ndị egwuregwu niile na-asọpụrụ ndị mmegide, ndị ọka ikpe, na nsonaazụ - ụkpụrụ bụ isi nke egwuregwu.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp4: Họrọ otu egwuregwu ị na-egwu ma ọ bụ na-ekiri. Chepụta usoro mmemme iji kwalite otu nka akọwapụtara (dịka ịgafe nke ọma na bọọlụ). Steeti: nka ezubere iche, akụrụngwa achọrọ, ntuziaka maka olulu ahụ, otu esi eme ka ọ sie ike, yana otu esi amata nkwalite.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_desc: Ịdị mma karịa ahụ ike - ọ na-agụnye ahụike uche, ụra, nri na-edozi ahụ, mmekọrịta mmadụ na ibe ya, na nlekọta nchekasị. Ụzọ ndụ dị mma nke e wuru na-arụ ọrụ mgbe nile, iri nri kwesịrị ekwesị, ụra zuru oke, na mmekọrịta dị mma na-echebe megide ọrịa na-adịghị ala ala ma na-akwado ọdịmma n'oge ndụ.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp0: Ndị WHO na-atụ aro nkeji 150-300 nke mmega ahụ ikuku na-agafeghị oke kwa izu maka ndị okenye (dịka ịga ije ngwa ngwa, ịgba ígwè) ma ọ bụ nkeji 75 nke ọrụ siri ike.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp1: Ụra: ndị nọ n'afọ iri na ụma chọrọ awa 8-10 kwa abalị. Ụra ezughị oke na-emebi nchikota ebe nchekwa, ọnọdụ, ọrụ mgbochi, na oge mmeghachi omume.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp2: Usoro nlekọta nchekasị: mmega ahụ nke anụ ahụ, iche echiche, iku ume miri emi, njikwa oge, na ịgwa onye tụkwasịrị obi okwu bụ ụzọ niile dabere na ihe akaebe.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp3: Oge ihuenyo: iji oke eme ihe (karịsịa mgbasa ozi ọha na eze n'abalị) na-akpaghasị ụra ma jikọta ya na nchekasị na enweghị ùgwù onwe onye na ndị ntorobịa. Nkwụsị dijitalụ na oke na-enyere aka.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp4: Mmata ihe: mmanya na ụtaba bụ ihe iwu kwadoro ma na-emerụ ahụ - mmanya na-emebi imeju na ụbụrụ; ise siga na-ebute ọrịa cancer akpa ume na ọrịa obi. Ha abụọ na-emerụ ahụ maka ahụ ndị na-eto eto.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_task: Mepụta atụmatụ ịdị mma nke onwe kwa izu. Gụnye: Oge mmega ahụ 5 (ụdị, ogologo oge, ike), usoro ihi ụra, usoro nlekọta nchekasị 3, na ebumnuche nri 2. Tụgharịa uche na mpaghara nke kacha mkpa imeziwanye yana ihe kpatara ya.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_tp2: Ahụ ike dijitalụ na mmata ihe
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_desc: Ụkpụrụ nkà ihe ọmụma na-ajụ: kedu ka anyị kwesịrị isi mee ihe? Kedu ihe na-eme ihe ziri ezi ma ọ bụ na-ezighị ezi? Usoro ụkpụrụ omume atọ bụ isi - consequentialism, deontology, na ụkpụrụ omume ọma - na-enye azịza dị iche iche. Itinye usoro ndị a n'ọrụ na nsogbu ndị dị n'ụwa n'ezie (euthanasia, ikpe ziri ezi ihu igwe, AI) na-etolite echiche ziri ezi, ahaziri nke ọma.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp0: Consequentialism (Utilitarianism - Mill, Bentham): ihe omume ziri ezi ma ọ bụrụ na ọ na-emepụta obi ụtọ kasị ukwuu maka ọnụ ọgụgụ kasị ukwuu. Nsonaazụ na-ekpebi omume.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp1: Deontology (Kant): omume ụfọdụ ziri ezi ma ọ bụ na-ezighi ezi, n'agbanyeghị nsonaazụ ya. Ụdị dị mkpa: mee naanị site na iwu ị ga-abụ iwu zuru ụwa ọnụ.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp2: Ụkpụrụ omume ọma (Aristotle): lekwasị anya na agwa karịa iwu ma ọ bụ nsonaazụ. Onye na-eme omume ọma azụlitela àgwà obi ike, ịkwụwa aka ọtọ, ikpe ziri ezi, na obi umeala.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp3: Omume relativism: ụkpụrụ omume dịgasị iche n'etiti omenala na ndị mmadụ n'otu n'otu - enweghị ọkọlọtọ zuru ụwa ọnụ. Omume absolutism: ụfọdụ omume na-adị mma mgbe niile ma ọ bụ na-ezighị ezi n'agbanyeghị omenala.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp4: Usoro omume etinyere na-enyocha esemokwu ndị akọwapụtara: ụkpụrụ ahụike (euthanasia, ite ime), ụkpụrụ gburugburu ebe obibi (ọrụ na-abụghị nke mmadụ), na ụkpụrụ AI (ngwa agha onwe, nzuzo).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_task: Tinye nke ọ bụla n'ime usoro ụkpụrụ omume atọ dị mkpa (utilitarianism, deontology, virtue ethics) na nsogbu a: 'Ọ bụ ụkpụrụ omume ịgha ụgha iji chebe mmetụta mmadụ?' Maka nke ọ bụla, kwupụta isi ụkpụrụ nke usoro na azịza ya maka nsogbu ahụ.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_tp2: Ụkpụrụ omume ọma na ụkpụrụ omume etinyere
learnSch_social_studies_f2_name: Ikike mmadụ & Amaala zuru ụwa ọnụ
learnSch_social_studies_f2_desc: Ikike mmadụ bụ ikike zuru ụwa ọnụ nke onye ọ bụla nwere, n'agbanyeghị obodo, okike, agbụrụ, ma ọ bụ okpukperechi. Nkwupụta Ụwa Nile Maka Ihe Ndị Ruuru Mmadụ (1948) debere ha n'iwu mba ụwa. Ịbụ nwa amaala zuru ụwa ọnụ pụtara ịghọta ikike na ọrụ gị n'ime ụwa jikọrọ ọnụ yana ime ihe maka ọdịnihu ziri ezi na nke ga-adigide.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp0: Nkwupụta Ụwa Nile Maka Ihe Ndị Ruuru Mmadụ (UDHR, 1948) nwere akụkọ iri atọ na-ekpuchi ikike obodo, ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị, akụ na ụba, ọha na eze na omenala - ntọala nke iwu ikike mmadụ zuru ụwa ọnụ.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp1: Ikike nke ọgbọ mbụ: obodo na ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị (nnwere onwe ikwu okwu, ikike ikpe ikpe ziri ezi, ikike ịme ntuli aka). Ọgbọ nke abụọ: akụ na ụba na mmekọrịta mmadụ na ibe ya (ikike maka agụmakwụkwọ, ahụike, ọrụ).
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp2: Òtù ndị ruuru mmadụ: UN Human Rights Council, International Criminal Court (na-ekpe ikpe mpụ agha na mpụ megide ụmụ mmadụ), Ụlọikpe Europe nke Ihe Ndị Ruuru Mmadụ.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp3: Ikike ụmụaka: UN Convention on the Rights of Child (1989) na-ekwe nkwa ikike ụmụaka nwere agụmakwụkwọ, nchekwa, nlekọta ahụike na nsonye. Mba 196 kwadoro ya.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp4: Ụmụ amaala zuru ụwa ọnụ: iburu ibu ọrụ maka nsogbu ụwa (mgbanwe ihu igwe, ahaghị nhata, esemokwu) na ime obodo na ụwa. NGO (Amnesty International, Médecins Sans Frontières) kwadoro ụkpụrụ a.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_task: Họrọ isiokwu atọ sitere na Nkwupụta Ụwa Nile Maka Ihe Ndị Ruuru Mmadụ. Maka nke ọ bụla: kwupụta ikike, nye ihe atụ n'ezie ebe a na-emebi ikike a taa, ma kwuo otu ihe mmadụ ma ọ bụ gọọmentị nwere ike ime.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_tp2: Ụmụ amaala zuru ụwa ọnụ na omume
learnSch_philosophy_f2_name: Ụkpụrụ omume na nkà ihe ọmụma omume
learnSch_philosophy_f2_desc: Ụkpụrụ omume bụ ngalaba nke nkà ihe ọmụma nke na-ajụ ka anyị kwesịrị ibi ndụ na omume. Nkà ihe ọmụma omume na-enyocha ntọala nke ụkpụrụ anyị: ihe dị mma, ihe ziri ezi, oleekwa otú anyị kwesịrị isi na-emeso ndị ọzọ? Ajụjụ ndị a abụghị ihe nkịtị - ha na-akwado iwu, mkpebi ahụike, mmepe AI, na nhọrọ kwa ụbọchị.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp0: Omume ezi uche: eziokwu ezi omume dị adị na-adabereghị n'ihe onye ọ bụla chere. Omume megidere eziokwu: ụkpụrụ omume bụ ndị mmadụ, ọha mmadụ na-ewulite, ma ọ bụ naanị ngosipụta nke mmetụta uche.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp1: Nsogbu trolley (Judith Jarvis Thomson / Philippa Foot): ị ga-atụgharị ụgbọ mmiri na-agba ọsọ ka gbuo otu onye wee chekwaa ise? Usoro dị iche iche na-enye azịza dị iche iche.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp2: Ikpe ziri ezi (Rawls): chepụta ọha mmadụ site n'azụ 'mkpuchi nke amaghị ihe' - na-amaghị ọnọdụ nke gị, ị na-ahọrọ iwu ziri ezi onye ọ bụla nwere ike ikweta.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp3: Ọganihu omume: ọha mmadụ na-agbanwe echiche ha ziri ezi ka oge na-aga - ịgba ohu bụ mgbe iwu kwadoro ma nabata; e jibu mmekpa ahụ́ n'ụlọ ikpe. Nke a na-ewelite: omume ọma ọ na oge?
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp4: Ụkpụrụ anụmanụ: Arụmụka bara uru nke Peter Singer na nhụjuanya ụmụ anụmanụ na-adabere n'omume na nhụjuanya ụmụ mmadụ. Ọ na-eme? Kedu ihe na-esote maka otu anyị si eri nri na nyocha?
learnSch_philosophy_f2_task: Nyochaa nsogbu trolley site na iji ụkpụrụ omume abụọ dị iche iche. Kedu nke usoro ọ bụla ga-enye ndụmọdụ? Mgbe ahụ chepụta nsogbu nke omume gị ma nyochaa ya. Kwurịta ma enwere azịza 'ziri ezi' ma ọ bụ naanị ndị nwere ezi uche.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_tp2: Ụkpụrụ ụmụ anụmanụ na ihe mgbagwoju anya etinyere
learnSch_technology_f2_desc: Robotics na-ejikọta injinia, eletrọnịkị, na mmemme iji mepụta igwe na-arụ ọrụ n'onwe ya ma ọ bụ nke nwere onwe ya. Akpaaka - iji igwe dochie ọrụ mmadụ - na-agbanwe ụlọ ọrụ, ọgwụ na ndụ kwa ụbọchị. Ịghọta robotics na-akwado gị maka ụwa ebe mmadụ na igwe na-arụkọ ọrụ ọnụ.
learnSch_technology_f2_kp0: Robots nwere isi ihe atọ: sensọ (na-aghọta gburugburu ebe obibi), actuators (na-akpali na eme ihe), na onye njikwa (na-ahazi data sensọ ma kpebie omume - 'ụbụrụ').
learnSch_technology_f2_kp1: Ogo nnwere onwe (DoF): ọnụọgụ nke ụzọ robot nwere ike ibugharị. Ogwe aka roboti nwere 6 DoF nwere ike iru ọnọdụ na nghazi ọ bụla na oghere 3D.
learnSch_technology_f2_kp2: Robots ụlọ ọrụ: ịgbado ọkụ, eserese, mgbakọ na ụlọ ọrụ ụgbọ ala. Robots na-arụkọ ọrụ ọnụ na-arụkọ ọrụ n'enweghị nsogbu n'akụkụ mmadụ. Robots ịwa ahụ (Da Vinci) na-enye ohere ịrụ ọrụ nkenke.
learnSch_technology_f2_kp3: Artificial Intelligence (AI) na-akwalite robots n'ọhụụ (ihe na-amata ihe), nhazi asụsụ eke (iwu olu), na mmụta igwe (na-emewanye site na ahụmahụ).
learnSch_technology_f2_kp4: Akpaaka na akụ na ụba: robots na-abawanye nrụpụta mana na-ewepụ ụfọdụ ọrụ. A na-emepụta ọrụ ọhụrụ na nhazi robot, nhazi, na imewe. A na-arụrịta ụka mmetụta net.
learnSch_technology_f2_task: Chepụta rọbọt dị mfe iji rụọ otu ọrụ a kapịrị ọnụ (dịka nhazi nhazigharị). Kọwaa: ihe mmetụta achọrọ, ndị na-eme ihe achọrọ, mgbagha njikwa (flowchart ma ọ bụ pseudocode), yana ụdị ọdịda nwere ike ime. Mgbe ahụ kwurịta otu ihe gbasara omume gbasara ịmezi ọrụ a.
learnSch_technology_f2_tp1: Robots ụlọ ọrụ mmepụta ihe na ahụike
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_name: Ọchịchị onye kwuo uche na usoro ọchịchị
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_desc: Usoro ọchịchị na-ekpebi otú e si hazie ọha mmadụ na otú e si ekesa ike. Ọchịchị onye kwuo uche - ọchịchị nke ndị mmadụ - na-enwe ọtụtụ ụdị: kpọmkwem, onye nnọchiteanya, onyeisi oche, na ndị omeiwu. Ntụle usoro na-enyere anyị aka ịghọta ihe kpatara na ụfọdụ mba kwụsiri ike na nweere onwe ebe ndị ọzọ nwere ikike ma ọ bụ enweghị ntụkwasị obi.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp0: Ọchịchị onye kwuo uche: ụmụ amaala na-ahọpụta ndị nnọchiteanya na-eme iwu n'aha ha. Ụkpụrụ ndị bụ isi: iwu nke iwu, ikewapụ ikike, nnwere onwe ikwu okwu, ikpe ikpe nọọrọ onwe ya.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp1: Usoro Onye isi ala (USA): Onye isi (president) bụ onye a họpụtara ozugbo yana iche na ndị omebe iwu. Usoro nzuko omeiwu (UK, Germany): onye isi na-abịa ma bụrụ ndị omeiwu ga-aza ajụjụ.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp2: Nkewa nke ikike: ndị omebe iwu (na-eme iwu), Executive (mejuputa iwu), ikpe (nsụgharị iwu). Nyocha na nguzozi na-egbochi alaka ọ bụla ka ọ ghara ịdị ike.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp3: Ọchịchị ndị ọchịchị: ike gbadoro ụkwụ n'otu onye ndu ma ọ bụ otu na-enweghị ezigbo onye kwuo uche onye kwuo uche ya (dịka North Korea, Belarus). Ọchịchị ngwakọ: emere ntuli aka mana ọ bụghị n'efu ma ọ bụ ziri ezi.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp4: Steeti: ókèala nwere ọnụ ọgụgụ na-adịgide adịgide, ọchịchị dị irè, na ọchịchị a ma ama. Mba nwere ike ịnwe ọtụtụ agbụrụ; obodo-steeti kwadoro agbụrụ na oke ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_task: Tụlee usoro ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị nke USA (onye isi ala) na Germany (ụlọ omebe iwu). Maka nke ọ bụla: kọwaa otu esi ahọpụta onye isi, otu esi eme iwu, yana ihe ga - eme ma ọ bụrụ na gọọmentị efunahụ nkwado ọha. Kedu nke ị chere nwere nkwubi okwu ọchịchị onye kwuo uche ya siri ike? Kpebie.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_tp0: Ọchịchị onye kwuo uche ya na ụdị ya
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_desc: Iwu mba ụwa na-achịkwa mmekọrịta dị n'etiti steeti ma na-echekwa ikike ndị bụ isi nke ndị mmadụ n'otu n'otu. Usoro nke mgbe WWII gasịrị kere UN, Ụlọikpe Criminal International, na nkwekọrịta na-ejikọta mba iji kwado ikike mmadụ. Ịghọta ụlọ ọrụ ndị a na-enyere gị aka ịchọpụta otú ụwa si emeghachi omume na esemokwu, ikpe na-ezighị ezi na ọgba aghara mmadụ.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp0: United Nations (tọrọ ntọala 1945, mba ndị otu 193): na-akwado udo na nchekwa mba ụwa, na-akwalite mmepe na ikike mmadụ site na ụlọ ọrụ 15 pụrụ iche.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp1: Iwu mba ụwa (Mgbakọ Geneva): na-echebe ndị nkịtị, ndị agha merụrụ ahụ, na ndị mkpọrọ nke agha n'oge agha. Imebi ha bụ mpụ agha.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp2: The International Criminal Court (ICC, The Hague): na-ekpe ndị mmadụ ikpe maka mgbukpọ, mpụ megide ụmụ mmadụ, na mpụ agha mgbe ụlọ ikpe mba na-emeghị ihe ọ bụla.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp3: Ọchịchị vs. itinye aka: steeti bụ ndị nwe obodo (enweghị nnyonye anya n'èzí n'ihe gbasara ime), mana nkuzi 'ọrụ ichekwa' (R2P) na-enye ohere itinye aka mgbe steeti na-eme oke arụrụala.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp4: Iwu ndị gbara ọsọ ndụ: Nkwekọrịta ndị gbara ọsọ ndụ nke 1951 kọwara onye gbara ọsọ ndụ dị ka onye na-agbanarị mkpagbu dabere na agbụrụ, okpukperechi, obodo, echiche ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị, ma ọ bụ otu ọha. Steeti agaghị eweghachi ha n'ihe egwu (anaghị emezigharị).
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_task: Nyochaa nsogbu mba ụwa dị ugbu a ma ọ bụ nso nso a (dịka ọgụ ma ọ bụ ihe mberede mmadụ). Chọpụta: (a) nke iwu mba ụwa na-etinye, (b) ihe omume UN ma ọ bụ ICC mere, (c) otu arụmụka maka na otu megidere ntinye aka ndị agha.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_tp1: Ụlọ ikpe mpụ nke mba ụwa
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_tp2: Ndị gbara ọsọ ndụ na ọchịchị
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_name: Ntinye ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị & ntuli aka
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_desc: Ntinye aka n'ọchịchị onye kwuo uche ya gafere ịtụ vootu - ọ gụnyere mkpọsa, ịrịọ arịrịọ, mkpesa, na ịzọ ọkwa ọchịchị. Usoro ntuli aka na-ekpebi ka ịtụ vootu ka ọ bụrụ oche ma na-akpụzi nsonaazụ ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị. Ịghọta nsonye na-enyere gị aka iji ikike gị wee mata ọdịiche dị n'etiti ọchịchị onye kwuo uche ya dị mma na mkpochapụ ndị ntuli aka.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp0: Usoro ịtụ vootu: First-Past-The-Post (UK, USA) - onye ndoro-ndoro nke nwere ọtụtụ votu na-emeri, na-achọsi ike imepụta usoro otu abụọ. Nnọchite anya nha anya (Germany, Netherlands) - ndị otu na-enweta oche n'ogo nke ntuli aka, na-akwado mmekorita nke ọtụtụ otu.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp1: Otu ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị na-ahazi ndị nwere otu echiche maka ịzọ ntuli aka na guzobe ọchịchị. Nku aka ekpe: oke nha anya, itinye aka na steeti. Right-wing: nnwere onwe onye, ​​free ahịa. Ebe etiti: ọnọdụ adịghị oke.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp2: Ntugharị ntuli aka dịgasị iche iche: itinye aka dị elu nke obodo na-ewusi ọchịchị onye kwuo uche ya ike. Ihe mgbochi gụnyere: ndebanye aha mgbagwoju anya, ihe achọrọ NJ ndị ntuli aka, ọdụ ntuli aka na-enweghị ike ịnweta, na ndakpọ olileanya.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp3: Ntinye aka na-abụghị ntuli aka: arịrịọ, ihe ngosi, nnupụisi obodo (imebi iwu udo iji gosipụta ikpe na-ezighị ezi - nke Gandhi, Martin Luther King ji mee ihe), mgbasa ozi mgbasa ozi mgbasa ozi.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp4: Mgbasa ozi na ochichi onye kwuo uche ya: akwụkwọ akụkọ efu na-ejide gọọmentị na akaụntụ (ala nke anọ). Nzacha afụ na ozi na-ezighi ezi na-eyi ịtụ vootu ama ama - agụmagụ mgbasa ozi bụ nka nke obodo.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_task: Tulee FPTP na nnochite anya nha site na iji njirisi ndị a: izi ezi nke nnọchite anya, nkwụsi ike nke gọọmentị, nhọrọ ndị ntuli aka, na ohere nke njikọta. Wee chepụta mkpọsa maka nhọpụta kansụl ụlọ akwụkwọ - dee akwụkwọ akụkọ, chọpụta ndị ntuli aka gị, wee hazie mmemme mkpọsa atọ.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_desc: Psychology bụ ọmụmụ sayensị nke uche, ụbụrụ, na omume. Ọ na-achọ ịghọta ihe mere ndị mmadụ ji eche, na-eche, ma na-eme omume otú ha si eme - site n'ụra na ncheta ruo ịhụnanya na iwe. Ụzọ akparamaagwa bụ nke sayensị: nnwale a na-achịkwa, nleba anya, na nyocha ndekọ ọnụ ọgụgụ. Ọ gbanweela ọgwụ, agụmakwụkwọ, na ndụ kwa ụbọchị.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp0: Isi echiche nke Psychology: ndu ​​(ụbụrụ, mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa), ọgụgụ isi (usoro echiche), omume (omume a na-ahụ anya, ntụ oyi), psychodynamic (draịva amaghị ama), na mmadụ (imepụta onwe ya).
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp1: Usoro sayensị na akparamaagwa: hypothesis → nnwale → nchịkọta data → nyocha → mmechi. Ntụle ndị ọgbọ na-ahụ na a na-enyocha nchoputa tupu ebipụta ya.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp2: Ebe isi ụbụrụ: prefrontal cortex (mkpebi ime, àgwà), amygdala (mmetụta mmetụta, nzaghachi ụjọ), hippocampus (nhazi ebe nchekwa), cerebellum (nchịkọta).
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp3: Nature vs. na-azụlite arụmụka: ruo kedu oke mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa (ọdịdị) vs. gburugburu ebe obibi na ahụmịhe (nzụlite) na-akpụzi mmadụ, ọgụgụ isi, na ahụike uche? Nkwekọrịta dị ugbu a: ha abụọ na-emekọrịta ihe.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp4: Ụkpụrụ omume na akparamaagwa: ndị sonyere ga-enye nkwenye doro anya, nwere ike ịwepụ n'oge ọ bụla, data bụ nzuzo, na ọmụmụ agaghị ebute mmerụ ahụ na-adịgide adịgide. Nnwale Milgram (1960s) welitere ajụjụ gbasara ụkpụrụ omume.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_task: Chepụta ọmụmụ ihe nleba anya nke ọma iji nyochaa ma ụmụ akwụkwọ na-adọpụ uche karịa mgbe ha na-eji egwu na-amụ ihe ma ọ bụ na-agbachi nkịtị. Steeti: ajụjụ nyocha, usoro, mgbanwe, mgbagwoju anya, yana otu ị ga-esi nyochaa data ahụ.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_desc: Nghọta na-ezo aka na usoro uche niile: nghọta, nlebara anya, ebe nchekwa, echiche, asụsụ, na idozi nsogbu. Ịghọta ebe nchekwa - ka esi emepụta ya, chekwaa ya, na weghachite ya - dị mkpa maka ọmụmụ ihe. Nchọpụta na-egosi na icheta ọrụ na ikwugharị oghere na-eme nke ọma karịa ịgụgharị akwụkwọ na-agafe agafe maka njide ogologo oge.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp0: Ụdị ụlọ ahịa dị iche iche (Atkinson & Shiffrin): ebe nchekwa sensọ (akụkụ dị nta nke abụọ) → ebe nchekwa oge dị mkpirikpi (7 ± 2 ihe, ~ 20 sec) → ebe nchekwa ogologo oge (ikike na-akparaghị ókè, nwere ike na-adịgide adịgide).
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp1: Ntinye koodu: ịtụgharị ahụmịhe ka ọ bụrụ akara ebe nchekwa. Ndozi nkọwa (ijikọ ozi ọhụrụ na ihe ọmụma dị adị) dị irè karịa ikwugharị nkwugharị.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp2: Mmetụta spacing: ịmụ otu ihe n'ofe oge ọtụtụ oge (nkwugharị oghere) na-eduga n'icheta ogologo oge dị egwu karịa 'cramming' nke ukwuu.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp3: Omume iweghachite: icheta ozi nke ọma (nnwale onwe onye, ​​kaadị flash) na-ewusi akara ebe nchekwa ike karịa ịgụgharị ọzọ. Nke a bụ 'mmetụta nnwale'.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp4: Ebe nchekwa na-ewughachi, ọ bụghị ịmụ nwa: oge ​​ọ bụla anyị chetara ebe nchekwa, anyị na-agbanwe ya n'ụzọ aghụghọ. Ya mere, akaebe ndị akaebe anya enweghị ntụkwasị obi - egosiri ugboro ugboro na nyocha ụlọ ikpe.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_task: Nwalee mmetụta spacing: mụọ mkpụrụ okwu 20 ọhụrụ site na iji omume ọtụtụ (ha niile n'otu oge taa). Nwalee onwe gị mgbe otu ụbọchị gachara. Wee mụọ okwu ọhụrụ 20 n'ime ụbọchị ise (4 kwa ụbọchị). Nwalee mgbe ụbọchị 7 gachara. Tụlee akara gị wee depụta nchoputa gị.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_name: Ihe gbasara mmekọrịta mmadụ na ibe ya
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_desc: Ọmụmụ ihe gbasara mmekọrịta mmadụ na ibe ya na-amụ otú ndị mmadụ si eche, mmetụta, na ịkpa àgwà n'ihu ndị ọzọ - nke dị adị ma ọ bụ n'echiche. Ọ na-ekpughe otú ihe ndị gbara anyị gburugburu na-akpụzi anyị nke ukwuu: anyị na-emekọ ihe n'otu n'otu, na-erubere ndị isi isi, ma na-azụlite echiche ọjọọ - na-emekarị n'amaghị ama. Ịghọta mmetụta mmekọrịta ọha na eze na-enyere anyị aka ime mkpebi ndị nwere onwe, ụkpụrụ omume.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp0: Nkwekọrịta (nnwale Asch, 1951): Ndị sonyere nyere azịza na-ezighi ezi mgbe ha hụrụ ka ndị ọzọ na-enye ha - na-egosipụta ụkpụrụ (na-achọ ịbanye na ya) na ozi (kwere na ndị ọzọ ziri ezi) mmetụta mmekọrịta mmadụ na ibe ya.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp1: Nrubeisi (Milgram, 1963): Ndị sonyere na-ahụ maka ọkụ ọkụ eletrik dị ize ndụ n'ihi na ndị isi gwara ha ka ha - 65% gara nke kachasị. Na-egosi otú ndị ọchịchị si emeri akọnuche onwe onye.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp2: Mmetụta na-ekiri: ka ndị mmadụ na-abịakwute na mberede, ọ ga-abụ na onye ọ bụla ga-enyere aka (mgbasa ọrụ). Kitty Genovese ikpe, 1964.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp3: Theory of Attribution: anyị na-akọwa omume site n'itinye ya na ime (mmadụ, ikike) ma ọ bụ mpụga (ọnọdụ, chioma) kpatara. Njehie njirimara bụ isi: imebiga ihe ókè n'ime ihe kpatara omume ọjọọ ndị ọzọ.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp4: Ọgbaghara n'ime otu na n'èzí: anyị na-akwado ndị anyị na ha na ('anyị') nwere ike ịkpa ókè megide ndị ọzọ ('ha'). Nnwale ọgba aghara gosiri ka asọmpi otu na-esi ebute iro.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_task: Ị na-ahụ na ọ dịghị onye nọ n'ụlọ ezumezu nke na-enyere onye tụpụrụ akwụkwọ ya aka ma gosi na ọ na-ewute ya. N'iji nkà mmụta mmekọrịta ọha na eze mee ihe, kọwaa: (a) ihe kpatara nke a nwere ike ime, (b) ihe ndị a kapịrị ọnụ na-abawanye ma ọ bụ na-ebelata ohere nke inye aka, (ch) ihe gị onwe gị nwere ike ime iji merie mmetụta ndị na-eguzo.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_desc: Usoro mbara igwe anyị malitere ihe dị ka ijeri afọ 4.6 gara aga site na igwe ojii nke gas na uzuzu. O nwere otu kpakpando (anyanwụ), mbara ala asatọ, ọtụtụ ọnwa, na obere ozu a na-apụghị ịgụta ọnụ - asteroids, comets, na mbara ala dwarf. Ịghọta usoro ya na ike ndị na-achị ya na-ejikọta physics, kemistri na ọnọdụ anyị na mbara igwe.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp0: Anyanwụ nwere 99.86% nke usoro mbara igwe. Ọ na-emepụta ike site na ngwakọta nuklia: hydrogen nuclei na-emepụta helium, na-ahapụ nnukwu ọkụ na okpomọkụ.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp1: Mbara ala nkume dị n'ime: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars - obere, oke, nso anyanwụ. Igwe gas / ice dị n'èzí: Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune - buru ibu, dị anya site na anyanwụ.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp2: Iwu Kepler: mbara ala gburugburu Sun na ellipses (ọ bụghị okirikiri); na-aga ngwa ngwa mgbe ị na-abịaru nso Sun; na square nke oge orbital dabara na cube nke radius orbital.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp3: The asteroid belt dị n'etiti Mars na Jupita; Kuiper Belt gafere Neptune nwere Pluto na mbara ala ndị ọzọ dwarf. Comets sitere na Oort Cloud.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp4: Ike ndọda na-ejide ihe niile na orbit. Ọsọ mgbanarị: ọsọ dị mkpa iji pụọ na ike ndọda anụ ahụ - Ụwa bụ ~ 11.2 km / s; Ọnwa bụ ~ 2.4 km / s.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_task: Mepụta eserese nkọwapụta nke sistemu anyanwụ. Maka mbara ala ọ bụla: kwupụta nha ya na ụwa, oge orbital, otu ihe pụrụ iche, yana ma ọ nwere ike ịkwado ndụ. Kanye eriri asteroid na Kuiper Belt. Jiri eserese gị kọwaa iwu nke abụọ nke Kepler.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_tp0: Anyanwụ na mbara ala dị n'ime
learnSch_astronomy_f0_tp1: Ụwa dị n'èzí na obere ahụ
learnSch_astronomy_f1_name: Kpakpando & Stellar Evolution || Kpakpando anaghị adị mgbe ebighị ebi - a mụrụ ha, dị ndụ ma na-anwụ anwụ, mgbe mgbe na mgbawa dị egwu. Akara kpakpando na-adabere kpamkpam na oke ya. Anyanwụ ga-emecha gbasaa ghọọ nnukwu uhie uhie wee daa na dwarf ọcha, ebe nnukwu kpakpando na-ejedebe dị ka kpakpando supernovae na neutron ma ọ bụ oghere ojii. Emebere ihe niile dị arọ karịa hydrogen na kpakpando.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_desc: Kpakpando na-etolite na nebulae (nnukwu igwe ojii nke gas na uzuzu) mgbe ike ndọda na-eme ka clumps daa ma kpoo ọkụ ruo mgbe ngwakọta nuklia na-agbanye - ọmụmụ nke protostar, mgbe ahụ, kpakpando bụ isi usoro.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp0: Isi usoro: kpakpando na-eji oge ndụ ha niile na-ejikọta hydrogen na helium na steeti kwụsiri ike. Anyanwụ anọwo na usoro bụ isi maka ~ 4.6 ijeri afọ ma nwee ~ ijeri 5 fọdụrụ.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp1: Eserese Hertzsprung-Russell (HR) na-akpa nkata kpakpando site n'ìhè vs. okpomọkụ. Isi usoro na-agba ọsọ diagonally; Ndị dike na-acha uhie uhie (n'elu aka nri) na dwarfs ọcha (ala aka ekpe) na-apụ n'ahịrị a.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp2: Kpakpando dị ala (dị ka anyanwụ): isi usoro → ibu uhie → planetary nebula → dwarf ọcha → (n'ikpeazụ) dwarf ojii.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp3: Kpakpando dị elu: isi usoro → red supergiant → mgbawa supernova (na-emepụta ihe dị arọ karịa ígwè, gbasasịa ha n'ime oghere) → kpakpando neutron ma ọ bụ oghere ojii.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp4: See ụzọ evolushọn abụọ nke kpakpando na eserese HR: otu maka kpakpando dị ka anyanwụ, otu maka kpakpando ugboro 20 ka ukwuu. Maka ọkwa ọ bụla: kwupụta aha, usoro oge, na usoro nuklia bụ isi na-eme. Kọwaa ihe supernova bụ na ihe kpatara o ji dị mkpa maka mmalite nke ihe ndị dị n'ụwa.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_task: Draw two stellar evolution pathways on an HR diagram: one for a star like the Sun, one for a star 20 times more massive. For each stage: state the name, timescale, and the main nuclear process occurring. Explain what a supernova is and why it matters for the origin of elements on Earth.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_tp0: Nhazi kpakpando na usoro bụ isi
learnSch_astronomy_f2_desc: N'ofe usoro mbara igwe anyị, ọtụtụ ijeri kpakpando chịkọtara n'ụyọkọ kpakpando dị, ma gafere ụyọkọ kpakpando dị n'eluigwe na ala a na-ahụ anya - ihe dị ka ijeri afọ 93 n'ogologo na ijeri afọ 13.8. Cosmology - sayensị mmalite nke eluigwe na ala na evolushọn - ekpughere ihe osise dị ịtụnanya: Big Bang, oghere na-agbasawanye, ihe gbara ọchịchịrị, na ike gbara ọchịchịrị.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp0: Milky Way bụ ụyọkọ kpakpando gbara gburugburu nke nwere ijeri ijeri 250. Anyanwụ anyị dị ~ 27,000 ìhè-afọ site na etiti galactic. Ọ na-ewe Sun ~ 225 nde afọ iji orbit mbara igwe.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp1: Ụdị Galaxy: spiral (dị ka Milky Way na Andromeda), elliptical (kpakpando ochie, obere gas), oge ọ bụla (enweghị nkọwapụta nke ọdịdị ya, na-ebutekarị ọgụ galactic).
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp2: The Big Bang Theory: ~ 13.8 ijeri afọ gara aga, eluigwe na ala malitere dị ka ihe na-ekpo ọkụ nke ukwuu, oke ebe ma na-agbasawanye kemgbe ahụ. Ihe akaebe: Igwe ọkụ ọkụ ọkụ n'azụ radieshon, iwu Hubble (ụyọkọ kpakpando na-alaghachi ngwa ngwa ka ha dị).
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp3: Ihe gbara ọchịchịrị: ihe a na-adịghị ahụ anya nke na-adịghị enye ìhè mana mmetụta ndọda ya na-ejikọta ụyọkọ kpakpando. Na-eme ~ 27% nke oke ike nke eluigwe na ala. A maghị ọdịdị ya.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp4: Ike gbara ọchịchịrị: ike dị omimi na-akwalite mgbasawanye nke eluigwe na ala. Na-eme ~ 68% nke eluigwe na ala. Ihe nkịtị (kpakpando, mbara ala, gas) bụ naanị ~ 5%.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_task: Mepụta 'adreesị' maka ụwa: mbara ala, sistemụ kpakpando, ụyọkọ kpakpando, otu ụyọkọ kpakpando, supercluster, eluigwe na ala a na-ahụ anya. Nye anya/ nha maka ọkwa ọ bụla. Mgbe ahụ kọwapụta ihe akaebe abụọ maka echiche Big Bang, gụnyere ihe radieshon mbara igwe na-ahụ maka mbara igwe bụ.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_tp0: Galaxies na Milky Way || Nnukwu Bang na mgbasawanye
learnSch_astronomy_f2_tp1: Okwu gbara ọchịchịrị na ike gbara ọchịchịrị
learnSch_latin_language_f0_name: Latịn bụ asụsụ atụgharịgharịrị — ngwụcha okwu (ọ bụghị usoro okwu) na-egosi ọrụ ụtọasụsụ. Ịmụta declensions na ngwaa ngwaa na-emepe ihe ederede Latin ọ bụla pụtara, site na akụkọ agha Siza na uri epic Virgil. Ụtọ ụtọ asụsụ Latin na-emekwa ka nghọta nke Bekee, French, Spanish, Italian na Portuguese dịkwuo mma.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_desc: Latịn nwere aha ise declension. Nbibi nke ọ bụla nwere ikpe isii: nhọpụta (isiokwu), ebubo (ihe), genitive (ihe onwunwe), dative (ihe na-apụtaghị ìhè), ablative (dị iche iche), vocative (adreesị).
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp0: Ọmụmaatụ 1st declension: puella (nwa agbọghọ) - puella (nom.), puellam (acc.), puellae (gen.), puellae (dat.), puella (abl.), puella (voc.). Ọtụtụ: puellae, puellas, puellarum, puellis, puellis, puellae.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp1: A na-ejikọta ngwaa maka mmadụ (1st/2nd/3rd), ọnụ ọgụgụ (otu/ọtụtụ dị iche iche), ogologo oge (ugbu a, ezughị okè, zuru okè, n'ọdịnihu), olu (arụ ọrụ / ngafe), na ọnọdụ (na-egosi, subjunctive, dị mkpa).
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp2: Present tense of amare (to love): amo, amas, amat, amamus, amatis, amant — I love, you love, he/she/ it loves, we love, you (pl.) love, they love.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp3: Present tense of amare (to love): amo, amas, amat, amamus, amatis, amant — I love, you love, he/she/it loves, we love, you (pl.) love, they love.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp4: Usoro okwu na Latin na-agbanwe agbanwe n'ihi na njedebe na-enye ọrụ: 'Puella aquam portat' na 'Aquam puella portat' pụtara 'Nwa agbọghọ na-eburu mmiri.' Nkwado na-agbanwe mana ọ pụtara ịnọrọ.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_task: Kpochapụ aha 'dominus' (nna ukwu, nwoke declension nke abụọ) n'okwu isii niile, otu na ọtụtụ. Mgbe ahụ jikọọ 'videre' (ịhụ) n'oge ugbu a, mmadụ niile. Tụgharịa asụsụ: 'Dominus puellas amat' na 'Puellae dominum vident'.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_desc: Ịgụ ezigbo ederede Latin - Caesar, Cicero, Virgil, Ovid - jikọtara gị na afọ 2,000 nke echiche Western, iwu, akwụkwọ na sayensị. Nkà ntụgharị asụsụ na-ewulite nkenke nyocha, ndidi, na ike iji ahịrịokwu dị mgbagwoju anya rụọ ọrụ. Ọbụna ihe odide ndị dị mfe na-ekpughe ụkpụrụ ndị Rom, akụkọ ihe mere eme, na nkwupụta okwu.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp0: Usoro ntụgharị asụsụ: chọpụta ngwaa nke mbụ (ọ na-agwa gị ihe omume na ihe na-esighi ike), emesia isiokwu (nominative), emesia ihe ahụ (ebubo), emesia ihe ndị ọzọ.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp1: De Bello Gallico nke Caesar ka edere n'asụsụ Latịn ndị agha - dị mma maka ndị mbido. Okwu Cicero na-eji okwu mgbagwoju anya. Virgil's 'Aeneid' bụ uri nwere mita na asụsụ ihe atụ.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp2: Nkejiokwu ndị nọ n'okpuru: ebubo + enweghị njedebe (nkwupụta na-apụtachaghị ìhè), nkeji okwu (mgbe/ kemgbe), nkebiokwu ikwu (qui, quae, quod — onye, ​​nke), nkebiokwu nsonaazụ (ut + subjunctive).
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp3: Oge zuru oke: emechara omume gara aga. ngwụcha zuru oke mgbe niile: -i, -isti, -it, -imus, -istis, -erunt. Ọmụmaatụ: amavi = Ahụrụ m n'anya / ahụrụ m m n'anya.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp4: Usoro ọgụgụ: akara ndị gbara ya gburugburu na-enyere aka mgbe edoghị ụtọ asụsụ. Jiri ihe ọmụma nke okwu mgbọrọgwụ - ọtụtụ okwu bekee bụ ụdị Latin (dịka 'ọdụ ụgbọ mmiri' si portare = iburu).
learnSch_latin_language_f1_task: Tụgharịa asụsụ akụkụ a site n'aka Siza: 'Milites Romani castrum magnum aedificaverut. Galli kwa silvas fugerunt et na montibus se celaverunt.' Nyocha: chọpụta isiokwu, ngwaa, ihe, na nkebi ahịrịokwu ọ bụla. Kedu ihe na-agwụ ike ngwaa? Gịnị ka nke a na-agwa anyị banyere ihe merela?
learnSch_latin_language_f2_desc: Latịn abụghị naanị asụsụ - ọ bụ ụgbọ nke mmepeanya dum mere iwu, ụkpụrụ ụlọ, okpukperechi, na echiche ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị n'ofe Europe na ụwa niile. Echiche ndị Rom agbakwunyere na Latin - res publica, imperium, senatus, ius - nyere anyị 'mba Republic', 'Empire', 'Senet', na 'ikpe ziri ezi'. Ịghọta ihe nketa a enweghị atụ na ịghọta akụkọ ihe mere eme nke ọdịda anyanwụ.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp0: Ihe nketa nke Latin: ~ 60% nke okwu Bekee sitere na Latịn ma ọ bụ French nwere mmetụta Latin. Aha sayensị, okwu iwu, na okwu ahụike bụ Latin kachasị.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp1: Echiche iwu Roman ka na-eji: habeas corpus (ị ga-emepụta ahụ - ikike ka a ga-atụ gị mkpọrọ n'enweghị ebubo), ikpe ikpe (n'okpuru onye ikpe), na absentia, pro bono, ex parte.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp2: Onyinye okpukpe na omenala Roman: kalenda (ọnwa ndị a kpọrọ aha chi ndị Rom na ndị eze ukwu: January/Janus, March/Mars, July/Julius Caesar), iwu ụkpụrụ ụlọ (Doric, Ionic, Kọrịnt).
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp3: Latin mottos ka ji: carpe diem (jide ụbọchị), cogito ergo nchikota (m na-eche, ya mere m), veni vidi vici (m wee, m hụrụ, m meriri - Julius Caesar), e pluribus unum (nke ọtụtụ, otu - USA motto).
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp4: Akwụkwọ ndị Rom: Virgil's 'Aeneid' (akụkọ ifo ntọala Rome), Ovid's 'Metamorphoses' (akụkọ ifo nke mgbanwe), okwu Cicero, nkọwa ndị agha Siza - niile ka na-agụ ma mụọ taa.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_task: Chọta okwu Bekee 10 sitere na mgbọrọgwụ Latin n'otu paragraf nke akwụkwọ ọgụgụ ọ bụla. Maka nke ọ bụla: dee mgbọrọgwụ Latin, ihe ọ pụtara, na okwu Bekee. Mgbe ahụ kọwaara otu echiche iwu Rom ma gosi otú o si metụta usoro iwu ọgbara ọhụrụ.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_tp0: Mgbọrọgwụ Latin na bekee na sayensị
learnSch_latin_language_f2_tp1: Iwu Rom na ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị
learnSch_media_studies_f0_desc: Ọgụgụ mgbasa ozi bụ ikike ịnweta, nyocha, nyocha na imepụta mgbasa ozi. N'ime ụwa juputara na ozi - akụkọ, mgbasa ozi mgbasa ozi, mgbasa ozi, ntụrụndụ - ikike inyocha isi mmalite nke ọma, chọpụta ihe nhụsianya, na ịmata nhụsianya bụ ikike ọchịchị onye kwuo uche ya. Ụmụ amaala maara akwụkwọ mgbasa ozi siri ike ịghọgbu.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp0: Ewubere ozi mgbasa ozi niile: onye mere ha, maka ebumnuche, maka ndị na-ege ntị, na-eji usoro akọwapụtara, nwere mmetụta nwere ike. Usoro CAGE: Mwube, Ndị na-ege ntị, Ụdị, Mmetụta.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp1: Bias in news: nhọrọ nhụsianya (ihe akụkọ ndị a na-ekpuchi), ịmepụta echiche (otu esi egosipụta), na isi iyi (ndị a na-anụ olu ya). Ụlọ ọrụ mgbasa ozi niile nwere ụfọdụ echiche - ajụjụ bụ ego ole na nke ntụziaka.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp2: Ozi na-ezighi ezi: ozi ụgha na-agbasa n'ebumnobi ịghọgbu. Mgbasa ozi: kpachaara anya ụgha ozi emepụtara iji duhie. Weebụsaịtị na-enyocha eziokwu (Snopes, Full Fact, Politifact) na-enyere aka ịchọpụta nkwupụta.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp3: Usoro mgbasa ozi: mmasị mmetụta uche, nkwado ndị ama ama, bandwagon ('onye ọ bụla na-eji ya'), ụkọ ('oke enye'), ikwughachi. Mgbasa ozi na-arụ ọrụ n'amaghị ama - ọbụlagodi na anyị maara aghụghọ.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp4: Ihe gbasara Nwe: ọnụ ọgụgụ dị nta nke ụlọ ọrụ nwere mgbasa ozi zuru ụwa ọnụ (News Corp, Disney, Google, Meta). Nnwere ike gbadoro anya nwere ike igbochi echiche dị iche iche.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_task: Họrọ otu akụkọ akụkọ nke ụlọ ọrụ atọ dị iche iche kpuchie (dịka akụkọ BBC, tabloid, na mgbasa ozi mgbasa ozi ọha). Tulee: isi akụkọ, ụda olu, ihe akaebe ejiri mee ihe, nke agụnyere nhota ya, na ihe apụrụ. Nye onye ọ bụla maka ntụkwasị obi. Kpebie nke kacha kwesị ntụkwasị obi na ihe kpatara ya.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_tp0: Mwube mgbasa ozi na eleghi anya
learnSch_media_studies_f0_tp1: Ozi na-ezighi ezi na ịlele eziokwu
learnSch_media_studies_f1_desc: Ihe nkiri bụ otu n'ime mgbasa ozi akụkọ kachasị ike emetụrụla. Ọ na-ejikọta onyonyo, ụda, mmegharị, na ndezi iji mepụta ihe ọ pụtara. Ịmụ ihe nkiri 'ịgụ' dị ka ederede - nyocha akụkụ igwefoto, ọkụ, nhazi ụda, na nhazi akụkọ - na-emepe ahụmịhe siri ike nke sinima ma nye gị ngwá ọrụ iji mepụta akụkọ a na-ahụ anya.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp0: Igwefoto gbara: oke nso (mmetụta, nkọwa), nso nso (mmeghachi omume agwa), ogbugba ọkara (agwa + ọnọdụ), ogologo oge (ntọala), nnukwu ogbugba (iche, odida obodo). Onye ọ bụla na-emepụta mmetụta mmetụta uche dị iche iche.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp1: Igwefoto akụkụ: ala ala (na-eme ka isiokwu dị ike), akụkụ dị elu (na-eme ka isiokwu dị obere / adịghị ike), ọkwa anya (anọpụ iche), Dutch tilt (adịghị agwụ agwụ / esemokwu). Igwe onyonyo na-emikpu onye na-ekiri ya n'echiche nke agwa.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp2: Na-edezi: ịkpụ (ntụgharị ngwa ngwa), fade (nwayọọ nwayọọ na oji - na-atụ aro oge na-agafe), igbari (ntụgharị - na-atụ aro njikọ). Ndezi Montage na-emepụta ihe site na usoro (Eisenstein).
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp3: Ụda: ụda diegetic (dị na ụwa ihe nkiri - mkparịta ụka, nzọụkwụ), na-abụghị diegetic (ụda ụda naanị ndị na-ege ntị na-anụ). Egwu na-emepụta ọnọdụ; ịgbachi nkịtị na-akpata esemokwu.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp4: Mise-en-scène: ihe niile etinyere na etiti - setịpụ imewe, uwe, ọkụ, ọnọdụ onye na-eme ihe nkiri. Ihe nke ọ bụla na-akpachapụ anya kpachapụ anya.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_task: Họrọ ihe ngosi nkeji 2 site na ihe nkiri. Nyocha: (a) ụdị ogbugba atọ dị iche iche ejiri na mmetụta ha, (b) ọkụ (elu-igodo = na-egbuke egbuke/ọṅụ ma ọ bụ ala-igodo = ọchịchịrị / omimi?), (c) ụda (kọwa diegetic na non-diegetic), (d) ka edezi si emepụta ijeụkwụ. Kpebie ihe ọnọdụ na-emepụta na otú.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_desc: Usoro mgbasa ozi na-elekọta mmadụ agbanweela ka ndị mmadụ na-ekwurịta okwu, na-eri akụkọ, na ịmepụta njirimara. Ha ewebatala ihe egwu ọhụrụ: algorithmic manipulation, cyberbullying, nbibi nzuzo na ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị. Ịghọta ka nyiwe si arụ ọrụ na otu esi eji ha eme ihe nke ọma na n'enweghị nsogbu bụ nwa amaala dijitalụ dị mkpa.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp0: Algorithms na-ahazi ọdịnaya dabere na omume gị - ihe ị pịrị, masịrị gị na kesaa. Nke a na-emepụta afụ nzacha ebe ị na-ahụ naanị ihe na-akwado echiche, na-amụba polarisation.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp1: Ụdị azụmahịa: ọtụtụ nyiwe mmekọrịta mmadụ na ibe ya bụ n'efu n'ihi na data na nlebara anya nke ndị ọrụ bụ ngwaahịa a na-ere n'aka ndị mgbasa ozi. 'Ọ bụrụ na ị naghị akwụ ụgwọ, ị bụ ngwaahịa ahụ.'
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp2: akara ukwu dijitalụ: ihe niile ị biputere, masịrị gị, ma ọ bụ chọọ na-ahapụ akara na-adịgide adịgide. Ndị na-ewe mmadụ n'ọrụ n'ọdịnihu, mahadum, na ndị mmanye iwu nwere ike ịnweta ọdịnaya nke ọha na nke onwe gị mgbe ụfọdụ.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp3: Cyberbullying: iyi egwu ịntanetị nwere ike ịbụ onye amaghị aha, rute ndị ihe metụtara ebe ọ bụla, ma hapụ ndekọ na-adịgide adịgide. Mmetụta na ahụike uche siri ike; ọ bụ mmejọ iwu n'ọtụtụ obodo.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp4: Deepfakes na mgbasa ozi sịntetik: AI nwere ike ịmepụta vidiyo adịgboroja na-ekwenye ekwenye nke ndị ezigbo mmadụ. Nke a na-eme ka ihe akaebe na-ahụ anya bụrụ nke a na-apụghị ịtụkwasị obi - 'ịhụ' abụghịzi 'kwere'.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_task: Nyochaa ọnụnọ mgbasa ozi mmekọrịta gị: kedu ihe onyonyo gị ka posts ọha gị na-emepụta? Kedu ihe algọridim gị na-egosi gị? Ị na-agbaso akaụntụ nwere echiche na-emegide? Wee chepụta ntuziaka maka nwa akwụkwọ afọ 7 maka iji mgbasa ozi ọha na eze dị mma ma dị oke egwu - gụnyere 5 kpọmkwem, ndụmọdụ bara uru.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_desc: Mandarin Chinese nwere ihe karịrị otu ijeri ndị na-asụ n'ụwa niile ma bụrụ asụsụ ndị na-asụ asụsụ obodo kacha asụ. N'adịghị ka asụsụ mkpụrụ akwụkwọ, Mandarin na-eji ụda - mgbanwe na ụda olu na-agbanwe ihe ọ pụtara - yana usoro ederede logographic. Ịmụta usoro romanisation Pinyin na ụda anọ bụ nzọụkwụ mbụ dị mkpa.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp0: Pinyin: Sistemụ Romanisation gọọmentị maka Mandarin. Ọ na-eji mkpụrụedemede Latin nwere akara ụda na-anọchi anya ịkpọ okwu. Dị mkpa maka ịmụta mkpụrụedemede na iji ụzọ ntinye dijitalụ.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp1: Ụda anọ: 1st (ọkwa dị elu, ā) — 'mā' pụtara nne. 2nd (ebili, á) — 'má' pụtara hemp. 3rd (itinye, ǎ) — 'mǎ' pụtara inyinya. 4th (falling, à) — 'mà' pụtara ịbara mba. gbakwunyere ụda na-anọpụ iche (enweghị akara).
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp2: Mmalite (consonants): b, p, m, f, d, t, n, l, g, k, h, j, q, x, zh, ch, sh, r, z, c, s. Ngwucha (ụdaume na ngwụcha): a, o, e, i, u, ü, ai, ei, ao, ou, an, en, ang, eng, ong, wdg
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp3: Ekele dị mkpa: 你好 (nǐ hǎo) - ndewo; 谢谢 (xièxiè) — daalụ; 不客气 (bù kèqì) — nnabata gị; 对不起 (duìbuqǐ) - ndo; 再见 (zàijiàn) - goodbye.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp4: Ụtọ ụtọ asụsụ Mandarin dị mfe karịa asụsụ ndị Europe n'ụzọ ụfọdụ: enweghị njikọ ngwaa, enweghị okike ụtọasụsụ, enweghị ngwụcha ọtụtụ. Usoro okwu (Subject-Verb-Object) na-ebu ihe pụtara.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_task: Gee ntị n'ụda anọ 'ma' ma kwugharịa ruo mgbe ị ga-emepụta nke ọ bụla nke ọma. Jiri Pinyin dee 'Abụ m nwa akwụkwọ' na Mandarin: 'Wǒ shì xuéshēng.' Ekem dee: 'Achọrọ m iri osikapa' — 'Wǒ xiǎng chī mǐfàn.' Kọwaa ihe dị iche na ihe ọ pụtara bụ mgbanwe ụda na 'mā/mǎ' kpatara.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_tp2: Ekele na akpaokwu ndị bụ isi
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_desc: Ihe odide Chinese (汉字, Hànzì) bụ otu n'ime usoro edemede kacha ochie n'ụwa, nwere ihe karịrị mkpụrụedemede 50,000 - ọ bụ ezie na ịgụ na agụ na-achọ ịmara ihe dị ka 2,000-3,000 nkịtị. Ihe odide abụghị eserese na-enweghị usoro - a na-ewu ha site na akụrụngwa bara uru nke a na-akpọ radicals, nke na-enye nkọwa na nkọwa na mgbe ụfọdụ ịkpọ okwu.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp0: A na-ede mkpụrụedemede n'ọkpụkpụ square ma nwee ọrịa strok n'usoro akọwapụtara. Usoro iwu strok na-eme ka ebe nchekwa na-agbanwe agbanwe yana enyemaka: n'ozuzu elu ruo ala, aka ekpe gaa n'aka nri, kehoraizin tupu kwụ ọtọ.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp1: Radicals: mkpụrụedemede niile nwere radical semantic nke na-egosi ihe ọ pụtara. 水 (water radical 氵) pụtara na 海 (oké osimiri), 河 (osimiri), 泳 (egwu mmiri). Ịmara ~ 200 radicals na-emeghe ụkpụrụ na puku mkpụrụedemede.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp2: Ọdịnala dị mfe karịa. Omenala: mkpụrụedemede ndị dị mfe (a na-eji na China China, Singapore) enwechaghị ọrịa strok. Ihe odide ọdịnala (Taiwan, Hong Kong, obodo mba ofesi) na-echekwa ụdị akụkọ ihe mere eme. Ọmụmaatụ: ịhụnanya — 爱 (dị mfe) vs. 愛 (omenala).
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp3: HSK (Hanyu Shuiping Kaoshi): ule ntozu China ọkọlọtọ. HSK 1 = okwu 150, HSK 2 = 300, ruo HSK 6 = okwu 5,000. Ihe nrịbama dị mkpa maka ndị mmụta China.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp4: Ihe odide ndị a na-ahụkarị ka ị ga-ebu ụzọ mụta: 一二三四五六七八九十 (1–10), 人 (onye), 大 (nnukwu), 小 (obere), 中 (n'etiti/China), 日 (anyanwụ/ụbọchị), 月 (ọnwa/ọnwa), ugwu (mmiri), 屰(ọkụ).
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_task: Mụta ma dee (n'usoro strok ziri ezi) nọmba 1–10 na mkpụrụedemede China. Mụtazie mkpụrụedemede ise ọzọ site na iji radicals ha dị ka ihe enyemaka nchekwa - kọwaa njikọ maka nke ọ bụla. N'ikpeazụ, dee aha gị na Pinyin wee họrọ mkpụrụedemede Chinese dabara adaba maka ya.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_desc: Ịmụ asụsụ Mandarin na-emepe ụzọ maka mkparịta ụka ijeri 1.4 yana otu n'ime omenala kacha ewu ewu n'ụwa. Isiokwu ndị bụ isi - mmalite, oge, ịzụ ahịa, nri, ntụziaka - na-enye okwu bara uru maka nkwurịta okwu kwa ụbọchị. Asụsụ Chinese oge niile na-eme ka mkparịta ụka bụrụ ihe ijuanya ozugbo enwetara ụda na okwu ndị bụ isi.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp0: Nhazi ahịrịokwu: Isiokwu + Oge + Ebe + Ngwaa + Ihe. Ọmụmaatụ: 我 (I) 明天 (echi) 在图书馆 (na ụlọ akwụkwọ) 学习 (ọmụmụ) 中文 (Chinese) = 我明天在图书馆学习中文.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp1: Ajụ ajụjụ: tinye 吗 (ma) na nkwupụta maka ee/ee e. 你是学生 (ị bụ nwa akwụkwọ) → 你是学生吗? (Ị bụ nwata akwụkwọ?). Ma ọ bụ jiri okwu ajụjụ: 什么 (shénme, gịnị), 哪里 (nǎlǐ, ebe), 什么时候 (shénme shíhòu, mgbe).
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp2: Ọnụọgụ na ọnụ ahịa: 一百 (100), 两百五十 (250). N'ụlọ ahịa: 这个多少钱? (zhège duōshǎo qián?) — Ego ole ka nke a bụ? 太贵了 (tài guì le) - Oke ọnụ! 便宜一点 (piányi yīdiǎn) - Obere dị ọnụ ala biko.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp3: Nri na nhazi: 我要一碗米饭 (Wǒ yào yī wǎn mǐfàn) —Achọrọ m otu efere osikapa. 我不吃肉 (Wǒ bù chī ròu) — Anaghị m eri anụ. ị! (Hǎochī!) - Ọ dị ụtọ!
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp4: Ọnọdụ omenala: iji aka abụọ na-agbanwe kaadị azụmahịa; na-agwa ndị okenye okwu n'ụzọ nkịtị; mkpa nke 面子 (miànzi, 'ihu' - aha, ugwu); ụkpụrụ omume inye onyinye. Asụsụ na omenala enweghị atụ.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_task: Egwuregwu egwu (dee ma ọ bụ dekọọ) mkparịta ụka n'ụlọ oriri na ọṅụṅụ ndị China. Gụnye: ikele onye nlekọta, ịjụ ihe dị mma, ịtụ efere abụọ na ihe ọṅụṅụ (iji okwu ọnụ ziri ezi), ịjụ ọnụ ahịa, na ịsị nke ọma. Ebumnuche maka mgbanwe opekata mpe iri. Jiri Pinyin na ntụgharị asụsụ Bekee kọwaa nkọwa.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_tp2: Nri, omenala, na ndụ kwa ụbọchị
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_desc: Mgbanwe ihu igwe bụ ihe ịma aka nke oge anyị. Mkpọpụta mmadụ nke ikuku griin haus na-ekpo ọkụ n'ụwa n'ọ̀tụ̀tụ̀ ọ̀tụ̀tụ̀ a na-enwetụbeghị ụdị ya, na-akpaghasị usoro ihu igwe, na-agbaze okpu ice, na-eyi gburugburu ebe obibi na obodo mmadụ egwu. Ịghọta sayensị - okirikiri carbon, isi ihe nrịbama, na loops nzaghachi - dị mkpa maka nwa amaala ọ bụla maara ihe.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp0: Usoro carbon: CO₂ na-agagharị n'etiti ikuku, oke osimiri, ala (osisi sitere na photosynthesis), na ihe ndị dị ndụ (site na iku ume). Ọkụ fosil na-ere ọkụ na-ahapụ carbon echekwara ruo ọtụtụ nde afọ, na-akpaghasị okirikiri.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp1: Mmetụta griin haus: ụzarị anyanwụ na-ekpo ọkụ n'ụwa; Ụwa na-ewepụta radieshon infrared; ikuku griin haus (CO₂, CH₄, N₂O, H₂O vapour) na-amịkọrọ ya ma mee ka ọkụ na-ekpo ọkụ, na-eme ka elu ahụ dị ọkụ. Na-enweghị ya, ụwa ga-adị -18 Celsius; ya na ya (nke okike), 15 ° C; enwekwukwa = okpomoku dị ize ndụ.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp2: Ọkwa dị ugbu a (2024): ikuku CO₂ karịrị 420 ppm (ọrụ tupu ụlọ ọrụ: 280 ppm). Okpomọkụ zuru ụwa ọnụ arịgoro ~1.2°C karịa ọkwa ụlọ ọrụ. Agreement Paris chọrọ ịmachi okpomoku na 1.5°C.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp3: Ihe nrịbama ihu igwe: ọnụ ụzọ gafere nke mgbanwe na-eme ka onwe ya dị ike. Agbaze permafrost na-ahapụ CH₄; ice Arctic na-agbaze na-ekpughe oké osimiri gbara ọchịchịrị, na-etinyekwu okpomọkụ; Ihe egwu igbutu oke ọhịa Amazon nwere ime ka oke ọhịa ghọọ savanna.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp4: Ikpe ziri ezi nke ihu igwe: mba ndị ka na-emepe emepe na-atụnye obere ihe n'ikuku mana ha na-ata ahụhụ kachasị site na mmetụta ihu igwe (oke oke osimiri, oke okpomọkụ, ọdịda ihe ọkụkụ). Akụkụ ụkpụrụ omume na ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị nke omume ihu igwe enweghị ikewapụ na sayensị.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_task: See ma kọwapụta usoro okirikiri carbon, na-egosi oke eke na ndakpọ nke mmadụ. Gbakọọ: ọ bụrụ na obodo na-ebupụta 500 Mt CO₂ kwa afọ ma na-akụ osisi sequestering 50 Mt / afọ mgbe ị na-atụgharị na mmeghari ohuru na-echekwa 100 Mt / afọ, afọ ole iji ruo efu efu (na-eche na ọ dịghị usoro ọhụrụ)? Nyochaa ihe atọ ọzọ obodo nwere ike ime.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_tp0: Carbon okirikiri na griin haus mmetụta
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_tp1: Data dị ugbu a na nkwekọrịta Paris
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_tp2: Ihe ntinye aka na ikpe ziri ezi ihu igwe
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_desc: Ụdị dị iche iche nke ndụ - ụdị ndụ dịgasị iche iche n'ụwa - bụ ntọala nke gburugburu ebe obibi dị mma nke na-enye anyị nri, mmiri dị ọcha, ọgwụ, na ihu igwe kwụsiri ike. Anyị na-enwe ugbu a mkpochapụ nke isii nke oke igwe, nke mbibi ebe obibi, mmetọ, ụdị mmegide na mgbanwe ihu igwe na-ebute. Ịghọta ihe ndị dị ndụ na-ekpughe ihe kpatara ụdị ọ bụla furu efu ji dị mkpa.
