learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp0: Ọrụ gburugburu ebe obibi: uru ọdịdị na-enye n'efu - pollination (dị mkpa maka 75% nke ihe ọkụkụ nri), nchacha mmiri, njikwa idei mmiri, nchekwa carbon, nhazi ala, na nchebe n'ụsọ oké osimiri.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp1: Ikpochapụ oke nke isii: ụdị na-apụ n'anya ugboro 100-1,000 ngwa ngwa karịa ọnụego ndabere eke. ~ 1 nde ụdị dị ugbu a egwu. Ihe ndị bụ isi: mgbanwe iji ala eme ihe (mfu ebe obibi), imebiga ihe ókè, mmetọ, ụdị mmegide, mgbanwe ihu igwe.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp2: Ụdị isi okwu: ụdị ndị na-ekere òkè na-enweghị atụ na gburugburu ebe obibi ha. Iwepu ha na-ebute ndakpọ gburugburu ebe obibi - dịka ọmụmaatụ. anụ ọhịa wolf na Yellowstone na-achịkwa mgbada, nke mere ka ahịhịa ndụ gbakee, na-emetụta osimiri.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp3: Biomes: nnukwu obodo gburugburu ebe obibi kọwapụtara site na ihu igwe na ahịhịa - oke ọhịa mmiri ozuzo (kachasị ihe dị ndụ), oke ọhịa, ahịhịa ahịhịa / savanna, ọzara (ọnọdụ dị oke egwu), tundra (permafrost), oke osimiri (biome kachasị ukwuu).
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp4: Usoro nchekwa: ebe echedoro (ogige ntụrụndụ mba, ihe nchekwa mmiri), mweghachi (iweghachi ụdị okike na usoro), nchekwa ebe ochie (anụ ọhịa, ụlọ akụ mkpụrụ), nkwekọrịta CITES (na-achịkwa ịzụ ahịa n'ụdị dị egwu).
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_task: Nyochaa otu gburugburu ebe obibi dị n'ihe ize ndụ (dịka coral reefs, Amazon rainforest, peat bogs). Maka usoro gburugburu ebe obibi ị họọrọ: (a) kọwapụta ụdị ndụ dị iche iche ya, (b) kọwaa ihe egwu atọ, (c) tụọ uru akụ na ụba nke ọrụ gburugburu ebe obibi ya, (d) nyochaa atụmatụ nchekwa atọ na ịdị irè ha.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_desc: Njigide pụtara igbo mkpa nke ugbu a na-emebighị ikike nke ọgbọ n'ọdịnihu izute nke ha (nkọwa Brundtland, 1987). Ntugharị gaa na ụwa na-adigide chọrọ mgbanwe na ike, nri, ụgbọ njem, na oriri - yana gụnyere onye ọ bụla site na gọọmentị na ụlọ ọrụ gaa n'otu n'otu.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp0: Ebumnuche Development Sustainable Development (SDGs): ebumnuche 17 nke mba ndị otu UN niile nakweere na 2015, na-elekwasị anya ịda ogbenye, ahụike, agụmakwụkwọ, ike dị ọcha, omume ihu igwe, na ihe dị iche iche dị ndụ site na 2030.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp1: Ike mmeghari ohuru: anyanwụ, ikuku, mmiri, geothermal, na ike tidal na-emepụta ọkụ eletrik nwere obere ikuku ikuku griin ha. Ọnụ ego anyanwụ na ifufe adaala 90%+ kemgbe 2010 - ha bụ ugbu a isi mmalite ike dị ọnụ ala arụtụrụla.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp2: Ọnọdụ akụ na ụba okirikiri: kama iwere-eme-ịtụfu, a na-ejigharị ihe, rụzie ya, ma megharịa ya na loops mechiri emechi. Na-ebelata ihe mkpofu, na-echekwa akụrụngwa, ma mepụta ọrụ.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp3: Usoro nri: ọrụ ugbo bụ ~ 25% nke ikuku griin haus zuru ụwa ọnụ. Mbelata oriri anụ (karịsịa anụ ehi), igbutu ihe mkpofu nri, na ịtụgharị gaa na ọrụ ugbo na-adigide (organic, agroforestry) bụ nnukwu ihe eji eme ihe.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp4: Ihe omume onye ọ bụla: akara ụkwụ carbon na-adịgasị iche nke ukwuu. Ịfefe, iri anụ, na ịnya ụgbọ ala mmanụ ụgbọala bụ nhọrọ mmadụ kacha enwe mmetụta. Mana mgbanwe usoro - amụma gọọmentị, omume ụlọ ọrụ, akụrụngwa - nwere mmetụta ka ukwuu.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_task: Jiri mgbako dị n'ịntanetị gbakọọ akara ukwu carbon gị kwa ọnwa. Chọpụta mmemme atọ kacha emetụta gị. Nyochaa ma tụọ otu mgbanwe nkeonwe yana otu mgbanwe usoro (ọchịchị ma ọ bụ amụma ụlọ ọrụ) nke ga-ebelata akara ukwu gị. Ugbu a: akara ukwu dị ugbu a, akara akara ebumnuche, na usoro iheomume.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_tp2: Usoro nri na onye vs. usoro ihe omume
learnUni_mathematics_f5_desc: Ntụle n'ezie bụ ntọala siri ike nke mgbako, na-egosipụta nsonaazụ gbasara oke, ịga n'ihu, ọdịiche, na njikọta site na iji nkọwa ε-δ ziri ezi. Ọ na-eji arụmụka ezi uche na-adịghị agwụ agwụ dochie echiche echiche - mgbanwe dị mkpa na ntozu mgbakọ na mwepụ chọrọ na ọkwa mahadum.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp0: ε-δ ókè: lim_{x→a} f(x) = L pụtara maka ε>0 ọ bụla nwere δ>0 dị ka 0<|x−a|<δ pụtara |f(x) -L|<ε. Nke a na-ewepụ mgbagwoju anya n'echiche nke 'ịbịaru nso'.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp1: Theorem Bolzano-Weierstrass: usoro ọ bụla nwere oke na ℝⁿ nwere ihe na-esochi ya. Heine-Borel: obere akụkụ nke ℝⁿ bụ kọmpat ma ọ bụrụ na emechiri ya na oke.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp2: Usoro uru dị n'etiti: ọ bụrụ na f na-aga n'ihu na [a,b] na f(a) na f (b) nwere akara ndị dị iche, enwere c ∈ (a,b) nwere f(c) = 0. Achọpụtara nke ọma site na izu oke nke ℝ.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp3: Ịga n'ihu n'otu: otu δ na-arụ ọrụ maka x niile n'otu oge - siri ike karịa ịga n'ihu n'ụzọ ziri ezi. Ọrụ ọ bụla na-aga n'ihu na nhazi kọmpat na-aga n'ihu n'otu n'otu.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp4: Riemann vs. Lebesgue integral: Lebesgue integral na-agbatị Riemann site n'ịtụ setịpụ (atụmatụ ihe) ma na-ejikwa ọrụ ndị ọzọ, gụnyere oke usoro.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_task: Iji nkọwa ε-δ, gosi na lim_{x→3} (2x−1) = 5. wee jiri IVT gosi na x⁵ - x - 1 = 0 nwere opekata mpe otu ezigbo ngwọta. Gopụta na f(x) = 1/x abụghị otu na-aga n'ihu na (0,1) mana ọ dị na [0.5, 2].
learnUni_mathematics_f6_desc: Abstract algebra na-akọwapụta ọrụ mgbakọ na mwepụ ka ọ bụrụ ihe a na-adịghị ahụkebe: otu (otu ọrụ), mgbanaka (arụmọrụ abụọ), na ubi (arụmọrụ abụọ nwere inverses). Nke a na-ejikọ mgbakọ na mwepụ dị iche iche ma na-akwado cryptography ọgbara ọhụrụ (mkpụrụgharị elliptik n'ofe mpaghara nwere oke) na physics (otu symmetry na physics particle).
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp0: Otu axioms: mmechi (a★b ∈ G), mkpakọrịta ((a★b)★c = a★(b★c)), njirimara (e★a = a), inverse (a★a⁻¹ = e). Ọmụmaatụ: (ℤ+), (ℚ\{0},×), otu dihedral Dₙ (symmetries nke n-gon).
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp1: Usoro ihe omume Lagrange: ọ bụrụ na H bụ otu obere nke otu G, yabụ |H | na-ekewa |G|. Nkọwa: usoro nke mmewere ọ bụla na-ekewa |G|. Otu obere ndị nkịtị na-enye ohere ka iwuo otu quotient G/N.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp2: Ozizi mgbanaka: (R+,×) ebe (R+) bụ otu abelian, × na-akpakọrịta na nkesa. Ngalaba jikọtara ọnụ (enweghị nkewa efu). Ideals na-achịkọta obere otu maka mgbanaka. Ngalaba kacha mma (PID): ezigbo mma ọ bụla sitere na otu mmewere.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp3: Ubi: ihe ọ bụla na-abụghị efu nwere ntụgharị ntụgharị. Ọmụmaatụ: ℚ, ℝ, ℂ, na oke ubi 𝔽_p = ℤ/pℤ (p prime). Ogige ndị nwere oke na-akwado nzuzo AES na koodu na-emezi mperi.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp4: Theory Galois: na-ejikọ mgbọrọgwụ nke polynomials na tiori otu. Otu Galois nke polynomial na-ejide akara ngosi nke mgbọrọgwụ ya. A na-edozi polynomial site na radicals ma ọ bụrụ na ndị otu Galois bụ otu nwere ike idozi - na-akọwa enweghị ike nke ogo≥5 nha nhata n'ozuzu.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_task: Gopụta na ℤ₆ n'okpuru mgbakwunye bụ otu. Chọta obere ndị otu niile wee chọpụta usoro ọmụmụ Lagrange. Gopụta ℤ₂×ℤ₃ ≅ ℤ₆ site n'igosipụta isomorphism doro anya. Mgbe ahụ gosi ℤ₂×ℤ₂ ≇ ℤ₄ site n'ịchọta ihe na-eme ka ha dị iche.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_desc: Nyocha mgbagwoju anya na-agbatị mgbakọ na mwepụ ruo ọrụ nke mgbanwe mgbagwoju anya. Ọrụ Holomorphic (mgbagwoju anya-iche) enweghị njedebe ma tinye ozi zuru ụwa ọnụ na data mpaghara. Usoro ihe omimi nke Cauchy, mgbako foduru, na eserese ngosi na-eme ka ọ dị ike n'ofe physics, injinia, na tiori nọmba.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp0: Ọdịiche mgbagwoju anya: f'(z) = lim_{h→0} [f(z+h) -f(z)]/h (h ∈ ℂ). Cauchy-Riemann nha nha: ọ bụrụ f = u+iv bụ holomorphic mgbe ahụ ∂u/∂x = ∂v/∂y na ∂u/∂y = -∂v/∂x.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp1: Cauchy's integral theorem: maka holomorphic f n'ime na na contour dị mfe mechiri emechi C, ∮_C f(z) dz = 0. Usoro Cauchy: f(z₀) = (1/2πi) ∮_C f(z)/(z−z₀) dz.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp2: Usoro Taylor na Laurent: ọrụ holomorphic na-agbasa dị ka usoro ike. Usoro Laurent na-enye ohere ike na-adịghị mma - dị mkpa na nso nso dịpụrụ adịpụ (osisi, mkpa dị mkpa).
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp3: Theorem fọdụrụnụ: ∮_C f(z) dz = 2πi × Σ Res(f, zₖ) maka mkpanaka niile zₖ n'ime C. Residue na mfe pole z₀: Res = lim_{z→z₀} (z−z₀) f(z). A na-eji iji nyochaa ezigbo integrals site na nhọrọ contour nkọ.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp4: Mappings conformal: ọrụ holomorphic nwere akụkụ nchekwa na-abụghị efu na mpaghara. Möbius na-agbanwe maapụ okirikiri/akara gaa okirikiri/akara. A na-eji ya na mgbanwe mmiri, electrostatics, na cartography.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_task: Nyochaa f(z)=z² bụ holomorphic site na nha anya Cauchy-Riemann. Gbakọọ ∮_{|z|=2} dz/(z²−1) site n'iji usoro ihe fọdụrụnụ: chọta okporo osisi, lelee nke dị n'ime |z|=2, gbakọọ ihe fọdụrụ, wee tinye usoro mmụta ahụ. Nyochaa site na nkeji irighiri ihe.
learnUni_physics_f2_desc: Nha nhata Maxwell na-ejikọta ọkụ eletrik, magnetism, na optics ka ọ bụrụ otu ụkpụrụ mara mma. Ha na-ebu amụma ebili mmiri electromagnetic na-aga na c, kọwaa radieshon, wee bụrụ ntọala nke injinịa eletrik niile. Ịghọta ha n'ọkwa mgbako vector bụ akara ngosi nke mmụta physics.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp0: Nhata Maxwell: ∇·E = ρ/ε₀, ∇·B = 0, ∇×E = -∂B/∂t, ∇×B = μ₀(J + ε₀∂E/∂t). Ha na-ejikọta ihe niile oge gboo electromagnetic phenomena.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp1: Electromagnetic ebili mmiri: na free ohere, E na B na-eju ∇²E = μ₀ε₀∂²E/∂t², na-enye ife efe ọsọ c = 1/√(μ₀ε₀) ≈ 3×10⁸ m/s. Ìhè bụ ebili mmiri electromagnetic.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp2: Ntugharị vector S = (1/μ₀) E×B: ntụziaka na ọnụego nke ike eletrik. Nrụgide radieshon: Ebili mmiri EM na-ebu ọkụ p = U/c.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp3: Ọnọdụ ókèala na oghere ihe: tangential E na nkịtị B na-aga n'ihu. Na-ekpebi ntụgharị uche na ntụgharị ( Fresnel equations na-enye amplitudes; Iwu Snell na-enye akụkụ).
learnUni_physics_f2_kp4: Mgbasawanye ọtụtụ: n'ebe dị anya site na nkesa ụgwọ, a na-achịkwa mpaghara site na usoro nchịkwa - monopole (1/r²), dipole (1/r³), quadrupole (1/r⁴). Oscillating dipoles na-amụba EM ebili mmiri - ndabere nke antennas.
learnUni_physics_f2_task: Malite site na nha nha Maxwell na oghere (ρ=0, J=0), wepụta nha nhata ebili mmiri maka E. Gosi c = 1/√(μ₀ε₀). Wee dee ubi maka ụgbọ elu na-efegharị efegharị na ntụzịaka z wee gosi na E, B, na k bụ ibe ha na |E|/|B| = c.
learnUni_physics_f2_tp1: EM ebili mmiri na Poynting vector
learnUni_physics_f3_desc: Mechanics statistical na-enweta thermodynamics macroscopic site na omume ndekọ ọnụ ọgụgụ nke ihe ndị na-ahụ anya. Nkesa Boltzmann, ọrụ nkebi, na entropy dị ka log nke microstates jikọtara physics atọm na ihe ndị na-ekpo ọkụ kwa ụbọchị - site na radieshon anụ ahụ ruo na ntụgharị oge.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp0: Nkesa Boltzmann: ihe gbasara ike nke microstate na ike E bụ P ∝ e^{-E/k_BT}. Okpomọkụ dị elu na-enye ohere ịrụ ọrụ steeti ike dị elu. Otu nha nhata a dabere na kemistri, astrophysics, na bayoloji.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp1: Ọrụ nkebi Z = Σᵢ e^{-βEᵢ} (β=1/k_BT). Ike efu F = -k_BT ln Z. Ọnụ ọgụgụ thermodynamic niile na-eso: ⟨E⟩ = -∂ln Z/∂β, entropy S = -∂F/∂T, nrụgide P = -∂F/∂V.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp2: Boltzmann entropy: S = k_B ln Ω (Ω = ọnụọgụ microstates). Iwu nke abụọ: Ω na-abawanye ozugbo → S na-abawanye na sistemụ ndị dịpụrụ adịpụ. Akụ oge na-apụta site na ọnụ ọgụgụ.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp3: Ọnụọgụ ọnụọgụgụ: bosons na-erube isi na nkesa Bose-Einstein (ọtụtụ irighiri ihe n'otu steeti → superfluidity, lasers, Bose-Einstein condensate). Fermions na-erube isi Fermi-Dirac (otu steeti → usoro elektrọn nke ọla, dwarfs ọcha, kpakpando neutron).
learnUni_physics_f3_kp4: Mgbanwe nke usoro: na okpomọkụ dị oke egwu Tc, ịtụ oke ihe nfe (usoro nke mbụ) ma ọ bụ na-ebili na-aga n'ihu (usoro nke abụọ). Ihe nlereanya ising na-ejide feromagnetism. Ebe dị egwu dị nso: iwu nlegharị anya zuru ụwa ọnụ, ogologo mmekọrịta dị iche iche, klaasị ụwa niile.
learnUni_physics_f3_task: Nweta ọrụ nkebi maka usoro ọkwa abụọ (ike 0 na ε). Chọta ⟨E⟩, C_V = ∂⟨E⟩/∂T, na entropy S. Sketch C_V vs. T (Schottky peak). Tụgharịa ọnụ ọgụgụ kasị elu n'anụ ahụ. Tinye ihe kpatara Boltzmann iji tụọ akụkụ dị nta nke ụmụ irighiri ihe na steeti obi ụtọ na T = 300 K ma ọ bụrụ ε = 0.025 eV.
learnUni_physics_f3_tp2: Ọnụọgụ ọnụọgụgụ na mgbanwe nke usoro
learnUni_physics_f4_name: Mechanics nke Quantum || Mechanics nke Quantum bụ usoro anụ ahụ anwalela nke ọma, ziri ezi ruo ebe iri na abụọ na amụma QED. Ọ na-eji ọrụ ebili mmiri na-agbanwe n'okpuru nhazi Schrödinger ma kọwaa atọm, molecules, lasers, semiconductors, na MRI scanners. Ọ dịkwa mgbagwoju anya na nkà ihe ọmụma.
learnUni_physics_f4_desc: Wavefunction ψ(x,t): |ψ|² bụ njupụta nke puru omume. Normalisation: ∫|ψ|² dx = 1. Oge mgbanwe: iℏ ∂ψ/∂t = Ĥψ. Steeti ọdụ: Ĥψ_n = E_n ψ_n — ike eigenstates.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp0: Mkpịsị aka na-enweghị ngwụcha: ψ_n = √(2/L) sin(nπx/L), E_n = n²π²ℏ²/(2mL²). Ọnụọgụ ike dị iche iche - na-akọwa ụdị dị iche iche nke atọm. Ike efu E₁> 0 ọbụlagodi na T=0.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp1: Quantum harmonic oscillator: E_n = (n+½)ℏω, n=0,1,2,... Ndị ọrụ na-ebuli/eweda ala â±. Ala ala nwere ọrụ ebili mmiri Gaussian. Model molecular vibrations na ubi quanta.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp2: Atọm hydrogen: ikike nke Coulomb symmetric gbara okirikiri. Ngwọta akpọrọ site na quantum nọmba n (ike), l (angular momentum), m (magnetic). Ụdị orbital (s, p, d, f) na-ekpebi njikọ nke kemịkal.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp3: Entanglement na Bell's theorem: enwere ike ijikọta irighiri irighiri ihe n'uzo na-enweghị ike ịkọwa ya site na mgbanwe zoro ezo nke mpaghara. Emebighị ahaghị nhata mgbịrịgba na nnwale - na-egosi na anọghị n'ebe arụ ọrụ quantum. Ndabere maka quantum cryptography.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp4: Dozie square na-enweghị ngwụcha nke ọma: dee ψ_n na E_n. Gbakọọ E₁ maka eletrọn na L = 1 nm nke ọma. A na-akwado urughuru na ψ = (1/√2)(ψ₁ + ψ₂). (a) Nke a ọ bụ ike eigenstate? (b) Gbakọọ ⟨E⟩. (c) Kọwaa otu ⟨x⟩ si esi n'oge. (d) Kọwaa ihe na-eme mgbe ị tụrụ ike.
learnUni_physics_f5_name: Ngwa anya ọgbara ọhụrụ na-emeso ọkụ ma dị ka ebili mmiri electromagnetic (wave optics) yana dị ka foton (quantum optics). Wave optics na-akọwa ndabichi, diffraction, na polarization kpomkwem. Photonics - sayensị na teknụzụ nke ọgbọ na njikwa foton - na-akwado lasers, eriri anya, mkpụrụ ndụ anyanwụ, na teknụzụ quantum na-apụta.
learnUni_physics_f5_desc: Wave optics: nnyonye anya na diffraction na-esite na ụkpụrụ Huygens-Fresnel (akụkụ ọ bụla nke ihu ebili mmiri bụ isi mmalite nke abụọ). Mgbawa okpukpu abụọ na-eto eto na-enye oghere ọnụ ọnụ Δy = λL/d.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp0: Igwe anya Fourier: oghere na-eme mgbanwe Fourier n'ime ụgbọ elu focal. Nchacha oghere - igbochi ụfọdụ ugboro oghere - bụ ihe ndabere nke nhazi onyonyo na nyocha.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp1: Laser physics: ntughari onu ogugu mmadu enwetara site na nfuli anya ma obu eletriki. Mgbatị na-akpali akpali na-emepụta ihe jikọrọ ọnụ, monochromatic, ìhè ntụzịaka. Cavities laser họrọ ụdịdị. Ngwa: ịwa ahụ, lidar, tweezers anya, nyocha koodu.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp2: Fiber optical: mkpokọta ntule dị n'ime (akuku> akụkụ dị egwu θ_c = arcsin(n₂/n₁)) na-ejide ọkụ n'ime isi. eriri otu ụdị maka nkwukọrịta ogologo oge; multi-mode maka obere anya. Attenuation ~ 0.2 dB / km na 1550 nm.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp3: Quantum optics: ọnụ ọgụgụ foton (nke na-ejikọta ọnụ vs. thermal vs. squeezed light), isi mmalite foto otu, foton abụọ gbakọrọ agbakịrị (site na ngbanwe parametric na-apụtaghị ìhè). Ngwa: nkesa igodo quantum (BB84 protocol), quantum teleportation.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp4: A na-amụnye grating diffraction nwere ahịrị 500/mm site n'ìhè nke λ=600 nm. Chọta akụkụ maka m=1 na m=2 iwu diffraction. Gbakọọ ike nrụpụta R = mN maka N = ahịrị 1000. Wee chepụta eriri anya nwere isi n₁=1.50 yana mkpuchi n₂=1.45: chọta akụkụ dị oke egwu na oghere ọnụọgụ NA = √(n₁²−n₂²).
learnUni_physics_f5_task: A diffraction grating with 500 lines/mm is illuminated by light of λ=600 nm. Find the angles for m=1 and m=2 diffraction orders. Calculate the resolving power R = mN for N = 1000 lines. Then design an optical fibre with core n₁=1.50 and cladding n₂=1.45: find the critical angle and the numerical aperture NA = √(n₁²−n₂²).
learnUni_chemistry_f0_desc: Kemistri anụ ahụ na-emetụta physics — thermodynamics, kinetics, mechanics quantum — na sistemu kemịkalụ. Ọ na-akọwa ihe kpatara mmeghachi omume ji eme (thermodynamics), otú ha si na-aga ngwa ngwa (kinetics), na ihe na-ekpebi nhazi molecular (quantum chemistry). Ọ bụ ọkpụkpụ azụ nke usoro chemistry niile.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp0: Gibbs ike efu: ΔG = ΔH - TΔS. ΔG <0: na mberede; ΔG> 0: na-abụghị nke onwe; ΔG = 0: nha nhata. Na nha nha: ΔG° = -RT ln K.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp1: Chemical kinetics: ọnụego = k[A]ᵐ[B]ⁿ. Iwu mbụ: t₁/₂ = ln2/k. Arrhenius nhata: k = Ae^ {-Ea/RT}. Ozizi steeti mgbanwe: ọnụego kpebiri site na ΔG‡ (Gibbs ike nke ọnọdụ mgbanwe).
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp2: Molecular orbital theory: atomic orbitals jikọtara (LCAO) iji mepụta njikọ (ike dị ala) na mgbochi (ike dị elu) MO. Usoro nkwekọrịta = ½ (njikọ - ihe na-egbochi electrons).
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp3: Spectroscopy: UV-Vis (Beer-Lambert: A = εcl, eletrọnịkị ntụgharị), IR (molecular vibrations — functional group fingerprints), NMR (nkụkụ okirikiri nuklia na-enye njikọta na stereochemistry), uka spec (molecular mass and fragmentation).
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp4: Ihe ndị na-emekọrịta ihe (dabere na ọnụ ọgụgụ nke solute ahụ, ọ bụghị njirimara): ebe elu na-esi ísì ụtọ (ΔT_b = K_b m), ịda mbà n'obi na-ekpo ọkụ (ΔT_f = K_f m), nrụgide osmotic (Π = MRT). A na-eji ya na cryoscopy na osmometry.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_task: Maka mmeghachi omume N₂ + 3H₂ → 2NH₃ na 298 K, ΔH ° = -92 kJ / mol na ΔS ° = -198 J/mol·K. (a) Gbakọọ ΔG ° na K. (b) Mmeghachi omume ahụ ọ na-apụta na 298 K? Na 600K? (c) Kọwaa otú okpomọkụ na nrụgide si emetụta mkpụrụ n'ime usoro Haber. Dakọtara na ụkpụrụ Le Chatelier.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_tp0: Gibbs ike efu na nha nha
learnUni_chemistry_f1_desc: Mahadum organic chemistry na-amụ usoro mmeghachi omume na ọkwa eletrọn, stereochemistry, nhazi nhazi, na mgbanwe otu ọrụ. Nkà mmụta dị mkpa maka nkà mmụta ọgwụ, sayensị ihe, biochemistry, na bayoloji kemịkal.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp0: Akụ na-agbagọ agbagọ: akụ ndị nwere isi zuru oke na-egosi mmegharị ụzọ abụọ eletrọn (nucleophile ruo electrophile). Àkú nwere isi ọkara na-egosi usoro dị iche iche. Àkụ́ ọ bụla ga-esi n'ebe eletrọn nweta malite (otu ụzọ ma ọ bụ nkekọ).
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp1: Usoro SN2: Mwakpo otu nzọụkwụ azụ azụ → ntụgharị nke nhazi (Ntugharị Walden). Ọkachamara: nucleophile siri ike, mkpụrụ mbụ, ihe mgbaze polar aprotic (DMF, DMSO, acetone).
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp2: Usoro SN1: nzọụkwụ abụọ site na etiti carbocation. Ọkachamara: mkpụrụ nke atọ, ihe mgbaze polar protic (mmiri, ethanol). Ọnụego = k[mkpụrụedemede] naanị. Na-enye ịgba ọsọ.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp3: Stereochemistry: ụlọ ọrụ chiral, enantiomers, diastereomers. Iwu Cahn-Ingold-Prelog (CIP) na-ekenye nhazi R/S. Arụ ọrụ anya site na polarimetry. Thalidomide: R-enantiomer therapeutic, S-enantiomer teratogenic - mkpa nke ịdị ọcha stereochemical.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp4: Nyochaa retrosynthetic (Corey): nhazi atụmatụ azụ azụ - chọpụta nkwụsị (nkewa isi ihe) iji kpughee ihe mmalite dị ngwa ngwa. Ichedo atụmatụ otu, mkparịta ụka otu na-arụ ọrụ, na nsochi steeti oxidation bụ nka bụ isi.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_task: Tụpụta usoro zuru oke na akụ na-atụgharị maka: (a) mmeghachi omume SN2 nke (R) -2-bromobutane na NaOH - gosi nhazi ngwaahịa, (b) mmeghachi omume SN1 nke (CH₃) ₃CBr na mmiri - gosi carbocation, racemisation, na ma stereoisomers nke ngwaahịa ahụ. Kọwaa ihe kpatara na otu mkpụrụ osisi enweghị ike ịme usoro abụọ a n'otu oge.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_tp0: Usoro mmeghachi omume na akụ na-agbagọ
learnUni_chemistry_f2_desc: Kemistri inorganic gụnyere kemịkalụ nhazi, organometallics, ihe steeti siri ike, na kemịlụ bioinorganic. Ọla mgbanwe na kemịkalụ d-orbital ha bara ụba na-ebute catalysis ụlọ ọrụ mmepụta ihe, ihe ndị na-arụ ọrụ na usoro ndu dị mkpa.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp0: Ọgbakọ nhazi: Central metal ion + ligands (Lewis bases na-enye ụzọ abụọ elektrọn). Mmetụta chelate: polydentate ligands (EDTA) na-etolite ogige kwụsiri ike karịa ndị monodentate - uru thermodynamic sitere na entropy.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp1: Echiche kristal (CFT): d-orbitals kewara n'ubi ligand. Octahedral nkewa Δ_o na-ekewa t₂g (nke dị ala) na e_g (nke dị elu). Njikọ ubi siri ike (CN⁻, CO) → nnukwu Δ_o → obere ntụgharị. Ogige adịghị ike (F⁻, H₂O) → obere Δ_o → ọkpụkpụ dị elu.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp2: Agba na magnetism sitere na CFT: ntụgharị d-d na-amịkọrọ ìhè a na-ahụ anya → agba agba agbakwunyere hụrụ. Ihe mgbagwoju anya dị elu bụ paramagnetic (electrons na-ejikọtaghị ọnụ); Obere-spin bụ diamagnetic.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp3: Kemistri nke Organometallic: Njikọ carbon-carbon (metal carbonyls M (CO)ₙ, metallocenes, ihe na-eme ka Wilkinson [RhCl (PPh₃)₃] maka hydrogenation). Iwu 18-electron na-ebu amụma nkwụsi ike nke ogige organometallic.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp4: Bioinorganic kemịkalụ: Fe na hemoglobin (o₂ na-agbanwe agbanwe), ụyọkọ Fe-S (nfefe elektrọn), Zn na carbonic anhydrase, mg na chlorophyll (photosynthesis), Cu na cytochrome c oxidase (respiration), Co na vitamin B₁₁.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_task: See eserese octahedral nkewa maka [Fe(CN)₆]³⁻ na [Fe(H₂O)₆]³⁺. Kenye eletrọnị site na iji CFT, chọpụta steeti ntụgharị na ọnụọgụ elektrọn na-ejikọghị ọnụ maka nke ọ bụla. Buru amụma nke na-etinye ọkụ dị elu na ihe kpatara ya. Gbakọọ ọnọdụ oxidation nke Fe na mgbagwoju ọ bụla wee chọpụta ligands dị ka ebe siri ike ma ọ bụ adịghị ike site na iji usoro spectrochemical.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_desc: Analytical chemistry na-enye ngwaọrụ iji chọpụta ihe ma tụọ mkpokọta ha na matrices dị mgbagwoju anya. Usoro nyocha ọgbara ọhụrụ - HPLC, GC-MS, NMR, nnabata atọm - dị mkpa n'ofe ọgwụ, nleba anya gburugburu ebe obibi, nchekwa nri, nyocha nyocha, na nyocha ụlọ ọgwụ.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp0: Nyocha titrimetric: acid-base, complexometric (EDTA), redox, na titrations nke ọdịda. Nchọpụta njedebe: ihe ngosi, mita pH, conductimetry, potentiometry. Ngwọta ọkọlọtọ, ụkpụrụ ndị mbụ, na azụ-titration.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp1: Chromatography: akụkụ kwụ ọtọ na-eweghachi akụkụ dị iche iche. GC (nyocha na-agbanwe agbanwe, nchọpụta okpomọkụ), HPLC (na-adịghị agbanwe agbanwe, UV / fluorescence / MS nchọpụta), IC (ion mgbanwe), SFC (oke mmiri mmiri). Mkpebi R = 2 (t₂-t₁)/(w₁+w₂).
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp2: Mass spectrometry: eletrọn ionization (EI) na-emepụta cations na-egbuke egbuke nke na-agbaji n'ụzọ mara mma. MS dị elu na-enye usoro mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nke ọma. LC-MS/MS na-enye nhọrọ maka matrices dị mgbagwoju anya.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp3: Nchọpụta NMR: ¹H NMR: mgbanwe kemịkalụ (δ, ppm) na-egosi gburugburu ebe obibi, njikọta (J, Hz) na-egosi njikọta H dị n'akụkụ, njikọta na-enye oke ụdị H. ¹³C NMR na usoro 2D (COSY, HMBC, NOESY) na-ekpebi nhazi 3D zuru oke.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp4: Usoro nkwado: njedebe nke nchọpụta (LOD), njedebe nke quantification (LOQ), linearity (R²), izi ezi (% mgbake), nkenke (RSD%), nhọrọ (enweghị nnyonye anya), ike (nke a na-emegharị n'ofe ụlọ nyocha). Achọrọ maka ntinye usoro iwu (FDA, EMA).
learnUni_chemistry_f3_task: Ngwakọta organic amaghi ama na-egosi: MW = 122 nke MS; IR: OH sara mbara 3200–3500, carbonyl 1680 cm⁻¹; ¹H NMR: δ 7.8 (d, 2H), 7.5 (d, 2H), 3.9 (s, 3H). Tụpụta usoro. Kpebie ihe nlele ọ bụla spectroscopic. Mgbe ahụ kọwapụta otu ị ga-esi kwado usoro HPLC iji wepụta mkpokọta a na mbadamba ọgwụ.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_tp1: Mass spectrometry na NMR || Usoro nkwado
learnUni_chemistry_f4_name: Biochemistry na-amụ usoro kemịkalụ nke ndụ - catalysis enzyme, ụzọ metabolic, mmegharị DNA, na akara cell. Ọ na-ejikọta kemịkalụ na ọgwụ: ịghọta enzyme kinetics na-enyere aka imepụta ọgwụ; nghọta metabolism na-ekpughe ebumnuche maka ịgwọ ọrịa shuga, kansa, na oke ibu; Biochemistry DNA na-akwado ndezi mkpụrụ ndụ CRISPR.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_desc: Enzyme kinetics: Michaelis-Menten equation v = Vmax[S]/(Km+[S]). Km: itinye uche nke mkpụrụ na ọkara kacha ọsọ - na-egosipụta njikọ nke mkpụrụ enzyme. Vmax: ọnụ ọgụgụ kacha elu na ntinye saturating. Lineweaver-Burk kpara nkata (1/v vs. 1/[S]).
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp0: Mgbochi Enzyme: asọmpi (onye na-eme ihe na-ejikọta saịtị na-arụ ọrụ, na-abawanye Km, Vmax na-agbanweghị agbanwe); ndị na-abụghị asọmpi (onye na-emechi ihe na-ejikọta ebe ọzọ, na-ebelata Vmax, km agbanweghị); enweghị ike ịgbagha (covalent - aspirin acetylates COX na-adịgide adịgide).
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp1: Metabolism: catabolism (glucose → 2 pyruvate site na glycolysis, 2 ATP; Krebs okirikiri 2 ATP; phosphorylation oxidative ~ 32 ATP site na proton gradient gafee n'ime mitochondrial membrane). Ngụkọta ≈36 ATP kwa glucose.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp2: Biochemistry DNA: helix okpukpu abụọ kwadoro site na njikọta ntọala Watson-Crick (A:T, G:C) na nchịkọta ntọala (π-π mmekọrịta). Ngbanwe DNA nke ọkara-conservative: DNA polymerase na-agbakwunye 5'→3', chọrọ primer (RNA). Ọnụego mperi ~ 1 n'ime 10⁹ ka ịgụgharịchara ya.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp3: Ọdịdị protein na mpịachi: isi (usoro amino acid) → nke abụọ (α-helix: H-bonds i to i +4; β-sheet: parallel or anti-parallel strands) → tertiary (3D fold, hydrophobic collapse) → quaternary (ọtụtụ subunits). Chaperones na-enyere mpịachi; na-akpata ọrịa (ọrịa Parkinson, Alzheimer, prion).
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp4: Enzyme nwere km = 2 mM na Vmax = 60 μmol / min. (a) Gbakọọ v na [S] = 1, 2, 6 mM. (b) Dọrọ Michaelis-Menten na Lineweaver-Burk atụmatụ maka steeti egbochighị ya na asọmpi asọmpi (onye na-egbochi okpukpu abụọ pụtara Km). (c) Nhazi ọgwụ: tụpụta ka ịmara geometry saịtị na-arụ ọrụ nke enzyme nwere ike isi duzie nhazi nke ihe mgbochi analog steeti.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_tp0: Metabolism na mmepụta ATP || DNA na usoro protein || Ecology & bayoloji nchekwa
learnUni_chemistry_f4_tp1: Nkà mmụta ihe ọmụmụ nke mahadum na-emetụta ụdị ọnụọgụgụ maka mgbanwe ndị mmadụ, mmekọrịta ụdịrị, na ọrụ gburugburu ebe obibi. bayoloji nchekwa nchekwa na-eji echiche gburugburu ebe obibi - kacha nta nwere ike ime mmadụ, imewe nchekwa, ihe gbasara gburugburu ebe obibi - iji chebe ụdị ndụ dị iche iche n'ụwa na-enwe mgbanwe gburugburu ebe obibi ngwa ngwa.
learnUni_biology_f2_desc: University ecology applies quantitative models to population dynamics, species interactions, and ecosystem function. Conservation biology uses ecological theory — minimum viable populations, reserve design, corridor ecology — to protect biodiversity in a world undergoing rapid environmental change.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp0: Ụdị ọnụ ọgụgụ mmadụ: uto logistic dN/dt = rN(1-N/K) ebe r bụ ọnụọgụ mmụba na K na-ebu ikike. Oke mkpụrụ na-adigide (MSY) na N = K/2 ebe dN/dt kacha.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp1: Ụdị anụ anụ Lotka-Volterra: dN/dt = rN-aNP (na-eri anụ); dP/dt = baNP-mP (onye na-eri anụ). Ndị mmadụ na-emegharị cyclically - nke data hare-lynx gosipụtara. Nyocha nkwụsi ike site na eigenvalues ​​nke Jacobian.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp2: Biogeography Island (MacArthur & Wilson): S_eq sitere na nguzozi nke mbata na ọpụpụ (na-ebelata na S) na mkpochapụ (na-abawanye na S). Agwaetiti buru ibu, nke dị nso nwere ụbara ụdị dị elu → Arụmụka SLOSS n'ime nhazi nchekwa.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp3: Echiche Metapopulation (Levin): netwọk nke ndị obodo jikọtara site na mgbasa. Mpempe mpe mpe mpe akwa p na-etolite: dp/dt = cp(1-p) - ep. Ihe nkpuchi dị mkpa n'okpuru ebe mkpochapụ zuru ụwa ọnụ bụ ihe a na-apụghị izere ezere.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp4: Genomics nchekwa: ngwaọrụ mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa ọnụ ọgụgụ mmadụ (FST, nha ọnụ ọgụgụ dị irè nke Ne, ọnụọgụ inbreeding F) na-achọpụta ọnụọgụ mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa dị iche iche, tụọ usoro mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa, na chọpụta ịda mbà n'obi na-amụba n'ime mmemme ịmụ nwa.
learnUni_biology_f2_task: A na-egbute ọnụ ọgụgụ ndị wolves 200 (K=1000, r=0.3/yr) kwa afọ. (a) Gbakọọ ọnụ ọgụgụ ndị mmadụ na N=200 yana na MSY. (b) Olee ihe ubi kwa afọ hà nhata nke uto na MSY? (c) Ọnụ ọgụgụ nke abụọ n'agwaetiti gbara agbata obi nwere Ne=15 - ihe egwu dị aṅaa ka nke a na-eche ihu, oleekwa ihe nchebe kwesịrị ekwesị?
learnUni_biology_f2_tp1: Ihe na-eme ka onye na-eri anụ na-eri anụ na-eme ihe
learnUni_biology_f3_desc: Usoro ihe ọmụmụ mkpụrụ ndụ na ọkwa mahadum na-enyocha ntụgharị mgbaàmà, okirikiri cell, epigenetics, na usoro mkpụrụ ndụ nke ọrịa. Usoro ihe omimi ihe omimi nke oge a - PCR, gene cloning, RNA-seq, CRISPR - na-enye ngwaọrụ iji gụọ, dee na dezie mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa. Teknụzụ ndị a na-agbanwe ọgwụ, ọrụ ugbo na sayensị bụ isi.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp0: Usoro okirikiri cell: cyclins na CDK (kinases na-adabere na cyclin) na-eme mgbanwe mgbanwe nke cell. Ndị na-egbochi CDK (p21, p27) na-eme ka breeki. Rb tumor suppressor sequesters E2F ihe ntụgharị ederede ruo mgbe phosphorylated sitere na Cyclin D-CDK4/6.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp1: Ụzọ ntụgharị mgbaàmà: RTK (na-anabata tyrosine kinase) ịgbalite → RAS/MAPK cascade → ihe odide ederede phosphorylation → mgbanwe mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa. Ụzọ PI3K/Akt/mTOR: uto na nlanarị. Ha abụọ na-agbanwekarị na ọrịa kansa.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp2: Epigenetics: mgbanwe eketa na mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa na-enweghị mgbanwe usoro DNA. Mgbanwe nke nkume (acetylation - arụ ọrụ; methylation - dabere na ọnọdụ), DNA methylation (CpG methylation silences genes), chromatin remodelling. Epigenetic reprogramming na embryogenesis na ọrịa kansa.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp3: RNA bayoloji: splicing (spliceosomes na-ewepụ introns), splicing ọzọ (otu mkpụrụ ndụ → ọtụtụ protein - ~ 95% nke mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa mmadụ bụ nke ọzọ spliced), RNA na-abụghị koodu (miRNA silences mRNA, lncRNA na-achịkwa chromatin), ribozymes.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp4: CRISPR-Cas9: ntuziaka RNA na-eduzi Cas9 ka ọ bụrụ usoro ebumnuche (n'akụkụ usoro PAM). Cas9 na-agbaji eriri abụọ ahụ. Ndozi site na NHEJ (njehie-adịkarị mfe → knockout) ma ọ bụ HDR (ụdị → ndezi ziri ezi). Ngwa: usoro ọgwụgwọ mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa, ọrụ ugbo, nchọpụta bụ isi, nchọpụta nchọpụta.
learnUni_biology_f3_task: Mkpụrụ ndụ kansa nwere: (1) mgbanwe RAS na-arụ ọrụ nke ọma, (2) ehichapụ Rb gene, (3) ngbanwe p53. Chọpụta nsonaazụ molekụla nke mmụgharị ọ bụla site na okirikiri cell na ụzọ mgbama. Chọpụta: kedu ebe nlele na-ada nke ọ bụla, ihe ga-esi na ya pụta maka mmụba cell, yana usoro ọgwụgwọ abụọ na-eche ntụpọ ndị a.
learnUni_biology_f4_desc: Neuroscience bridges molecular bayology, physiology, and psychology iji kọwaa ka ụbụrụ si ewepụta omume. Site na ọwa ion ruo sekit akwara ruo na nsụhọ, ọ bụ otu n'ime oke mgbagwoju anya na nke na-atọ ụtọ na bayoloji. Ọrịa akwara na-emetụta 1 n'ime mmadụ 6 n'ụwa niile - ịghọta ha chọrọ ihe ọmụma miri emi nke usoro na ọrụ ụbụrụ.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp0: Ikike ime ihe: mbelata ọnụ ụzọ na-emepe chanel Na⁺ voltaji-gated (ngwa ngwa depolarisation na +40 mV) → inactivation nke Na⁺ ọwa + oghere nke K⁺ ọwa (repolarisation) → hyperpolarisation (oge refractory). All-ma ọ bụ ihe ọ bụla, na-agbasa na-enweghị decrement tinyere axon.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp1: Mbufe synapti: Ca²⁺ mbubata na-akpalite SNARE-mediated vesicle fusion → mwepụta neurotransmitter → njikọ nnabata postsynapti. Ndị na-anabata ionotropic (AMPA, GABA_A): ion ion ngwa ngwa. Ndị na-anabata metabotropic (mGluR, β-adrenergic): ngwa ngwa G-protein cascades.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp2: Plasticity Synaptic: LTP (ike ogologo oge) - NMDA onye na-achọpụta ihe na-anabata ihe (chọrọ ma glutamate njikọ na postsynaptic depolarisation) → ntinye nnabata AMPA → ike synapti. Ndabere nke molikula nke mmụta na ebe nchekwa.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp3: Sekit akwara ozi: excitatory (glutamatergic) na inhibitory (GABAergic) neurons na-etolite sekit ugboro ugboro. E/I itule: nkwụsịtụ na-akpata Akwụkwụ na-adọ (oke mkpali) ma ọ bụ anesthesia (mgbochi oke). Oscillations (theta, gamma) na-etinye ozi ma mekọrịta mpaghara ụbụrụ.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp4: Usoro ọrịa akwara ozi: Alzheimer's (amyloid-β plaques na-akpaghasị nnyefe synaptic; tau hyperphosphorylation destabilises microtubules → neuronal death), Parkinson's (dopaminergic neuron loss in substantia nigra; α-synuclein Lewy ozu), Huntington's (polyglutaminestriction na neurodeng protein na-achụ nta).
learnUni_biology_f4_task: Ị na-edekọ site na neuron hippocampal. Ihe mkpali dị elu nke neuron presynaptic na-akpata LTP. Kọwaa ihe omume ahụ site na nzọụkwụ site na nzọụkwụ: NMDA nnabata nnabata, akara ngosi Ca²⁺, ịgbalite CaMKII, phosphorylation na ntinye AMPA nnabata, yana mgbanwe nhazi ogologo oge. Mgbe ahụ kọwaa ihe kpatara igbochi NMDA nnabata na-egbochi nhazi LTP.
learnUni_biology_f4_tp1: Synaptic plasticity na LTP || Sekit akwara ozi na ọrịa akwara ozi
learnUni_biology_f5_name: Immunology bụ ọmụmụ nke usoro nchekwa ahụ. Usoro ahụ ji alụso ọrịa ọgụ na-akpapụ onwe onye na ndị na-abụghị nke onwe ya, na-ebibi nje na-akpata ọrịa na mkpụrụ ndụ kansa, na-emepụta ebe nchekwa immunological. Dysregulation na-akpata ọrịa autoimmune, allergies, na immunodeficiency. Immunotherapies ọgbara ọhụrụ - ndị na-egbochi ebe nlele, mkpụrụ ndụ CAR-T, ọgwụ mgbochi mRNA - na-agbanwe ọgwụ.
learnUni_biology_f5_desc: Mgbochi ebumpụta ụwa: ndị na-anabata ụkpụrụ (PRRs, dịka ndị na-anabata ihe dị ka Toll) na-achọpụta ụkpụrụ molekụla metụtara pathogen (PAMPs). Mee NF-κB → cytokines na-egbuke egbuke (IL-6, TNF-α, IL-1β). Mezue cascade opsonises na lyses pathogens.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp0: Mgbochi na-agbanwe agbanwe: sel ndị na-eweta antigen (sel dendritic, macrophages) na-ahazi antigens na ugbu a peptides na MHC I (na CD8⁺ cytotoxic T cell) ma ọ bụ MHC II (na CD4⁺ sel enyemaka T). Nhọrọ nke clonal na mgbasawanye nke lymphocytes kpọmkwem antigen.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp1: Mgbochi B cell na mgbochi nje: T-adabere na-arụ ọrụ chọrọ mkpụrụ ndụ T inyeaka (CD40L-CD40 mmekọrịta + cytokines). Mmeghachi omume etiti Germinal: hypermutation somatic + affinity maturation + mgbanwe klas (IgM → IgG, IgA, IgE). Selụ ebe nchekwa B na-adịgide ruo ọtụtụ iri afọ.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp2: Mgbochi mgbochi na autoimmunity: Central ndidi - autoreactive T cell ehichapụ na thymus (nhọrọ na-adịghị mma). Mkpebi ndidi - sel T regulatory (Tregs) na-egbochi sel autoreactive. Ọdịda: lupus erythematosus systemic, ọrịa ogbu na nkwonkwo, ụdị ọrịa shuga 1.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp3: Immunotherapy nke ọrịa cancer: PD-1/PD-L1 ndị na-eme ihe nleba anya na-egbochi mgbochi mgbochi tumor → T cell reactivation (pembrolizumab, nivolumab - Nobel Prize 2018). Ọgwụgwọ mkpụrụ ndụ CAR-T: sel T onye ọrịa injinia nwere chimeric antigen receptor na-ezubere iche antigen tumor - nzaghachi dị egwu na leukemia cell B.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp4: Onye nrịanrịa na-ebute ọrịa nje na-efe efe ugboro ugboro yana ọkwa immunoglobulin dị ala. Ọbara dị n'akụkụ na-egosi mkpụrụ ndụ B na-adịghị ahụ mana sel T nkịtị. Chọpụta ihe na-akpata immunodeficiency (X-njikọ agammaglobulinemia - BTK mutation). Kọwaa ihe ndabere mkpụrụ ndụ: ka BTK na-ejikarị egosi n'oge mmepe cell B, ihe na-adịghị mma, yana ka ọgwụgwọ immunoglobulin (IVIG) si arụ ọrụ.
learnUni_biology_f5_task: Mgbochi ebumpụta ụwa na njirimara ụkpụrụ
learnUni_biology_f5_tp1: Ihe mgbochi na-agbanwe agbanwe na mkpụrụ ndụ B
learnUni_biology_f5_tp2: Ndidi, autoimmunity, na ọrịa kansa immunotherapy
learnUni_computer_science_f2_desc: Algorithms na usoro data bụ isi ihe gbasara sayensị kọmputa. Usoro data ziri ezi na-eme ka algorithm rụọ ọrụ nke ọma; nke na-ezighị ezi na-eme ka ọ ghara ịdị irè. Nyocha Big-O, algọridim eserese, na mmemme siri ike bụ ngwaọrụ ndị bụ isi nke injinia sọftụwia ọ bụla ga-amarịrị.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp0: Nnukwu-O: O (1) na-adịgide adịgide, O (log n) ọchụchọ ọnụọgụ abụọ, O(n) nyocha linear, O(n log n) jikota ụdị, O(n²) ụdị afụ, O(2ⁿ) exponential. Ω (ikpe kacha mma), Θ (njide siri ike). Nyocha amortized maka usoro dị ike.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp1: Akụkụ isi: array (O (1) ohere), ndepụta ejikọtara (O (1) ntinye isi), tebụl hash (nkezi O (1) niile ops), BST (O (log n) ziri ezi), kpokọtara (O (log n) ntinye / wepụ), gbalịa (ọrụ prefix eriri).
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp2: Algọridim eserese: BFS (ụzọ kacha nso na-enweghị oke, O (V + E)), DFS (nchọpụta okirikiri, ụdị topological), Dijkstra (ụzọ kacha nso, O ((V + E) log V)), Bellman-Ford (mkpụrụ ndụ ọjọọ, O (VE)), Floyd-Warshall (ụdị abụọ niile, O (V³)).
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp3: Mmemme na-agbanwe agbanwe: ezigbo substructure + nsogbu dị n'okpuru. Memoisation (n'elu-ala) vs. tabulation (ala-elu). Nsogbu kpochapụwo: 0/1 Knapsack, LCS, Dezie anya, Matrix Chain Multiplication, Mgbanwe ego.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp4: NP-zuru ezu: P (polynomial-oge solvable), NP (Polynomial-oge verifiable). Nsogbu NP zuru oke (SAT, TSP, Clique) - enweghị algọridim polynomial amaghi ama. Usoro Cook-Levin: SAT bụ NP-zuru oke. Mbelata na-egosi NP-ike.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_task: Mejuputa algọridim Dijkstra (pseudocode nwere kwụ n'ahịrị) na eserese 6-ọnụ. Gbaa ya ọsọ site na nzọụkwụ, na-egosi tebụl dị anya na ọnọdụ kwụ n'ahịrị dị mkpa n'oge ọ bụla. Gopụta oge mgbagwoju anya O((V+E)log V). Mgbe ahụ kọwaa: ọ bụrụ na eserese ahụ nwere akụkụ na-adịghị mma, gịnị kpatara Dijkstra ji daa, oleekwa otú Bellman-Ford si ejikwa ha?
learnUni_computer_science_f3_desc: Sistemụ arụmọrụ bụ oyi akwa ngwanrọ n'etiti ngwaike na ngwa - ijikwa usoro, ebe nchekwa, nchekwa na nchekwa. Ịghọta os internals na-enyere gị aka ide nke ọma, koodu n'otu oge, ghọta arụmọrụ sistemụ, na chepụta sistemu ekesa echekwabara.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp0: Usoro vs. eri: usoro nwere ohere adreesị na akụrụngwa; eri na-ekekọrịta oghere adreesị usoro. Mgbanwe nke ọnọdụ: OS na-echekwa/eweghachi steeti CPU (ndebanye aha, PC, ntụ ntụ stack). Ịhazi oge: FCFS, SJF, Round Robin, ụzọ, Multilevel Queue.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp1: Ihe ize ndụ ngbanwe: ọnọdụ agbụrụ, mkpọchi anwụ (Ọnọdụ Coffman: mwepu ibe, ijide-na-echere, enweghị preemption, nchere okirikiri), agụụ, mkpọchi. Mmekọrịta: mutex, semaphore, nyochaa (ọnọdụ mgbanwe ọnọdụ), mkpọchi agụ-ede.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp2: Njikwa ebe nchekwa: paging - kewaa oghere adreesị mebere ka ọ bụrụ ibe edobere na okpokolo agba anụ ahụ site na tebụl ibe. TLB na-echekwa ntụgharị asụsụ nso nso a. Algọridim ngbanwe ibe: FIFO, LRU, Elekere (ohere nke abụọ). Mgbu mgbe a na-arụ ọrụ> RAM.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp3: Sistemụ faịlụ: VFS (Sistemụ Faịlụ Virtual) oyi akwa maka ibugharị. Inodes: metadata faịlụ + ihe mgbochi data. Ịdekọ akụkọ (ext4, NTFS) maka ndakọrịta ihe mberede. B-osisi eji na HFS+, NTFS maka ndekọ ndekọ aha. Ọkwa RAID 0,1,5,6 - arụmọrụ yana nkwụghachi ụgwọ azụmaahịa.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp4: Ihe owuwu nchekwa: mgbanaka mgbanaka (ọnọdụ onye ọrụ vs. kernel mode, syscalls dị ka ókèala a na-achịkwa), njikwa ohere nwere ikike, njikwa ikike ikike (SELinux/AppArmor), hypervisors (ụdị 1 bare metal: VMware ESXi, Xen; ụdị 2 kwadoro: VirtualBox). Akpa (Docker) na-eji mkpokọta na oghere aha - ọ bụghị ezi VM.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_task: Usoro atọ na-ekekọrịta akụ R1 na R2. P1: na-ejide R1, chọrọ R2. P2: na-ejide R2, chọrọ R1. P3: chọrọ ha abụọ. (a) See eserese nke ekenye ihe onwunwe wee chọpụta mkpọchi. (b) Gosi ọnọdụ nchekwa site n'iji Algorithm nke Banker: Max=[R1:2,R2:1], [R1:1,R2:2], [R1:2,R2:2]; Dị = [R1:1,R2:1]. Chọta usoro ogbugbu dị nchebe. (c) Wepụta ụkpụrụ iji gbochie mkpọchi a.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_tp1: Njikwa ebe nchekwa na ebe nchekwa mebere
learnUni_computer_science_f4_desc: Injinia sọftụwia na-etinye usoro n'usoro iji wulite ngwanro a pụrụ ịdabere na ya, nke enwere ike idobe ya, nke nwere ike itolite. Omume ọgbara ọhụrụ - Agile, DevOps, microservices, CI/CD - agbanweela ka esi enweta ngwanrọ. Ọzụzụ injinia isi - ihe achọrọ, ụkpụrụ ụlọ, nnwale na nchekwa - ka dị mkpa n'agbanyeghị usoro.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp0: Agile (Scrum, XP, Kanban): sprints izu 2 na-emegharị emegharị, nkwụghachi kwa ụbọchị, nlegharị anya sprint, ejiji azụ azụ. DevOps: mmepe na arụ ọrụ agbakwunyere; CI/CD pipeline (GitLab CI, Jenkins, GitHub Actions) na-arụ ọrụ na-arụ ọrụ, nwalee, na-ebuga na nkwa ọ bụla.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp1: Usoro ihe owuwu sọftụwia: Layered (UI → mgbagha azụmahịa → nnweta data), microservices (ọrụ a na-ebugharị n'onwe ya nwere ọdụ data nke ya, na-ekwurịta okwu site na REST/gRPC/ozi), ihe omume (ọrụ na-emeghachi omume na mmemme - Kafka, RabbitMQ), CQRS+Event Sourcing.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp2: Ụkpụrụ imewe (GoF): Ihe okike (Singleton, Factory, Builder, Prototype), Structural (Adapter, Decorator, Facade, Proxy), Omume (Onye na-ekiri, Strategy, Command, Template Method, Iterator). Mara mgbe ị ga-etinye - emela injinia karịa.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp3: Usoro ule: otu (ngwa ngwa, dịpụrụ adịpụ - ịdabere na ịkwa emo), ntinye (ọtụtụ akụrụngwa), nkwekọrịta (nkwekọrịta API), usoro (njedebe na njedebe), nnabata (nkwenye akụkọ onye ọrụ). TDD: red-green-refactor. Nnwale mgbanwe mgbanwe na-enyocha ogo ule.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp4: Nchekwa na injinịa ngwanrọ (OWASP Top 10): ịgba ntụtụ (SQL, iwu), nyocha agbajiri agbaji, XSS, ntụnyere ihe na-enweghị nchebe, nhazi adịghị mma. Nlegharị anya egwu (STRIDE), nyocha koodu echedoro, nyocha enweghị ike ịdabere na ya (Snyk, Dependabot).
learnUni_computer_science_f4_task: Chepụta ngwa nkekọrịta ịnya ụgbọ ala: (a) Dee akụkọ ndị ọrụ 5 jiri njirisi nnabata. (b) See eserese ihe owuwu C4 (okwu, akpa, ọkwa akụrụngwa). (c) Chọpụta usoro nhazi 3 ejiri wee kwadoo. (d) Dee ule otu (pseudocode) maka ọrụ 'gbakọọ ụgwọ' na-ekpuchi: ụgwọ ụgbọ ala, ọnụahịa ịwa ahụ, ụgwọ kacha nta, na ikpe ihu (ebe efu, ntinye adịghị mma). (e) Chọpụta ihe egwu nchekwa 3 OWASP na mbelata.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_desc: Ịmụ igwe (ML) na-enyere sistemu aka ịmụta na data. Ọmụmụ miri emi - netwọk akwara nwere ọtụtụ ọkwa - akwalitela ọganiihu n'ọhụụ, asụsụ, na egwuregwu. Ịghọta tiori ML (bias-variance, VC dimension, regularization) na omume (PyTorch, hyperparameter tuning, deployment) bụ ugbu a isi ikike na sayensị kọmputa.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp0: Mmụta a na-elekọta: wedata mfu L(θ) karịa data ọzụzụ site na mgbada gradient θ ← θ - α∇L. Stochastic gradient mgbada (SGD), Adam optimiser. Nhazi: L2 (njọ ire ere, na-ebelata ibu), L1 (sparsity), nkwụsị (neurons efu efu n'oge ọzụzụ).
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp1: Nrụpụta netwọkụ akwara ozi: ejikọtara nke ọma (oke), convolutional (CNN - oke ibu, mgbanwe ntụgharị - dị mma maka onyonyo), ugboro ugboro (RNN, LSTM, GRU — data usoro), usoro nlebara anya (Mgbanwe - nlebara anya onwe onye, ​​O (n²) mgbagwoju anya, mana enwere ike ime ya).
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp2: Azụmahịa-iche-iche: njehie ọzụzụ ≈ nhụsianya²; njehie ule - njehie ọzụzụ ≈ iche. Na-adaba adaba: nnukwu ele mmadụ anya n'ihu (ihe nlereanya dị mfe). Na-adaba adaba: nnukwu ọdịiche (ihe nlereanya na-echeta data ọzụzụ). Nhazi, data ndị ọzọ, yana ụdị dị mfe na-eleba anya na-adaba adaba.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp3: Nyocha gafere izi ezi: maka klaasị na-ezighi ezi - nkenke (TP/TP+FP), cheta (TP/TP+FN), F1 = 2PR/(P+R), AUC-ROC (mpaghara n'okpuru njiri njirimara onye na-arụ ọrụ). k-fold cross-validation na-enye atụmatụ nchikota siri ike.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp4: Ụdị ntọala na AI nwere ọrụ: ụdị asụsụ buru ibu (GPT, BERT) a zụrụ azụ na nnukwu data, edoziziri maka ọrụ ụfọdụ. Nhụjuanya, ele mmadụ anya n'ihu, na iji ya eme ihe n'ụzọ na-ezighị ezi bụ ihe egwu dị egwu. Iwu EU AI (2024) na-ekewa sistemu AI site n'ihe egwu ma tinye ihe achọrọ maka ngwa nwere nnukwu ihe egwu.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_task: Ị na-ewulite nhazi ọkwa mmetụta (nlebanya dị mma/na-adịghị mma). izi ezi nke ọzụzụ: 97%; nkwado ziri ezi: 68%. (a) Chọpụta nsogbu ahụ. (b) Depụta usoro 4 iji dozie ya. (c) Ntọala data gị dị mma 90% - gbakọọ izi ezi, nkenke, cheta na F1 ma ọ bụrụ na ị kewaa ihe niile dị ka nke ziri ezi. Kedu ihe kpatara F1 ji bụrụ metric ka mma? (d) Kpee usoro ncheta nkenke maka ụdị abụọ wee kọwaa nke ị ga-ahọrọ maka ọrụ nyocha ahụike.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_tp0: Ọzụzụ netwọkụ akwara ozi na njikarịcha
learnUni_computer_science_f5_tp2: Metiriki nyocha na AI nwere ọrụ
learnUni_economics_f1_desc: Microeconomics na-enyocha mkpebi nke ezinụlọ, ụlọ ọrụ, na ahịa. Ozizi nke ndị ahịa na ndị siri ike, usoro ahịa site na asọmpi zuru oke ruo naanị otu, mpụga, na echiche egwuregwu na-enye akụrụngwa nyocha isi maka ịghọta ọnụ ahịa, nsonaazụ ahịa na mmetụta ọdịmma nke amụma.
learnUni_economics_f1_kp0: Ozizi ndị ahịa: ịba ụba nke ịba uru dabere na mmachi mmefu ego. N'ebe kacha mma: MU_x/P_x = MU_y/P_y (ihe nhata oke n'otu paụnd). Ọkpụkpụ enweghị mmasị + ahịrị mmefu ego → ọnọdụ dị nro MRS = oke ọnụahịa.
learnUni_economics_f1_kp1: Echiche siri ike: ịba ụba uru ebe MR = MC. Asọmpi zuru oke: P = MR = MC na nha nha ogologo oge, uru akụ na ụba efu efu. Obere oge: mechie ma ọ bụrụ P <min(AVC).
learnUni_economics_f1_kp2: Ọdịdị ahịa: otu onye (MR <P, ọnwụ ọnwụ = mfu ọdịmma, ikike nkịtị na-achịkwa site na okpu ọnụahịa ma ọ bụ ọnụ ahịa-gbakwunyere); oligopoly (Cournot - asọmpi ọnụọgụ, Bertrand - asọmpi ọnụahịa → ọnụ ahịa ọnụ ala).
learnUni_economics_f1_kp3: Mpụga na ngwongwo ọha: mpụga na-adịghị mma → oke mmepụta (ụtụ Pigouvian = MEC na-agbazi). Mpụga dị mma → emeputaghị (nkwado enyemaka). Ngwongwo ọha: enweghị ike iwepụ + onye na-emegide → nsogbu ndị na-agba ọsọ n'efu → nke ahịa na-enyeghị.
learnUni_economics_f1_kp4: Ozizi egwuregwu: Nash equilibrium (enweghị mgbagha na-erite uru n'otu akụkụ). Nsogbu nke onye mkpọrọ: atụmatụ kachasị na-eduga na nsonaazụ Pareto-dị ala. Egwuregwu ugboro ugboro: imekọ ihe ọnụ na-adigide site na atụmatụ ịkpalite ma ọ bụrụ na ihe mbelata ego dị elu. Ozizi okushon: ọnụ ahịa mbụ (ịgba n'okpuru ọnụ ahịa), ọnụ ahịa nke abụọ/Vickrey (atụmatụ kachasị maka ịnye ezigbo uru).
learnUni_economics_f1_task: Ụgbọ elu abụọ na-asọ mpi n'ụzọ. Onye ọ bụla nwere ike ịtọ ọnụ ahịa dị elu ma ọ bụ dị ala. Matriks akwụ ụgwọ (uru £m): {H,H}=(10,10), {H,L}=(2,15), {L,H}=(15,2), {L,L}=(5,5). (a) Chọta nha nha nke Nash. (b) Ọ bụ Pareto kacha mma? (c) Ọ bụrụ na a na-emegharị egwuregwu ahụ ruo mgbe ebighị ebi, olee mgbe enwere ike ịkwado nkwado (na-enweta ọnọdụ na ego ego δ)? (d) Olee otú iwu asọmpi si ele nhazi ọnụ ahịa ụgbọ elu anya?
learnUni_economics_f1_tp0: Ozizi ndị ahịa na nke siri ike
learnUni_economics_f1_tp1: Ihe owuwu ahịa na otu onye
learnUni_economics_f2_desc: Econometrics na-enye ngwaọrụ ndekọ ọnụ ọgụgụ iji nwalee echiche akụ na ụba yana atụmatụ mmekọrịta kpatara site na data nlele. Ntugharị OLS, mgbanwe ngwá ọrụ, na ụzọ data panel bụ ọrụ ọrụ. 'Ngbanwe ntụkwasị obi' ọgbara ọhụrụ na-emesi ike n'ịchọpụta ihe kpatara ya site na iji nnwale eke.
learnUni_economics_f2_kp0: OLS: wedata Σεᵢ² iji tụọ β̂ = (X'X)⁻¹X'y. Gauss-Markov: OLS bụ acha anụnụ anụnụ n'okpuru enweghị endogeneity, nwoke idina nwoke, enweghị multicollinearity zuru oke. Ajọ-ọtọ: E[β̂] = β. Nkwekọrịta: β̂ →_p β dị ka n → ∞.
learnUni_economics_f2_kp1: Endogeneity: E[ε|X] ≠ 0 n'ihi na ewepụrụ mgbanwe mgbanwe, tụgharịa causality, ma ọ bụ nha njehie → OLS elere anya na ekwekọghị ekwekọ. Ihe ngwọta IV: chọta ngwá ọrụ Z jikọtara ya na X (mmetụta: Cov(Z,X) ≠ 0) ma ọ bụghị na ε (mwepu: Cov(Z,ε) = 0).
learnUni_economics_f2_kp2: Data panel: Yᵢₜ = α + βXᵢₜ + μᵢ + εᵢₜ. Mmetụta edobere (n'ime ihe nleba anya): na-ewepụ oge dị iche iche na-adịghị ahụkebe μ. Mmetụta random: na-arụ ọrụ nke ọma ma ọ bụrụ na μᵢ enweghị njikọ na X (nnwale: Hausman). Ọdịiche mbụ: Δyᵢₜ = βΔxᵢₜ + Δεᵢₜ.
learnUni_economics_f2_kp3: Ọdịiche dị iche iche (DiD): tulee ọgwụgwọ na otu njikwa tupu / mgbe mgbanwe iwu gasịrị. β_DiD = (Ȳ_{ọgwụgwọ, post} - Ȳ_{ọgwụgwọ, tupu}) - (Ȳ_{control, post} - Ȳ_{control, pre}). Isi echiche: usoro ndị yiri ya (ọgwụgwọ anaghị adị, otu abụọ ahụ gaara etolite n'otu aka ahụ).
learnUni_economics_f2_kp4: Nkwụsị nkwụghachi azụ (RD): A na-ekenye ọgwụgwọ dabere na ma mgbanwe na-agba ọsọ gafere ọnụ ụzọ. Na-atụnyere nsonaazụ dị n'elu na n'okpuru nkwụsị - randomisation mpaghara. Sharp RD: ha niile gafere ọnụ ụzọ. Fuzzy RD: naanị ụfọdụ - jiri dị ka ngwa.
learnUni_economics_f2_task: Ịchọrọ ịkọwa ihe kpatara agụmakwụkwọ mahadum na ego. OLS na-enye β̂ = 0.08 (8% ụgwọ ọnwa kwa afọ agụmakwụkwọ). (a) Gịnị mere OLS ji ele mmadụ anya n'ihu? (b) Tụpụta ngwá ọrụ - kwupụta ihe mere o ji meju mmachi mkpa na mwepụ. (c) Kọwaa atumatu DiD site na iji nnwale eke (dịka mgbanwe ego nkuzi) yana ntule anya n'ụdị. (d) Tụgharịa asụsụ nkwụghachi azụ n'akụkụ oke ntozu agụmakwụkwọ.
learnUni_economics_f3_desc: Akụ na ụba omume na-agụnye nghọta nke mmụọ na nyocha akụ na ụba. Ndị mmadụ enweghị ezi uche zuru oke - ha bụ ndị na-enweghị isi, ndị na-eleda anya ugbu a, na-emetụta usoro nhazi na mmekọrịta ọha na eze. Ndịiche ndị a bụ nke a na-ahụ anya na nke dị n'usoro, na-enye ohere ịmepụta amụma ka mma site na nudges na nhọrọ nhazi.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp0: Theory Prospect (Kahneman & Tversky, 1979): ndị mmadụ na-enyocha arụpụta ihe n'ihe metụtara ntụaka aka. Ọrụ bara uru: concave maka uru (ịkpọasị ihe ize ndụ), convex maka mfu (ịchọ ihe ize ndụ), steeper maka mfu karịa uru (λ ≈ 2 — ọnwụ aversion coefficient).
learnUni_economics_f3_kp1: Ịba nha nke puru omume: ndị mmadụ buru oke ibu obere ihe gbasara omume (na-akọwa lotterị na mkpuchi) yana ihe puru omume buru ibu. Ngụkọta amụma amụma na-ejikwa ngwakọta lọtrị.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp2: Ihe nhụsianya dị ugbu a: quasi-hyperbolic discounting U = u₀ + βΣδᵗuₜ na β <1. Na-emepụta oge na-ekwekọghị ekwekọ - atụmatụ emere ugbu a agaghị eso ya. Na-akọwa iribiga ihe ókè, enweghị nchekwa, imegharị ihe. Ndị ọkaibe maara na ha na-akparị mmadụ; naives adịghị - dị iche iche amụma pụtara.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp3: Ntụle nudge (Thaler & Sunstein, 2008): ime ụlọ nhọrọ na-akpụzi mkpebi na-egbochighị nnwere onwe. Iwu ndị ezighi ezi (ndebanye aha pension auto-debanye aha), ozi ụkpụrụ mmekọrịta ọha na eze ('ọtụtụ ezinụlọ na-akwụ ụgwọ n'oge'), na ime ka ọ dị mfe na-ebelata ihe mgbochi na omume dị mma.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp4: Akụ na ụba nnwale na RCTs: nnwale nyocha ụlọ nyocha na ntọala a na-achịkwa. Nnwale ubi (RCTs) nwale ntinye aka n'ogo. Randomistas (Banerjee, Duflo - Nobel 2019) gbanwere akụ na ụba mmepe site na ịnwale ntinye aka siri ike.
learnUni_economics_f3_task: Model onye nwere mmasị ugbu a (β=0.7, δ=0.95) na-ekpebi ma ị ga-emega ahụ taa (ọnụahịa c=5 utils) maka uru n'ọdịnihu (ihe B=10 enwetara n'izu na-abịa). (a) Onye ahụ ọ̀ na-eme atụmatụ na Sunday imega ahụ́ na Mọnde? (b) Mgbe Mọnde ruru, hà na-emega ahụ́ n’ezie? (c) Kọwaa oge na-ekwekọghị ekwekọ. (d) Chepụta ngwaọrụ nkwa iji nyere ha aka, ma jiri ya tụnyere nhụta ntaramahụhụ ego.
learnUni_economics_f3_tp1: Ọhụụ dị ugbu a na enweghị nkwekọrịta oge
learnUni_economics_f4_desc: Akụ na ụba mmepe na-amụ ihe na-akpata ịda ogbenye na atumatu ndị na-akwalite ọganihu. Akụ na ụba mmepe ọgbara ọhụrụ esiwo n'echiche dị ukwuu gaa na akaebe siri ike na ntinye aka kpọmkwem - iji RCTs, nnwale eke, na nnukwu data. Mpaghara ahụ na-etinye aka na uto, ụlọ ọrụ, ahụike, agụmakwụkwọ, na enweghị ahaghị nhata.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp0: Ụdị uto dị nro: Y = AK^α L^{1−α}. Steady steeti: itinye ego = depreciation; Ọnụ ego echekwabara na mmụba ọnụ ọgụgụ mmadụ na-ekpebi oke K/L. Nlaghachi na-ebelata → ndakọrịta ọnọdụ. Mwepụta A (ngụkọta ihe nrụpụta) na-akwalite uto na-adịte aka - mana ọ dị na Solow.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp1: Uto endogenous (Romer 1990): ihe ọmụma K̃ na-abanye n'ichepụta na-ebelata nlọghachi. Ngalaba R&D na-ewepụta echiche ọhụrụ. Ntugharị ihe ọmụma (na-abụghị ndị na-asọ mpi, nke a na-ewepụ n'akụkụ ụfọdụ) → enweghị ihe ọhụrụ na-enweghị nchebe IP ma ọ bụ enyemaka R&D.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp2: Ụlọ ọrụ na uto (Acemoglu & Robinson): ụlọ ọrụ gụnyere (ikike ihe onwunwe, iwu nke iwu, ahịa asọmpi) na-akwalite uto. Ụlọ ọrụ na-adọrọ adọrọ (ihe nketa ọchịchị - ndị ọbịa na-anwụ anwụ na-emepụta ụlọ ọrụ colonial) na-ejide mba dị iche iche na ịda ogbenye. Akụkọ ihe mere eme - nnọgidesi ike.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp3: RCTs na mmepe: Duflo & Banerjee (Abdul Latif Jameel Poverty Action Lab, J-PAL) na-eji RCT iji nyochaa mmemme akọwapụtara - deworming, microcredit, nnyefe ego ọnọdụ, fatịlaịza nudges. Nsonaazụ na-ejukarị anya - tiori na-enweghị nduhie data.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp4: Ọnyà ịda ogbenye na CCT: ọnyà ịda ogbenye na-ebilite site na ọnụ ahịa ego a na-akwụ ụgwọ (agụmakwụkwọ, ahụike, fatịlaịza) nke ezinụlọ ndị na-enweghị ego na-enweghị ike imeli, na-egbochi uru mmepụta ihe. Mbufe ego ọnọdụ (Mexico's Oportunidades, Bolsa Família nke Brazil) na-enye ego enwetara ọnọdụ maka ịga ụlọ akwụkwọ na nlekọta ahụike - na-emebi ọnyà ahụ site na iji mmetụta ogologo oge tụrụ atụ.
learnUni_economics_f4_task: Tulee South Korea na Nigeria: ha abụọ nwere oke ego ha nwetara (~$300 GDP/capita) na 1960. Na 2023 South Korea nwere ~$33,000, Nigeria ~$2,100. Iji (a) Solow nlereanya - kedu ego nchekwa na isi obodo mmadụ na-akọwa ọdịiche? (b) Ihe nlere Romer — kedu ka ikike imepụta ihe ọhụrụ siri dị? (c) Acemoglu & Robinson - tụnyere akụkọ ihe mere eme colonial na ọnọdụ ụlọ ọrụ. Mechie ya na otu nkwado amụma dabere na Nigeria, na-ekwu maka RCT dị mkpa.
learnUni_economics_f4_tp2: RCTs, CCTs, na ọnyà ịda ogbenye
learnUni_law_f0_desc: Iwu iwu na-akọwa mmekọrịta dị n'etiti steeti na ndị mmadụ n'otu n'otu, na n'etiti ngalaba gọọmentị. Iwu ọha na eze na-achịkwa ike ọchịchị. Ịghọta ụkpụrụ iwu - nkewa nke ikike, ọchịchị iwu, ikike ndị bụ isi - bụ ntọala maka ọmụmụ ihe gbasara iwu na ịbụ nwa amaala onye kwuo uche ya.
learnUni_law_f0_kp0: Usoro iwu: enwere ike ịhazi ya (USA, Germany, France - otu akwụkwọ edere) ma ọ bụ enweghị koodu (UK - iwu iwu, iwu nkịtị na mgbakọ). Ọchịchọ nke ụkpụrụ: ụkpụrụ iwu na-achị karịa iwu nkịtị.
learnUni_law_f0_kp1: Nkewa nke ikike (Montesquieu): ndị omebe iwu (Parliament/Congress), Executive (gọọmenti/president), ikpe (ụlọikpe). Nyocha na itule na-egbochi itinye ike. Nyocha ikpe: Ụlọikpe nwere ike ịkatu iwu ndị na-adabaghị n'usoro iwu.
learnUni_law_f0_kp2: Iwu nke iwu (Dicey): onweghi onye kariri iwu; ntaramahụhụ naanị maka imebi iwu doro anya; ohere nha anya n'ụlọ ikpe. Na omume: nnwere onwe nke ụlọ ikpe, mmachibido nke njide aka ike (habeas corpus), oke nke omume steeti.
learnUni_law_f0_kp3: Ikike ndị bụ isi: European Convention on Human Rights (Isiokwu 2-14: ikike ibi ndụ, mmachibido ịta ahụhụ, ikpe ziri ezi, nzuzo, nnwere onwe ikwu okwu, mmachibido ịkpa ókè). Asọmpi vs. ngwa nke ikike kwụ ọtọ.
learnUni_law_f0_kp4: Usoro iwu EU: ịdị elu nke iwu EU (Costa v. ENEL, 1964), mmetụta kpọmkwem (Van Gend en Loos, 1963), ụkpụrụ proportionality, enyemaka. Post-Brexit: UK anọghịkwa n'okpuru iwu EU.
learnUni_law_f0_task: Nyochaa ọkwa iwu nke ụlọ ikpe nọọrọ onwe ya na ọchịchị onye kwuo uche ya. N'iji ihe atụ sitere na usoro iwu atọ dị iche iche (UK, USA, Germany), tulee: otu esi echebe nnwere onwe ikpe, oke nyocha nke ikpe gbasara iwu, na otu ikpe ebe ụlọikpe kwụsịrị ma ọ bụ njedebe ọrụ nchịkwa. Nyochaa ma nlebanya ikpe ọ dabara na ikike ọchịchị onye kwuo uche ya.
learnUni_law_f0_tp1: Ọchịchị nke iwu na ikike ndị bụ isi
learnUni_law_f1_desc: Iwu nkwekọrịta na-achịkwa nkwekọrịta na-ejikọta iwu. Ọ na-ekpebi mgbe a malitere nkwekọrịta, ihe ndị òtù ahụ kwesịrị ime, ihe na-eme mgbe a na-emezughị ọrụ (mmebi), na ihe ngwọta dịnụ. Iwu nkwekọrịta na-akwado azụmahịa, ọrụ na ọtụtụ mmekọrịta iwu n'etiti ndị otu onwe.
learnUni_law_f1_kp0: Ihe nke nkwekọrịta dị irè: onyinye (atụmatụ doro anya ka a ga-ejikọta na ịnakwere), nnabata (na-enweghị mgbagha, kwekọrọ na onyinye ahụ - iwu 'mirror image'), nlebara anya (ihe bara uru gbanwere - echiche gara aga abụghị ihe a na-atụle), ebumnuche ịmepụta mmekọrịta iwu.
learnUni_law_f1_kp1: Usoro nke nkwekọrịta: okwu egosipụtara (kwuru n'ụzọ doro anya), okwu pụtara (nke pụtara site n'ụkpụrụ - ire ​​nke ngwaahịa; ma ọ bụ site n'ụlọ ikpe - azụmahịa nrụpụta ọrụ). Ọnọdụ (mmebi na-enye ohere nkwụsị + mmebi), akwụkwọ ikike (mmebi na-enye ohere mmebi naanị), usoro enweghị aha (ngwọta dabere na nsonaazụ nke mmebi ahụ).
learnUni_law_f1_kp2: Ihe ndị na-eme ka ọ dị njọ: nkọwahie (nkwupụta ụgha nke eziokwu na-ebute nkwekọrịta → nkwụsịtụ + mmebi), nrụgide (nrụgide na-akwadoghị → ihe efu), mmetụta na-ezighị ezi (uru na-ezighị ezi e weere → ihe efu), ndudue (mmekọrịta isi / otu akụkụ → efu ma ọ bụ ihe efu).
learnUni_law_f1_kp3: Mmebi na ọgwụgwọ: mmebi iwu (ọjụjụ ime tupu arụ ọrụ ruru → ndị aka ha dị ọcha nwere ike ịnakwere ma gbaa akwụkwọ ozugbo). Ngwọta: mmebi (isi - na-etinye ndị aka na-emeghị ihe ọjọọ n'ọnọdụ dị ka à ga-asị na a na-arụ ọrụ nkwekọrịta), arụmọrụ akọwapụtara (nha nhata - na-amanye arụmọrụ, enyere ebe mmebi ezughị oke), iwu, quantum meruit.
learnUni_law_f1_kp4: Nkebiokwu nhapụ: ga-etinyerịrị (akwụkwọ ọkwa, mbinye aka, ma ọ bụ usoro ime ihe); sụgharịrị nke ọma (contra proferentem - ambiguity megide ndị ọzọ na-adabere na nkebiokwu); n'okpuru UCTA 1977 na CRA 2015 (okwu na-enweghị ezi uche na-adịghị mma na nkwekọrịta ndị ahịa).
learnUni_law_f1_task: Onye na-ewu ụlọ na-ehota £50,000 iji rụkwaa ụlọ. Onye nwe ụlọ na-anabata. N'oge ọrụ, onye na-ewu ụlọ na-achọpụta nsogbu nhazi na-atụghị anya ya ma chọọ £ 70,000 ọzọ. Onye nwe ụlọ bịanyere aka na nkwekọrịta ọhụrụ n'okpuru nrụgide. Mgbe emechara, onye nwe ụlọ jụrụ ịkwụkwu £20,000. Ndụmọdụ: (a) nkwekọrịta mbụ ahụ ọ dị irè? (b) A ga-amanye mgbanwe ahụ? (c) Olee ihe ngwọta nke onye na-ewu ụlọ nwere? (d) Olee ihe nchebe onye nwe ụlọ nwere ike iwelite?
learnUni_law_f2_desc: Iwu mpụ na-akọwa omume nke steeti amachibidoro ma na-enye ntaramahụhụ nke ndị dara iwu. Ọ na-echebe ndị mmadụ n'otu n'otu na ọha mmadụ pụọ na mmerụ ahụ, na-egbochi ime ihe ọjọọ, na-ekwupụtakwa ikpe gbasara omume. Ịghọta iwu mpụ chọrọ ịma aka nke actus reus, mens rea, nchekwa, na ụkpụrụ nke ibu mpụ.
learnUni_law_f2_kp0: Ihe nke mpụ: actus reus (omume ikpe mara - gụnyere ọrụ afọ ofufo, nkwụsị ebe ọrụ dị, nsonaazụ, ọnọdụ) na ndị ikom rea (uche ikpe ọmụma - ebumnuche, enweghị uche, ma ọ bụ nleghara anya). Ụkpụrụ ndakọrịta: AR na MR ga-adaba n'oge.
learnUni_law_f2_kp1: Ọkwa nke ndị ikom rea: kpọmkwem ebumnobi (nzube bụ iweta n'ihi), oblique n'uche (n'ihi na a fọrọ nke nta ka ọ pụta ìhè, e buru ụzọ hụ dị ka ndị dị otú ahụ - R v Woolin), onye enweghị uche (Cunningham - maara ihe ize ndụ na-ewere), ebumnobi nleghara anya (nnukwu deviation si ezi uche onye ọkọlọtọ).
learnUni_law_f2_kp2: Igbu mmadụ: igbu ọchụ (igbu mmadụ n'ụzọ iwu na-akwadoghị + ebumnuche igbu ma ọ bụ kpatara GBH - ntaramahụhụ ndụ amanyere iwu); ogbugbu afọ ofufo (igbu mmadụ na-ebelata site na enweghị njikwa ma ọ bụ ibu ọrụ dị ala); igbu ọchụ na-akwadoghị (omume iwu na-akwadoghị ma ọ bụ nleghara anya dị ukwuu - enweghị igbu ọchụ MR).
learnUni_law_f2_kp3: Nchekwa: nchebe onwe (oke ike iji chụọ iyi egwu na-akwadoghị - ezi uche ma ọ bụghị ikpe zuru oke); nkwenye (oke na ihe nwere ike ikwenye - R v Brown); ịṅụbiga mmanya ókè (ịṅụbiga mmanya ókè na-enweghị ihe nchebe n'ebumnobi a kapịrị ọnụ, nchebe nke akụkụ na ebumnobi bụ isi); ara (M'Naghten iwu - ntụpọ nke uche si ọrịa nke uche → bụghị ikpe n'ihi na nke ara).
learnUni_law_f2_kp4: Mmejọ iwe na nsonye: nwaa (karịa naanị ime nkwadebe na ebumnuche); ịgba izu (nkwekọrịta ime mmejọ); agbamume/enyem aka (Serious Crime Act 2007). Ụlọ ọrụ jikọrọ aka: onye so na mmemme otu ga-akwụ ụgwọ ma ọ bụrụ na ha buru ụzọ hụ na onye isi ụlọ akwụkwọ ga-emejọ ya na MR chọrọ.
learnUni_law_f2_task: D na V nwere ọgụ. D ịkụ ọkpọ V na-ezube ime nnukwu mmerụ ahụ. V, nke D amaghị, nwere ọnọdụ okpokoro isi dị ụkọ ('okpokoro akwa'). V anwụ. Ndụmọdụ D banyere ụgwọ mpụ: (a) Gịnị bụ mmeghachi omume igbu ọchụ? (b) D nwere MR maka igbu ọchụ? (c) Iwu okpokoro isi ọ̀ na-emetụta iwu mpụ? (d) Ọ nwere ihe nchekwa akụkụ ọ bụla dị? Gịnị ga-esi na ya pụta?
learnUni_law_f3_desc: Iwu mba ụwa na-achịkwa mmekọrịta dị n'etiti steeti na, na-arịwanye elu, ndị mmadụ n'otu n'otu na otu mba ụwa. N'adịghị ka iwu ụlọ, ọ nweghị ikike mmanye etiti - nrube isi na-adabere na nkwenye, nnabata, na nrụgide mba ụwa. Iwu mba ụwa nke ọha na-ekpuchi nkwekọrịta, iji ike eme ihe, ọbụbụeze na ikike mmadụ.
learnUni_law_f3_kp0: Isi mmalite nke iwu mba ụwa (Art. 38 ICJ Statute): nkwekọrịta (binding na nnọkọ - pacta sunt servanda - Vienna Convention 1969), omenala mba ụwa (omume obodo na-agbanwe agbanwe + opinio juris - na-ejikọta na steeti niile), ụkpụrụ iwu n'ozuzu, na mkpebi ikpe / akwụkwọ ndị ọkà mmụta (isi mmalite).
learnUni_law_f3_kp1: Ọchịchị obodo: ụkpụrụ na steeti nwere ikike kachasị n'ime ókèala ha ma ha nhata n'okpuru iwu mba ụwa. Enweghị nnyonye anya: Ọrụ ịghara itinye aka na ihe gbasara ime obodo nke steeti ndị ọzọ - nke ọrụ nchekwa nchekwa (R2P) mebiri.
learnUni_law_f3_kp2: Iji ike eme ihe: Nkeji edemede 2(4) UN Charter gbochiri iyi egwu ma ọ bụ iji ike megide steeti ọ bụla. Ewezuga: nchebe onwe onye (Nkebi nke 51 - ga-adị mkpa na nha nha, kọrọ na Security Council) na ikike Council Security (Isi nke VII - iyi egwu udo, imebi udo, ime ihe ike).
learnUni_law_f3_kp3: Iwu mpụ mba ụwa: Ụlọikpe Nuremberg guzobere ọrụ mpụ nke onye ọ bụla n'okpuru iwu mba ụwa. Rome Statute (2002) kere ICC - ikike maka mgbukpọ, mpụ megide mmadụ, mpụ agha, na iwe. 'Iso iwu' abụghị ihe nchebe zuru oke.
learnUni_law_f3_kp4: Iwu nke oké osimiri (UNCLOS 1982): Territorial Sea (12 nautical miles — full sovereignty), exclusive Economic zone (200 nm — sovereign resource rights), oké osimiri (n’ofè mba ikike — nnwere onwe nke ịnyagharị). Mkpebi esemokwu: Ụlọikpe Mba Nile Maka Iwu nke Oké Osimiri (ITLOS).
learnUni_law_f3_task: Steeti A na-awakpo steeti B, na-ekwu na nchekwa onwe ya mgbe mwakpo cyber sitere na ọrụ ọgụgụ isi B. Nyocha: (a) Mwakpo cyber bụ ọgụ ọgụ n'okpuru edemede 51? (b) Nzaghachi nke A ọ̀ dị mkpa ma kwekọọ? (c) Olee ọrụ UN Security Council nwere ike ịrụ? (d) Ndị isi steeti A nwere ike nweta akwụkwọ ikpe ICC? Kedu ihe a ga-egosipụta? Kwupụta usoro nkwekọrịta dị mkpa yana ikpe mba ụwa.
learnUni_law_f3_tp0: Isi mmalite na isiokwu nke iwu mba ụwa
learnUni_law_f3_tp1: Ọchịchị na iji ike eme ihe
learnUni_law_f3_tp2: Iwu mpụ mba ụwa na UNCLOS || Ụzọ Iwu & Iwu
learnUni_law_f4_name: Usoro iwu bụ nka nke ịtụgharị uche n'iwu: ịgụ akwụkwọ, ịkọwa ụkpụrụ, ịrụ arụmụka, na ide ihe n'ụzọ iwu kwadoro. Ikike iwu (nkà mmụta iwu / nkà ihe ọmụma nke iwu) na-enyocha ọdịdị, isi mmalite, na nzube nke iwu n'onwe ya - na-ajụ ma iwu na omume dị iche iche, ihe na-eme ka iwu kwadoro, na otú ndị ikpe kwesịrị isi ekpebi ikpe ndị siri ike.
learnUni_law_f4_desc: Okwu ikpe ikpe: ratio decidendi (ụkpụrụ iwu nke a na-ekpebi ikpe - mbinding na ụlọ ikpe dị ala n'okpuru stare decisis), obiter dicta (okwu mberede - naanị nkwenye). Ịdịiche (na-amachi ụkpụrụ mbụ), imebiga ihe ókè (ụlọ ikpe dị elu na-emegide okwu mbụ), na ịpụ (Ụlọikpe Kasị Elu na-apụ n'usoro nke ya).
learnUni_law_f4_kp0: Nkọwa nke iwu: iwu nkịtị (itinye okwu nkịtị pụtara), iwu ọla edo (zere nsonaazụ nzuzu), iwu ajọ omume (ihe ọjọọ ka nzuko omeiwu chọrọ ịgwọ - Heydon's Case). Ebumnuche ebumnuche ọgbara ọhụrụ (gịnị bụ ebumnuche nzuko omeiwu?). ECHR s.3 HRA 1998: A ga-agụrịrị iwu kwekọrọ na ikike nkwekọrịta ruo ogologo oge enwere ike.
learnUni_law_f4_kp1: Legal positivism (Austin, Hart): iwu bụ eziokwu mmekọrịta mmadụ na ibe ya - iwu ziri ezi sitere na usoro ndị a ma ama, n'agbanyeghị ọdịnaya nke omume. 'Iwu nke nnabata' Hart na-akọwapụta iwu ziri ezi. Thesis nkewa iwu/omume ọma.
learnUni_law_f4_kp2: Usoro iwu okike: iwu ga-agbaso ụkpụrụ omume - iwu na-ezighị ezi abụghị ezi iwu (lex iniusta non est lex - Aquinas, Fuller's inner morality of law). Iwu Nazi etinyere n'ụlọ ikpe - arụmụka nke agha gachara maka ma positivism iwu enyerela ihe ọjọọ aka.
learnUni_law_f4_kp3: Natural law theory: law must conform to moral principles — unjust law is not true law (lex iniusta non est lex — Aquinas, Fuller's inner morality of law). Nazi laws applied by courts — the post-war debate on whether legal positivism had enabled evil.
learnUni_law_f4_kp4: Ronald Dworkin's 'iwu dị ka iguzosi ike n'ezi ihe': iwu nwere ọ bụghị naanị iwu mana ụkpụrụ (ikike inwe oke nchegbu na nkwanye ùgwù). Ndị ikpe ga-achọtarịrị otu 'azịza ziri ezi' nke dabara na mkpebi ndị gara aga na ụkpụrụ ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị. Okwu siri ike: ụkpụrụ, ọ bụghị naanị iwu, na-eduzi mkpebi. Nkatọ nke positivism Hart.
learnUni_law_f4_task: Otu ụkpụrụ kwuru 'ọ dịghị ụgbọ ala na ogige'. Nye ndụmọdụ ma amachibidoro nke ọ bụla n'ime ihe ndị a: (a) ịnyịnya ígwè, (b) ụgbọ ala ụmụaka ji egwuri egwu, (c) ụgbọ ihe mberede na-azaghachi ihe mberede, (d) tankị ncheta agha. Tinye iwu ọdịnala atọ niile nke nkọwa iwu. Mgbe ahụ, na-eji Hart positivism na iwu Dworkin dị ka iguzosi ike n'ezi ihe, kọwaa otú onye ọkà mmụta sayensị ọ bụla ga-esi bịaruo 'penumbra of uncertainty' na iwu.
learnUni_law_f4_tp2: Iwu ziri ezi na iwu okike
learnUni_medicine_f0_desc: Anatomi bụ ọmụmụ nke usoro nke ahụ mmadụ - akụkụ ya, anụ ahụ, na sistem. Ọmụma nke ọma banyere ahụ ike bụ ntọala a na-apụghị dochie anya ọgwụ ụlọ ọgwụ: ị nweghị ike ịchọpụta ma ọ bụ gwọọ ihe ị na-enweghị ike ịhụ anya. Ahụmahụ ahụike na-ejikọta oke arụ ọrụ, akụkọ ihe mere eme, embrayo na arụ ọrụ redio.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp0: Okwu anatomical: ụgbọ elu (sagittal, coronal, transverse), ntụziaka (medial / mpụta, elu / dị ala, ihu / azụ, proximal / distal), mpaghara, na mmegharị (mgbanwe / ndọtị, mgbatị / ntinye, ntụgharị, pronation / supination).
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp1: Usoro usoro obi obi: obi dị na mediastinum. Akụkụ aka nri (ọbara venous systemic) → mgbasa nke akpa ume. Akụkụ aka ekpe (oxygenated) → mgbasa ozi sistemu. Ụkwara akwara: akụkụ aka ekpe na-agbadata (LAD), sekọmfleksị aka ekpe (LCx), akwara akwara aka nri (RCA). LAD infarct = 'onye di ya nwụrụ'.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp2: Sistemụ musculoskeletal: ọkpụkpụ 206 na ọkpụkpụ okenye. Njikọta: fibrous (sutures), cartilaginous (symphysis pubis), synovial (ọtụtụ nkwonkwo mmegharị - hip, ikpere, ubu). Brachial plexus (C5-T1) na-achịkwa akụkụ nke elu - ọnya mgbọrọgwụ akwara na-emepụta usoro mperi.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp3: Abdominal viscera: peritoneum (ahịrị parietal na mgbidi afọ, akụkụ ahụ visceral na-ekpuchi). Akụkụ retroperitoneal (SADPUCKER): gland suprarenal, aorta, duodenum (2nd-4th), pancreas, ureters, colon (nrịgo / rịdata), akụrụ, esophagus, ikensi.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp4: Neuroanatomy: 12 akwara cranial (I Olfactory, II Optic, III Oculomotor, IV Trochlear, V Trigeminal, VI Abducens, VII Facial, VIII Vestibulocochlear, IX Glossopharyngeal, X Vagus, XI Ngwa, XII Hypoglossal). Ọkpụkpụ azụ azụ na-agwụ na L1-L2 - ọkpụkpụ lumbar na L3-L4.
learnUni_medicine_f0_task: Onye ọrịa na-egosi adịghị ike n'ogwe aka nri ha, mfu nke mmetụta pinprick na obere mkpịsị aka na etiti etiti, na imefusị uru ahụ ike. Mepụta ọnya ahụ n'ụzọ anụ ahụ: (a) kedụ akwara na-emetụta? (b) Ebee ka ọnya ahụ dị - na brachial plexus ma ọ bụ akwara aha ya? (c) Gịnị nwere ike ịkpata? (d) Kedu ihe owuwu anatomical ka agbakọtara? Tinye ihe osise nke plexus dị mkpa.
learnUni_medicine_f0_tp0: Ụgbọ elu anatomical na okwu okwu
learnUni_medicine_f0_tp1: Anatomy nke obi na akwara anụ ahụ
learnUni_medicine_f1_desc: Physiology na-akọwa otú sistemu ahụ si arụ ọrụ — ka obi si agba ọbara, ka akụrụ si enyocha ma na-achịkwa electrolytes, ka ngụgụ si agbanwe gas, na ka homonụ si ahazi akụkụ ahụ ndị dị anya. Ọ na-ejikọta anatomi (ihe owuwu) na ọgwụ ahụike (adịghị arụ ọrụ). Physiology bụ usoro ihe ndabere maka nchoputa.
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp0: physiology obi obi: Frank-Starling usoro - ọrịa strok na-abawanye na njedebe njedebe-diastolic olu (bugo ibu) - obi na-agbatịkwu → ike dị ukwuu. Mmepụta obi = oke obi × olu strok. Ọkpụkpụ akwara ozi = mmepụta obi × mkpokọta nguzogide mpụta.
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp1: Usoro iku ume iku ume: olu tidal (500 ml na izu ike), ikike dị mkpa, oghere nwụrụ anwụ (~ 150 ml - ikuku ikuku anaghị etinye aka na mgbanwe gas). Igwe ikuku ikuku (V/Q) dakọtara: ezigbo V/Q = 1. Nkwekọrịta na-akpata hypoxaemia (o₂ ala). Hypercapnia (CO₂ dị elu) bụ isi ihe mkpali iku ume.
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp2: Physiology gbasara akụrụ: ọnụego nzacha glomerular (GFR nkịtị ~ 100 ml / min). Tubular reabsorption (Na⁺, glucose, amino acids) na secretion (H⁺, ọgwụ). Renin-Angiotensin-Aldosterone System (RAAS): ọbara mgbali elu → renin → Ang II → aldosterone → Na⁺ na njide mmiri → BP na-ebili.
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp3: Physiology endocrine: insulin (β-cell, glucose na-enweta site na akwara / abụba, njikọ glycogen, na-egbochi gluconeogenesis), glucagon (sel α, na-emegide insulin - glycogenolysis, gluconeogenesis), cortisol (axis HPA - nzaghachi nrụgide, mgbochi mkpali, na-ebuli glucose ọbara), homonụ thyroid (ọnụego metabolic, uto).
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp4: Neurophysiology: ikike ime ihe, nkwụsị nke neuromuscular (acetylcholine → nicotinic receptor → ike ọgwụgwụ-ihe ike → ike ime → mkpụkọ akwara site na usoro filament na-amị amị). Usoro ụjọ nke autonomic: ọmịiko (ọgụ / ụgbọ elu - noradrenaline) vs. parasympathetic (ezu ike / mgbari - acetylcholine).
learnUni_medicine_f1_task: A na-ahụ onye ọrịa ka ọ dara BP 80/50, ọnụọgụ obi 120, na iku ume 28 ume / min. Gas ọbara na-egosi pH 7.25, pCO₂ 30 mmHg, HCO₃⁻ 13 mEq/L. Nyocha: (a) Kedu ụdị ọgba aghara acid-base bụ nke a? (b) Enwere ụgwọ iku ume? (c) Gbakọọ oghere anion (Na = 138, Cl = 100, HCO₃ = 13). (d) Kedu usoro physiological (RAAS, respiratory, renal) ga-arụ ọrụ n'ime awa na-esote awa iji dozie nke a?
learnUni_medicine_f1_tp0: physiology nke obi na iku ume
learnUni_medicine_f2_name: Pathology bụ sayensị ọmụmụ nke ọrịa - ya na-akpata (aetiology), usoro (pathogenesis), bughi mgbanwe (morphology), na ọtọ pụta. Usoro ọgwụgwọ zuru oke na-enyocha usoro a na-ahụkarị na ọtụtụ ọrịa: mbufụt, neoplasia, thrombosis, na degeneration. Usoro pathology na-emetụta ndị a na akụkụ ahụ na ọrịa ụfọdụ.
learnUni_medicine_f2_desc: Mbufụt: nnukwu (nkeji-ụbọchị - mgbanwe vaskụla, neutrophil influx, nke histamine, prostaglandins, kinins, mmeju). Na-adịghị ala ala (ọnwa-afọ - macrophages, lymphocytes, fibroblasts - granuloma formation na TB, Crohn's, sarcoidosis).
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp0: Neoplasia: benign (nke ọma dị iche iche, encapsulated, ndị na-adịghị emerụ ahụ) vs. Ihe ngosi nke ọrịa cancer (Hamahan & Weinberg): mmụba na-aga n'ihu, na-ezere ndị na-egbochi uto, iguzogide ọnwụ cell, anwụghị anwụ na-emegharị emegharị, angiogenesis, mbuso agha / metastasis, genome instability, tumour-akwalite mbufụt.
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp1: Thrombosis: Virchow's triad - mmerụ ahụ endothelial (kacha mkpa), ọbara ọgbụgba na-adịghị mma (ọgba aghara ma ọ bụ stasis), na hypercoagulability. thrombi akwara: platelet bara ụba, ọcha. Venous thrombi (DVT): uhie (RBC-fibrin). Embolim nke akpa ume: Iberibe DVT na-abanye na mgbasa nke akpa ume.
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp2: Ọrịa cell na ọnwụ: ischemia (Mbelata ATP → Na⁺/K⁺ mgbapụta ọdịda → ọzịza cell → necrosis). Apoptosis (ọnwụ cell emebere - caspase cascade, condensation nuklia, ahụ apoptotic - enweghị mbufụt). Necrosis (na-agafe agafe, nkwụsị cell → mbufụt). Ụdị: coagulative, liquefactive (ụbụrụ), caseous (TB), gangrenous.
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp3: Atherosclerosis: egbugbere ọnụ na-akpata, ọrịa mkpali na-adịghị ala ala nke mgbidi akwara. Mkpụrụ ndụ ụfụfụ (macrophages engulf oxidised LDL) → eriri abụba → plaques fibrous → plaques mgbagwoju anya (ọnya, ọbara ọgbụgba, calcification, thrombosis). Ihe ize ndụ: ọbara mgbali elu, hyperlipidemia, ise siga, ọrịa shuga, akụkọ ihe mere eme ezinụlọ.
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp4: Onye dị afọ 65 na-ese anwụrụ nwere ụdị ọrịa shuga 2 na-egosi mgbu obi na-amalite na mberede na-agbapụta na ogwe aka ekpe, diaphoresis, na elu ST na ECG. A na-ebuli Troponin I nke ọma. Kọwaa: (a) usoro ọrịa na-akpata nnukwu MI na-eji Virchow's triad na atherosclerosis, (b) ihe na-eme cardiomyocytes mgbe nkeji 30, awa 6, na awa 24 nke ischemia gasịrị, (c) ụdị necrosis na-akpata, na (d) usoro mkpali na ọgwụgwọ n'ime izu ndị na-esote.
learnUni_medicine_f2_tp0: Thrombosis na atherosclerosis || Ahụhụ cell na ọnwụ
learnUni_medicine_f2_tp2: Pharmacology na-amụ ka ọgwụ si emekọrịta ihe na usoro ndu. Pharmacokinetics (ihe ahụ na-eme ọgwụ) na pharmacodynamics (ihe ọgwụ ahụ na-eme n'ahụ) na-akwado ndenye ezi uche. Ọgwụ ọ bụla nwere ihe nnata, usoro, na profaịlụ mmetụta ọjọọ nke a ga-amarịrị maka omume ụlọ ọgwụ dị mma.
learnUni_medicine_f3_desc: Pharmacology studies how drugs interact with biological systems. Pharmacokinetics (what the body does to the drug) and pharmacodynamics (what the drug does to the body) underpin rational prescribing. Every drug has a receptor, mechanism, and adverse effect profile that must be known for safe clinical practice.
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp0: Pharmacokinetics - ADME: Absorption (bioavailability F = akụkụ nke na-erute mgbasa ozi sistemu), Nkesa (olu nke nkesa Vd = dose / [plasma], ọgwụ ndị nwere protein dị ukwuu nwere Vd dị ala), Metabolism (ọtụtụ n'ime imeju CYP450 enzymes - mmetụta mbụ-pass), Mwepụ (renal ọkara ndụ t₁ / . CL 9).
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp1: Pharmacodynamics: ọgwụ na-arụ ọrụ na ndị na-anabata ya (GPCRs, ion channels, nuclear receptors, enzyme-linked). Agonist (na-eme ka onye na-anabata ya rụọ ọrụ), onye na-emegide (ihe mgbochi - asọmpi ma ọ bụ enweghị asọmpi). EC50: itinye uche na-arụpụta 50% kacha mma. Ịdị irè (mmetụta kachasị) vs. ike (EC50).
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp2: Mkparịta ụka ndị na-anabata ọgwụ ọjọọ: mmụba nke nnabata (mgbe mmegide na-adịghị ala ala - na-akọwa rebound phenomena), downregulation (mgbe mgbu na-adịghị ala ala - ndidi). Ndị nnata mapụtara. Ndị agonists akụkụ: arụ ọrụ dị ntakịrị ọbụlagodi na 100% nnabata nnabata - nwere ike rụọ ọrụ dị ka ndị na-emegide n'ihu agonist zuru oke.
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp3: Klas ọgwụ ndị dị mkpa: beta-blockers (ndị na-emegide ndị na-asọmpi na β₁/₂-adrenoceptors - belata ọnụ ọgụgụ obi na BP), ndị na-egbochi ACE (na-egbochi angiotensin na-agbanwe enzyme → obere Ang II → vasodilation + obere aldosterone → belatara BP), statins (HMG-CoA reductase → LDL na-ebelata cholesterol inhibitors. ndị na-anabata ya → ala plasma LDL).
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp4: Mmeghachi omume ọgwụ ọjọọ (ADR): Ụdị A (agbakwunyere - amụma amụma, dabere na dose, dịka ọbara ọgbụgba na warfarin), ụdị B (dị egwu - enweghị atụ, mgbasa ozi na-alụso ọrịa ọgụ, dịka anaphylaxis na penicillin), ụdị C (eji ogologo oge), Ụdị D (egbu oge — carcinogenesis, teratogenesis), ụdị E (njedebe nke ojiji - iwepụ). Mmekọrịta ọgwụ: ndị na-akpali CYP (rifampicin na-ebelata mmetụta nke ọgwụ mgbochi ọnụ), ndị na-egbochi CYP (erythromycin na-ebuli ọkwa simvastatin → myopathy).
learnUni_medicine_f3_task: Onye ọrịa nwere fibrillation atrial na-amalite na warfarin (ezubere INR 2-3) wee malite ọrịa iku ume na-achọ erythromycin. Mgbe izu abụọ gachara INR = 5.8 nwere ọbara ọgbụgba. Kọwaa: (a) Usoro warfarin na ihe kpatara eji nyochaa INR, (b) mmekọrịta ọgwụ na erythromycin, (c) ọgwụgwọ dị mkpa ugbu a, (d) ihe a ga-eji nlezianya na-edepụta ihe n'ọdịnihu. Gụnye klaasị ọgwụ, nnabata/enzyme, yana paramita kinetic akọwapụtara.
learnUni_medicine_f3_tp2: Klas ọgwụ ndị dị mkpa na mmeghachi omume ọjọọ
learnUni_medicine_f4_desc: Ọgwụ ụlọ ọgwụ na-ejikọta anatomi, physiology, pathology, na pharmacology n'ime nlekọta ndị ọrịa. Ịme akụkọ ihe mere eme na nyocha anụ ahụ bụ isi nkà ụlọ ọgwụ na-emepụta nchọpụta dị iche iche. Ọkachamara ọkachamara, ụkpụrụ ahụike na ọgwụ na-egosi na ọ bụ ntọala nke ezigbo omume ụlọ ọgwụ.
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp0: Akụkọ ihe mere eme: mkpesa mkpesa (PC), akụkọ ihe mere eme nke mkpesa (HPC - SOCRATES: saịtị, mmalite, agwa, radieshon, mkpakọrịta, usoro oge, ihe na-eme ka ọ dịkwuo njọ / na-enye aka, ịdị njọ), akụkọ ahụike gara aga (PMH), akụkọ ihe mere eme ọgwụ (DHx), akụkọ ihe mere eme ezinụlọ (FHx), akụkọ mmekọrịta ọha na eze (SHx - ịṅụ sịga, mmanya, ọrụ, mmekọrịta), nyochaa usoro.
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp1: Nyocha ụlọ ọgwụ: nyocha izugbe → ihe ịrịba ama dị mkpa (BP, HR, RR, SpO₂, okpomọkụ, GCS) → nyocha kpọmkwem usoro. ABCDE obibia maka nnukwu ntule: Ụgbọ elu, iku ume, okirikiri, nkwarụ (neuro), ngosi. Akara NEWS2 maka ndị ọrịa na-akawanye njọ.
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp2: Medical ethics (ụkpụrụ anọ - Beauchamp & Childress): nnwere onwe (na-asọpụrụ ikike onye ọrịa ikpebi), beneficence (eme ihe na onye ọrịa mmasị kacha mma), na-abụghị maleficence (mbụ, adịghị emerụ — primum na-abụghị nocere), ikpe ziri ezi (mma oke nke ihe onwunwe, nha anya ọgwụgwọ). Esemokwu dị n'etiti ụkpụrụ na-adịkarị na omume.
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp3: Nkwenye amara: chọrọ ikike (nghọta, jigide, tụọ, nkwurịta okwu), ozi (ihe egwu ihe, ụzọ ọzọ, nsonaazụ nke enweghị ọgwụgwọ), na afọ ofufo (enweghị mmanye). Iwu ikike ọgụgụ isi 2005 (UK): ọ bụrụ na enweghị ikike, mkpebi kacha mma nke otu ± ike ọka iwu na-adịgide adịgide.
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp4: Ọgwụ na-egosi na-egosi (EBM): nyocha usoro + meta-nyocha (ihe akaebe kachasị elu maka ajụjụ ụlọ ọgwụ), RCTs, ọmụmụ ndị otu, ọmụmụ ihe nchịkwa, usoro ikpe, echiche ndị ọkachamara. Ntụle dị oke mkpa: nyochaa ịdị mma nke ime (ọ emere ọmụmụ ihe ahụ nke ọma?), Nkwekọrịta mpụga (nrụpụta ọ na-emetụta onye ọrịa m?), na mkpa ụlọ ọgwụ (NNT, nha mmetụta).
learnUni_medicine_f4_task: Otu nwanyị dị afọ 45 nwere ọrịa akwụkwụ amaara ama ama amaghị ihe ọ bụla. Onye ya na ya na-emekọ ihe kwuru na ya ewerebeghị ọgwụ mgbochi mgbakasị ya otu izu. O nweghị ikike onye ọka iwu na enweghị ike ịkwenye. N'iji ụkpụrụ anọ nke ụkpụrụ omume ahụike na iwu ikike uche, nyocha: (a) enwere ike inye ọgwụgwọ na-enweghị nkwenye? (b) Gịnị bụ usoro ọdịmma kasịnụ? (c) Ozugbo ọ malitere ịrụ ọrụ, gịnị ka e kwesịrị ịtụle? (d) kedu ka ị ga-esi were ọgwụ gakwuru concordance?
learnUni_medicine_f4_tp0: Inweta akụkọ ihe mere eme na nyocha
learnUni_psychology_f0_desc: Psychology nke mahadum bụ ọzụzụ sayensị - ọ na-eji ụzọ nnwale, ọnụ ọgụgụ, na akaebe nyochara ndị ọgbọ iji mụọ uche na omume. Ya isi theoretic frameworks sitere na ndu mbelata na-elekọta mmadụ constructionism. Ịghọta akụkọ ihe mere eme na nkà ihe ọmụma nke akparamaagwa na-eme ka ọmụmụ ihe niile na-esote.
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp0: Isi echiche: ndu ​​(ụbụrụ, mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa, homonụ), ọgụgụ isi (nhazi ozi, ihe nleba anya nke uche), omume (Skinner - conditioning, operant learning), psychodynamic (Freud — amaghị ihe ọ bụla, mmegide, usoro nchekwa), humanistic (Maslow, Rogers - onwe-actualisation), social (Tajfel, Milgram - mmetụta mmadụ).
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp1: Ụzọ nyocha: nnwale (ịgbanwe IV, tụọ DV, njikwa mgbagwoju anya), mmekọrịta (mmekọrịta tụọ, r = -1 ka +1, enweghị ike ịkọwa ihe kpatara ya), ihe nleba anya (ihe okike, onye so na ya), ọmụmụ ihe (ihe omimi ma ọ bụ njedebe zuru oke), nyocha (nnukwu ihe atụ, mkpesa onwe onye). N'ime vs. n'etiti isiokwu imewe.
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp2: Ntọala ndekọ aha: Nnwale echiche efu efu (NHST) - p-uru <0.05 mgbakọ (Onye ọkụ azụ). Ogo mmetụta (Cohen's d, η²) - ọ dị mkpa ọ bụrụgodị na ọ bụghị na ọnụ ọgụgụ. Nsogbu mmụgharị: ọtụtụ nchoputa kpochapụwo anaghị emepụtaghachi (social priming, ego depletion) - sayensị mepere emepe na ndebanye aha tupu ndebanye aha bụ nzaghachi.
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp3: Ụkpụrụ omume (koodu BPS): nkwenye mara ọkwa, ikike ịwepụ, nchebe pụọ na mmerụ ahụ, nzuzo, nkọwa. Nnwale Mkpọrọ Stanford (Zimbardo 1971) na ọmụmụ Milgram kpalitere arụmụka na-adịgide adịgide maka ihe ize ndụ nyocha anabatara. IRB/kọmitii ụkpụrụ omume bụzi iwu iwu.
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp4: Ihe ndabere nke omume: sistemu ụjọ (CNS + PNS + ANS). Ọdịdị ụbụrụ: ụbụrụ ụbụrụ (ọrụ dị mkpa), usoro limbic (mmetụta, ebe nchekwa - hippocampus, amygdala), basal ganglia (njikwa moto, ụgwọ ọrụ), ụbụrụ ụbụrụ (cognition dị elu, àgwà). Neuroimaging: fMRI (nrugharị ọbara), EEG (oge), PET (maapụ neurotransmitter).
learnUni_psychology_f0_task: Nyochaa nke ọma nzọrọ 'akparamagwa bụ sayensị'. Na azịza gị: (a) kọwapụta 'sayensị' site na iji criterion falsifiability nke Popper, (b) nyochaa ogo nke ụzọ isi akparamaagwa na-ezute akara a, (c) kparịta nsogbu ngbanwe na ihe ọ na-ekpughe banyere NHST, (d) chepụta mgbanwe usoro abụọ nke ga-ewusi nzere sayensị nke akparamaagwa siri ike.
learnUni_psychology_f1_desc: Psychology mmepe na-amụ ka ụmụ mmadụ si agbanwe n'ofe ndụ niile - site na mmepe ime nwa site na nwata, nwata, oge uto, ntozu, na ịka nká. Ọ na-enyocha mmepe nke ọgụgụ isi, mmekọrịta mmadụ na ibe, mmetụta uche, na omume, yana mmekọrịta dị n'etiti ntozu okè ndu na ahụmahụ gburugburu ebe obibi.
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp0: Piaget's cognitive development stages: sensorimotor (0-2y, object permanence), preoperational (2-7y, egocentrism, no conservation), ihe na-arụ ọrụ (7-12y, nchekwa, ntụgharị), arụ ọrụ nkịtị (12+y, echiche nkịtị, echiche echiche).
