learnUni_psychology_f1_kp1: Vygotsky's sociocultural theory: Mpaghara nke Proximal Development (ZPD) - ọdịiche dị n'etiti ihe nwatakịrị nwere ike ime naanị ya na site n'ichepụta ihe site na onye ọzọ maara ihe. Asụsụ bụ ngwa ọgụgụ isi. Ihe dị iche na ihe Piaget lekwasịrị anya na nyocha naanị ya.
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp2: Ozizi mgbakwunye (Bowlby, Ainsworth): ụmụ ọhụrụ na-etolite njikọ mgbakwunye bụ isi dị mkpa maka mmepe. Usoro ọnọdụ dị iche iche na-ekewa mgbakwunye: echekwabara (65%), onye na-adịghị nchebe (20%), enweghị nchebe-ambivalent (15%), enweghị nhazi. Ụdị arụ ọrụ ime na-eduzi mmekọrịta n'ọdịnihu.
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp3: Nkwalite ntorobịa: njirimara Erikson vs. ọrụ mgbagwoju anya ogbo. Omume omume nke Kohlberg: preconventional (mmasị onwe onye), omenala (iwu ọha mmadụ), postconventional (ụkpụrụ ụwa). Ụbụrụ ndị nọ n'afọ iri na ụma: sistemu limbic toro tupu cortex prefrontal - iwere ihe egwu, mgbanwe mmetụta uche.
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp4: Mmepe nke ndị okenye na ịka nká: Erikson's later stages — mmekọrịta chiri anya vs. iche (nwatakịrị okenye), generativity vs. stagnation (n'etiti okenye), iguzosi ike n'ezi ihe vs. obi nkoropụ (okenye okenye). Ịka nká: nhazi ọsọ ọsọ na-ebelata; ọgụgụ isi crystallized (akwakọba ihe ọmụma) na-adịgide adịgide ruo 70s. Ịka nká na-aga nke ọma: Ụdị SOC nke Baltes (nhọrọ, njikarịcha, nkwụghachi ụgwọ).
learnUni_psychology_f1_task: A na-egosi nwatakịrị dị afọ 4 iko abụọ nwere nha nha nha, mgbe ahụ, a na-awụnye mmiri sitere na otu iko n'ime iko dị ogologo ma dị warara. Nwatakịrị na-ekwu na iko toro ogologo nwere mmiri karịa. (a) Kedu ọkwa Piagetian nwata ahụ nọ na ya? (b) Olee ihe ndị na-agaghị aghọtali na-akọwa nke a? (c) Olee otú Vygotsky ga-esi kọwaa otu ihe ahụ n'ụzọ dị iche? (d) Chepụta ọmụmụ ihe iji nwalee ma ịchafụ nwere ike mee ka ikike nchekwa dị ngwa ngwa. Tụlee okwu gbasara omume.
learnUni_psychology_f1_tp0: Piaget na mmepe nke ọgụgụ isi
learnUni_psychology_f2_desc: Psychology Clinical na-emetụta sayensị nke mmụọ na ntule, nyocha na ọgwụgwọ nke ọnọdụ ahụike uche. Psychology na-adịghị mma na-enyocha ọdịdị, ihe kpatara ya, na usoro nke nsogbu uche. Ọ na-ejikọta nghọta miri emi nke psychopathology na ntinye aka na-egosi dị ka CBT, DBT, na ọgwụgwọ psychodynamic.
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp0: Na-akọwapụta ihe na-adịghị mma: ọnụọgụ ọnụọgụgụ, mgbagha site na ụkpụrụ ọha mmadụ, enweghị ike ịrụ ọrụ nke ọma (Rosenhan), na ezigbo ahụike ahụike uche (Jahoda). DSM-5 (APA) na ICD-11 (WHO) na-enye njirisi nyocha maka nsogbu uche - sistemu categorical nwere oke ama ama.
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp1: Nnukwu nsogbu ịda mbà n'obi: triad cognitive (Beck - echiche ọjọọ banyere onwe ya, ụwa, ọdịnihu), enweghị enyemaka mụtara (Seligman), hypothesis monoamine (mbelata serotonin na noradrenaline). Ọgwụgwọ: SSRIs (pharmacotherapy nke mbụ), CBT (mmeghari uche, ịgbalite omume), ọgwụgwọ nchikota dị elu.
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp2: Schizophrenia: nti mgbaàmà (nhụhụ anya, delusions, disorganized okwu), ọjọọ mgbaàmà (flat mmetụta, alogia, avolition). Dopamine hypothesis (oke ọrụ nnabata D2 na ụzọ mesolimbic). Antipsychotics: D2 antagonists. Ihe nketa mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa ~ 80% (MZ concordance 48%).
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp3: Usoro ọgwụgwọ omume nke cognitive (CBT): Aaron Beck - echiche na-adịghị mma na schemas na-edozi nsogbu. Ụdị ABC: Ihe omume na-arụ ọrụ → Nkwenye → Nsonaazụ. Ntinye aka: ndekọ echiche, nnwale omume, mkpughe na mgbochi nzaghachi (ERP maka OCD). Isi ihe akaebe: nkwado RCT siri ike maka ịda mbà n'obi, nchekasị, OCD, PTSD.
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp4: Ụdị biopsychosocial (Engel): nsogbu uche na-esite na ihe ndị dị ndụ (mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa, ụbụrụ ụbụrụ), nke uche (cognition, àgwà, mmụta akụkọ ihe mere eme), na ọha mmadụ (trauma, ịda ogbenye, mmekọrịta, omenala) ihe. Na-akọwa ihe kpatara na ọ dịghị otu ọgwụgwọ na-arụ ọrụ maka onye ọ bụla yana ihe kpatara nyocha zuru ezu ji dị mkpa.
learnUni_psychology_f2_task: Nwanyị dị afọ 28 na-enye ọnọdụ dị ala, 6kg arọ ọnwụ, iteta n'isi ụtụtụ, enweghị ike itinye uche, na mmetụta nke abaghị uru maka ọnwa 3. O nweghị ihe mgbaàmà nke mmụọ. (a) Nye nchoputa di iche site na iji DSM-5. (b) Kọwaa ihe mgbaàmà ya site na iji ihe nlebara anya nke Beck. (c) Depụta oge 4 mbụ nke CBT yana ihe ị ga-achọ imezu na nke ọ bụla. (d) N'iji ihe atụ biopsychosocial, chọpụta otu ihe dị ndụ, otu ihe gbasara mmụọ na otu ihe na-elekọta mmadụ.
learnUni_psychology_f2_tp0: Na-akọwapụta ihe na-adịghị mma na DSM-5
learnUni_psychology_f3_desc: Psychology cognitive na-amụ usoro echiche - nlebara anya, nghọta, ebe nchekwa, asụsụ, iche echiche, na idozi nsogbu - na-eji nkọwa nhazi ozi. Ọ na-adabere na nkà mmụta uche mmụta (otu esi akụzi ihe nke ọma) na ngwa ụlọ ọgwụ (ihe mere ebe nchekwa ji adaba, otú nlebara anya na ADHD si ada, otú echiche na-ezighị ezi na ịda mbà n'obi).
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp0: Ụdị ebe nchekwa: Ụdị ụlọ ahịa ọtụtụ Atkinson-Shiffrin (sensory → STM → LTM site na mmeghari). Ụdị ebe nchekwa na-arụ ọrụ (Baddeley & Hitch): loop phonological, sketchpad visuospatial, ihe nchekwa episodic, onye isi etiti. Ọkwa nke nhazi (Craik & Lockhart): omimi, nkọwa nkọwa → njide ka mma.
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp1: Njehie ebe nchekwa: nkọwapụta ngbanwe (Thomson & Tulving - akara n'iweghachi ga-adakọrịrị na ọnọdụ ngbanwe). Mmetụta ozi na-ezighi ezi (Loftus): ozi ihe omume mgbe emechara na-agbanwe ebe nchekwa. Ihe akaebe nke onye hụrụ anya enweghị ntụkwasị obi nke ukwuu - ntụkwasị obi anaghị ebu amụma maka izi ezi. Enwere ike ịkụnye ncheta ụgha.
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp2: Nlebara anya: nlebara anya nhọrọ (mmetụta oriri mmanya Cherry, Treisman's attenuation model). Nlebara anya kewara ekewa: arụmọrụ abụọ nwere oke site na nhazi otu ọwa na ọkwa nghọta. kpuru ìsì (Simons & Chabris — nnwale gorilla). Nlebara anya na-adịgide adịgide na ịmụrụ anya.
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp3: Asụsụ: Chomsky's universal grammar - ngwaọrụ nweta asụsụ innate (LAD). Ntụle oge dị egwu: a ga-enwetarịrị asụsụ tupu ntozuo oke maka ntozu zuru oke (ọmụmụ ihe gbasara Genie). Mmekọrịta asụsụ (Sapir-Whorf): asụsụ na-emetụta echiche - ụdị siri ike jụrụ, ụdị adịghị ike kwadoro.
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp4: Ndozi nsogbu na ịtụgharị uche: heuristics (nweta - kpebisie ike site n'ụzọ dị mfe ihe atụ na-abata n'uche; nnọchiteanya - kpee ikpe site na myirịta na prototype; anchoring). Nkwenye nkwenye (ọchịchọ ịchọ ihe akaebe na-akwado). Usoro ihe omume abụọ (Kahneman): Sistemu 1 (ngwa ngwa, akpaaka, heuristic) vs. Sistemu 2 (nwayọọ, kpachapụrụ anya, nyocha).
learnUni_psychology_f3_task: Loftus & Palmer (1974) gosiri na ngwaa a na-eji mgbe a na-ajụ maka ihe mberede ụgbọ ala ('smashed', 'hit', 'bumped') metụtara ọsọ ọsọ echere na emesịa akụkọ banyere iko agbajiri. (a) Kọwaa ihe si na ya pụta site na iji chema echiche na mmetụta na-ezighị ezi. (b) Chepụta mmegharị ya na nkwalite abụọ maka nkwado ime. (c) Kwurịta ihe ọ pụtara maka ajụjụ ọnụ ndị uwe ojii gbara na akaebe ndị mmadụ hụrụ n'ụlọ ikpe. (d) Nyochaa nleba anya na gburugburu ebe obibi nke nyocha ebe nchekwa ụlọ nyocha.
learnUni_psychology_f3_tp0: Ụdị ebe nchekwa na ntinye koodu
learnUni_psychology_f3_tp1: Njehie ebe nchekwa na akaebe ndị hụrụ anya
learnUni_psychology_f4_desc: Psychology bayoloji na-enyocha akwara, hormonal, na ntọala mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa nke omume na usoro echiche. Ọ na-ejikọta nkà mmụta uche na neuroscience - na-akọwa otú ụbụrụ si emepụta nsụhọ, ka hormones si emepụta ọnọdụ na omume, na otú mgbanwe mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa si emetụta àgwà na ahụike uche.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp0: Hormone na omume: cortisol (nzaghachi nrụgide - axis HPA: hypothalamus → CRH → pituitary → ACTH → adrenal cortex → cortisol). Nchegbu na-adịghị ala ala: Mbelata olu hippocampal (cortisol na-egbu egbu na neurons), ebe nchekwa adịghị ike na ọrụ mgbochi. Testosterone: njikọ mmegide obi umeala na dabere na gburugburu.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp1: Genetics of behaviour: heritability = oke nke iche n'ihi ọdịiche mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa. Ọmụmụ ejima: MZ (otu) vs. DZ (fraternal). Ọmụmụ nkuchi. Ihe nketa ọgụgụ isi ~ 50-80% (dabere na ọnọdụ). Schizophrenia: h²≈80%, enweghị otu mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa - polygenic, mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa dị elu. GWAS na-achọpụta ọtụtụ ụdị dị iche iche nwere mmetụta dị nta.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp2: Evolushọn na omume: gụnyere mgbatị ahụ (Hamilton), nhọpụta ndị ikwu, nkwụghachi azụ altruism (Trivers). Psychology evolushọn: modul maka njirimara ihu, nchọpụta ndị aghụghọ, mmasị di na nwunye, inweta asụsụ. Nkatọ: akụkọ ndị na-eme mgbanwe na-adịkarịghị adịgboroja - chọrọ ihe akaebe mmepe.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp3: Amamihe: nsogbu siri ike (Chalmers - gịnị kpatara enwere ahụmịhe nke onwe ma ọlị?) vs. nsogbu dị mfe (mmekọrịta nsụhọ na ụbụrụ ụbụrụ). Njikọ akwara nke nsụhọ (NCC): usoro ihe ọmụma zuru ụwa ọnụ (Baars / Dehaene), Ozizi Ozi Integrated (Tononi). Nchọpụta nkewa-ụbụrụ (Sperry): hemispheres abụọ nwere ike ịnwe mmata onwe ha.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp4: Ụra na nrọ: usoro ụra: NREM nkebi 1-3 (N1 ìhè → N3 nwayọọ-efegharị, mweghachi) na REM (mmegharị anya ngwa ngwa - nrọ, nchekwa nchekwa). Ụra ụra: na-emebi nlebara anya, ebe nchekwa, ọrụ mgbochi, ọnọdụ. Neuroscience nke nrọ: dorsolateral prefrontal cortex kwụsịrị (belata echiche siri ike - na-akọwa nrọ nrọ).
learnUni_psychology_f4_task: Kwurịta ihe ndabere ndu nke nrụgide. (a) Kọwaa SAM axis (ọmịiko-adrenal medullary - adrenaline, ngwa ngwa) na HPA axis (cortisol, nwayọọ) nzaghachi na nnukwu nrụgide. (b) Gịnị bụ nsonaazụ ogologo oge nke nrụgide na-adịghị ala ala na hippocampus na usoro ahụ ji alụso ọrịa ọgụ? (c) Kọwaa ihe ọmụmụ ejima iji kewapụta onyinye mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa na gburugburu ebe obibi maka adịghị ike nrụgide. (d) Nyochaa nkọwa ndu nke PTSD (nsogbu nrụgide post-traumatic) na ihe ọ pụtara.
learnUni_psychology_f4_tp2: Ụra, usoro ndu ndu, na PTSD
learnUni_sociology_f0_desc: Sociology na-enyocha ọha mmadụ n'ozuzu ya - ihe owuwu ya, ụlọ ọrụ ya, ahaghị nhata, na ike. Ndị ọkà mmụta ntọala - Marx, Weber, na Durkheim - nyere akụkọ dị iche iche banyere otu ọha mmadụ nke oge a si arụ ọrụ. Echiche nke oge a na-ewulite ma na-agbagha ntọala ndị a. mmuta usoro ihe omimi dị mkpa iji mee ka echiche nke ihe akaebe sociology.
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp0: Durkheim: ọha mmadụ bụ eziokwu sui generis - karịrị nchikota nke ndị mmadụ n'otu n'otu. Eziokwu ọha (ụlọ ọrụ, ụkpụrụ, ụkpụrụ) na-egbochi omume. Anomie: ndakpọ ụkpụrụ na mgbanwe mmekọrịta ọha na eze ngwa ngwa → mmụba dị ukwuu na ọnụ ọgụgụ igbu onwe. Mechanical ịdị n'otu (omenala ọha mmadụ) vs. organic ịdị n'otu (oge a, pụrụ iche interdependence).
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp1: Marx: ịhụ ihe onwunwe n'anya nke akụkọ ihe mere eme - ntọala ọha mmadụ (mmekọrịta akụ na ụba, ndị agha / mmekọrita nke mmepụta) na-akpụzi nnukwu ihe (iwu, omenala, okpukperechi, ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị). Capitalism: bourgeoisie nwere ụzọ mmepụta ihe; proletariat na-ere ike ọrụ, na-erigbu (uru njupụta), na ahụmahụ nkewapụ. Echiche okike na-eme ka ahaghị nhata.
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp2: Weber: omume mmekọrịta - ịghọta ihe gbasara omume (Verstehen). Ụdị ikike atọ: omenala, charismatic, ezi uche-iwu. Ụlọ ọrụ Bureaucracy: ezigbo ụdị - ndị isi, iwu, nka - ma nke ọma ma na-eweda mmadụ ala ('ọgba ígwè'). Ụkpụrụ Protestant na mmụọ nke ikeketa: echiche nwere ike ime mgbanwe ihe onwunwe.
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp3: Ọrụ (Parsons, Merton): ọha mmadụ bụ usoro na-achịkwa onwe ya; ụlọ ọrụ na-emezu ọrụ maka nhazi usoro. nkatọ: na-eleghara esemokwu anya, dabere na nkwenye siri ike, teleological. Echiche esemokwu (Dahrendorf): esemokwu bụ ihe nkịtị na isi iyi nke mgbanwe ọha mmadụ, ọ bụghị pathology.
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp4: Contemporary tiori: Giddens (nhazi - Ọdịdị na gị n'ụlọnga bụ ibe mejupụtara), Bourdieu (isi obodo: aku na uba, omenala, na-elekọta mmadụ, ihe atụ; habitus; ubi), Habermas (communicative edinam vs. strategic edinam - lifeworld colonized site usoro). Postmodernism (Baudrillard, Lyoard): nnukwu akụkọ daala; eziokwu bụ ịme anwansị.
learnUni_sociology_f0_task: N'iji opekata mpe echiche atọ, nyochaa ihe na-akpata enweghị ahaghị nhata nke mmụta. Maka nleba anya nke ọ bụla: kwupụta isi okwu usoro iwu, chọpụta usoro na-emepụta ahaghị nhata, kwuo otu ọmụmụ ihe siri ike, wee nyochaa atụmatụ amụma. Mechie site n'ịtụle echiche nke na-enye nkọwa zuru oke.
learnUni_sociology_f0_tp0: Durkheim, Marx, na Weber || Ọrụ na echiche esemokwu
learnUni_sociology_f1_name: Ọdịdị ọha mmadụ bụ ụkpụrụ na-adịgide adịgide nke mmekọrịta ọha na eze na ụlọ ọrụ na-akpụzi omume onye ọ bụla na ohere ndụ. Ezinụlọ, agụmakwụkwọ, okpukperechi, akụ na ụba, mgbasa ozi, na steeti bụ nnukwu ụlọ ọrụ. Ndị ọkà mmụta mmekọrịta ọha na eze na-enyocha otú ihe ndị a si emepụta ahaghị nhata na otú ha si agbanwe ka oge na-aga.
learnUni_sociology_f1_desc: The ezinụlọ: functionalist ele (Murdock - eluigwe na ala, nuclear ezinụlọ na anọ ọrụ: mmekọahụ, ịmụ nwa, akụ na ụba, muta). Marxist echiche (Engels — ezinụlọ reproduces na capitalist klas usoro na patriarchy). Nkatọ Feminist (Oakley - ọrụ ụlọ anaghị akwụ ụgwọ, nkewa nwoke na nwanyị). Postmodern: ụdịdị ezinụlọ dị iche iche.
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp0: Mmụta: onye na-arụ ọrụ (Durkheim - ịdị n'otu na nkà na-elekọta mmadụ; Davis/Moore - nhazi nke meritocratic). Marxist (Bowles & Gintis - usoro ọmụmụ zoro ezo na-emepụtaghachi mmekọrịta klaasị; ụkpụrụ akwụkwọ ozi - enyo ụlọ akwụkwọ n'ebe ọrụ). Cultural mmeputakwa (Bourdieu - omenala isi obodo na-ekpebi ịga nke ọma agụmakwụkwọ).
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp1: Religion: Durkheim — okpukpe sacralises ọha ụkpụrụ mkpokọta; na-arụ ọrụ ntinye. Marx - okpukpere chi bụ 'opium nke ndị mmadụ' - echiche nke kwadoro ahaghị nhata. Weber - okpukpe nwere ike ịbụ ike maka mgbanwe ọha mmadụ (Calvinism na capitalism). Tesis Secularisation: okpukperechi na-agbada n'ihe dị mkpa na ọha mmadụ nke oge a (asọmpi).
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp2: Steeti na ike: Echiche pluralist (ọtụtụ mmasị na-asọmpi). Elite tiori (Mills, Pareto) - ike lekwasịrị na a obere elite. Echiche Marxist - steeti na-akwado ọdịmma klaasị. Gramscian hegemony - klaasị na-achị na-akwado ike site na nkwenye echiche, ọ bụghị naanị mmanye.
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp3: Mgbasa ozi na ọha mmadụ: usoro nhazi nhazi (McCombs & Shaw - mgbasa ozi na-ekpebi ihe ọha na eze na-eche, ọ bụghị ihe ị ga-eche). Ụdị agịga hypodermic (mgbasa ozi na-etinye ozi n'enweghị ihe ọ bụla) vs. ojiji na nkuzi afọ ojuju (ndị na-ege ntị na-ahọrọ mgbasa ozi maka mkpa ha). Mgbasa ozi dijitalụ: nzacha afụ, nhazi algọridim, ozi na-ezighi ezi.
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp4: Tinye echiche mmekọrịta ọha na eze abụọ dị iche iche (dịka functionalism na Marxism) iji nyochaa usoro mmụta na obodo gị. Maka echiche nke ọ bụla: kọwapụta ọrụ agụmakwụkwọ n'ime ọha mmadụ, chọpụta onye na-erite uru na onye ọ na-adịghị mma, kwupụta otu ihe ọmụmụ pụtara ìhè, ma tụọ atụmatụ amụma. Wee nyochaa echiche nke na-enye nkọwa zuru oke nke nsonaazụ agụmakwụkwọ maka ụmụ akwụkwọ na-arụ ọrụ.
learnUni_sociology_f1_tp0: Agụmakwụkwọ na mmeputakwa ọha na eze
learnUni_sociology_f2_name: Ịha nhata n'etiti ọha - oke nhata nke akụrụngwa, ohere, na ike - bụ isi ihe gbasara mmekọrịta ọha na eze. Klas, okike, agbụrụ/agbụrụ, na afọ bụ akụkụ bụ isi nke stratification. Intersectionality na-ekpughe na akụkụ ndị a na-ejikọta ma na-emekọrịta ihe. Ịghọta ahaghị nhata chọrọ ma nyocha nhazi yana nlebara anya na ahụmahụ ndụ.
learnUni_sociology_f2_desc: Klas mmekọrịta: Echiche multidimensional Weber (klas + ọnọdụ + nnọkọ). Atụmatụ klaasị Goldthorpe (NS-SEC): dabere na mmekọrịta ọrụ. Savage et al.'s Great British Class Survey (2013): klaasị asaa gụnyere 'elite' na 'precariat'. Klas na-emetụta ahụike, agụmakwụkwọ, ikpe mpụ, na itinye aka na ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp0: Social class: Weber's multidimensional view (class + status + party). Goldthorpe's class schema (NS-SEC): based on employment relations. Savage et al.'s Great British Class Survey (2013): seven classes including 'elite' and 'precariat'. Class affects health, education, criminal justice, and political participation.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp1: Ịha nhatanha nwoke na nwanyị: nna ochie - ọchịchị nwoke na-achị n'usoro ọha na eze, akụ na ụba, na ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị. Oghere ịkwụ ụgwọ nwoke na nwanyị: ụmụ nwanyị na-enweta ~ 80% nke ego ụmụ nwoke na-enweta kwa elekere na UK (2023). Ulo elu iko (ihe mgbochi ndị a na-adịghị ahụ anya maka ọrụ ndị agadi) na ọnụ ọnụ enyo (ụmụ nwanyị a họpụtara ka ha bụrụ ndị isi n'ọnọdụ nsogbu). Sociology nke nwoke: Connell's hegemonic masculinity.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp2: Agbụrụ na agbụrụ: primordialism (amara agbụrụ dị ka ihe okike, nke edoziri) vs. ihe owuwu (agbụrụ / agbụrụ dị ka ndị mmadụ na-ewu - agbụrụ dị iche iche akọwapụtara dị iche iche na obodo dị iche iche na oge). ịkpa ókè agbụrụ (Macpherson Report - Metropolitan Police): usoro ịkpa oke agbakwunyere na otu, ọ bụghị naanị ajọ mbunobi nke onye ọ bụla.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp3: Intersectionality (Kimberlé Crenshaw): otutu njirimara njirimara (klas, okike, agbụrụ, nkwarụ, mmekọahụ) na-emekọ ọnụ n'ọtụtụ, ọ bụghị mgbakwunye. Ahụmahụ nwanyị ojii nwere ịkpa ókè abụghị naanị ' ịkpa ókè agbụrụ + mmekọ nwoke na nwanyị' - njikọ ahụ na-emepụta ụdị ọghọm pụrụ iche nke na-enweghị naanị ya.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp4: Mkpagharị mmekọrịta ọha na eze: intergenerational (klaasị ụmụaka gbasara ndị nne na nna) na intragenerational (usoro ọrụ onye ọ bụla). Mkpagharị mmekọrịta ọha na eze UK: jikọtara nke ukwuu na klaasị/ego ndị nne na nna. Mgbanwe zuru oke (mmegharị ọha na eze na-arịgo elu) vs. mmegharị nke ikwu (ọnọdụ na nkesa). Mepee vs. sistemu stratification mechiri emechi.
learnUni_sociology_f2_task: Iji intersectionality dị ka usoro nyocha gị, nyochaa ọnọdụ ụmụ nwanyị ojii nwere nkwarụ n'ahịa ọrụ UK. Gaa na: ihe akaebe nke mmetụta akụkụ ọ bụla iche iche, ihe akaebe nke otu ha si emekọrịta ihe, otu akaụntụ usoro ihe ọmụma, yana ihe ọ pụtara maka amụma mgbochi ịkpa oke. Mechie site n'ịtụle ma intersectionality bara uru na nyocha karịa nyocha otu-axis.
learnUni_sociology_f2_tp2: Mkpagharị mmekọrịta ọha na eze na stratification
learnUni_sociology_f3_desc: Nchọcha gbasara mmekọrịta mmadụ na ibe ya na-eji ọtụtụ ụzọ ọnụọgụ na nha dị iche iche iji nyocha ihe gbasara ọha mmadụ. Nhọrọ nke usoro na-egosipụta ma mmachi bara uru yana nkwa mmụta mmụta miri emi - gbasara ihe dị ka ihe ọmụma gbasara mmekọrịta ọha na eze. Reflexivity — onye na-eme nchọpụta mara ọnọdụ nke ha na nyocha - bụ ihe pụrụ iche nke sayensị mmekọrịta mmadụ na ibe ya.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp0: Ụzọ ọnụọgụ: nyocha ọha (ajụjụ ahaziri ahazi, nnukwu samples, nnọchiteanya, generalisable), ọnụ ọgụgụ gọọmentị (data gọọmentị - mpụ, ọmụmụ, ego - mana na-egosipụta omume ndekọ, ọ bụghị 'eziokwu ọha'), nyocha ọdịnaya (nhazi usoro nke ederede ma ọ bụ mgbasa ozi). Epistemology Positivist: Enwere ike mụọ ụwa mmekọrịta site na usoro sayensị nke ọma.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp1: Ụzọ qualitative: ajụjụ ọnụ miri emi (ọkara-ahaziri ma ọ bụ unstructured - ọgaranya, contextual data), na-elekwasị anya otu (otu dynamics, mkpokọta pụtara-eme), ethnography (onye so na-ekiri --eme nnyocha na-emikpu na-elekọta mmadụ ọnọdụ, mgbe ọtụtụ ọnwa ma ọ bụ afọ). Nkọwa nkọwa nkọwa: a na-ewu ihe pụtara, ọ bụghị atụ.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp2: Nlereanya: ihe gbasara nke puru omume (random, stratified, cluster - generalisable) vs. purposive (theoretical, snowball - họrọ maka omimi na mkpa, ọ bụghị nnọchiteanya). Nlere nha vs. omimi: quantitative mkpa nnukwu n; qualitative na-enweta saturation usoro iwu.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp3: Reliability (otu nsonaazụ ma ọ bụrụ ugboro ugboro - ike nke quantitative nnyocha e mere), irè (atụ ihe ọ na-azọrọ - ike nke qualitative). Nkwenye ozi, amaghị aha, nchebe pụọ na mmerụ ahụ. Ntugharị nyocha: ịnakwere ka njirimara onye nyocha si emetụta nchịkọta data na nkọwa.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp4: Ụzọ agwakọta: usoro (qualitative then quantitative, or vice versa), concurrent (ha abụọ n'out oge, arụpụtaghị agbakwunyere). Triangulation: iji ọtụtụ ụzọ na-agbakọta n'otu nkwubi okwu. Ọmụmaatụ: nyocha ọnụọgụgụ na-achọpụta oghere irute klaasị; ajụjụ ọnụ qualitative na-akọwa usoro.
learnUni_sociology_f3_task: Ịchọrọ ịmụ ihe kpatara na ụmụ akwụkwọ na-arụ ọrụ anaghị anọchi anya na mahadum ndị ama ama. Chepụta usoro ọmụmụ ihe agwakọtara: (a) usoro ọnụọgụ site na iji nyocha na data gọọmentị - kọwaa ajụjụ nyocha gị, nlele, usoro na nyocha. (b) Usoro nke qualitative na-eji ajụjụ ọnụ - usoro nlele, ntuziaka ajụjụ ọnụ (ajụjụ 8), na usoro nyocha. (c) Kedu ka ị ga-esi jikọta usoro abụọ ahụ? (d) Chọpụta ihe ịma aka abụọ gbasara omume akọwapụtara maka nyocha ndị ntorobịa na-adịghị ike.
learnUni_history_f0_name: Akụkọ ihe mere eme & Ụzọ akụkọ ihe mere eme
learnUni_history_f0_desc: Akụkọ ihe mere eme bụ ọmụmụ ka esi dee akụkọ ihe mere eme - echiche, ụzọ na nkọwa ndị ọkọ akụkọ ihe mere eme na-eji. Ọ na-ajụ: ihe ọmụma akụkọ ihe mere eme ebumnobi ga-ekwe omume? Kedu ka njirimara onye ọkọ akụkọ ihe mere eme, echiche, na oge dị n'oge si emetụta akụkọ ihe mere eme ha na-ede? Ịmụ akụkọ ihe mere eme dị mkpa maka ịtụle arụmụka akụkọ ihe mere eme ọ bụla.
learnUni_history_f0_kp0: Akụkọ ihe mere eme: isi (mepụtara n'oge - akwụkwọ, artefacts, ọnụ na-agba akaebe, foto), nke abụọ (nyocha nke isi mmalite site ọkọ akụkọ ihe mere eme), tertiary (syntheses - akwụkwọ ọgụgụ, encyclopaedias). Nkatọ isi mmalite: ode akwụkwọ, ụbọchị, ndị na-ege ntị, ebumnuche, nhụsianya, nkwenye.
learnUni_history_f0_kp1: Rankean Historyism: History 'dị ka ọ dị n'ezie' (wie es eigentlich gewesen) - ebumnobi mgbake nke gara aga site na isi mmalite. Ọkachamara nke narị afọ nke 19 nke akụkọ ntolite. nkatọ: agaghị ekwe omume ịbụ ebumnuche zuru oke; isi mmalite n'onwe ha bụ akụkụ.
learnUni_history_f0_kp2: Ụlọ akwụkwọ Annales (Braudel, Bloch, Febvre): mgbanwe site na ihe omume na ndị nwoke ukwu gaa na usoro ogologo oge ( longgue durée - geography, Economics, mentalities). Nchịkọta akụkọ ihe mere eme - na-ejikọta akụkụ niile nke ahụmahụ mmadụ. Na-enwe mmetụta dị ukwuu na akụkọ ọha mmadụ.
learnUni_history_f0_kp3: Postmodernism na 'ntụgharị asụsụ': White (Metahistory) - a na-ahazi akụkọ akụkọ ihe mere eme dị ka ụdị edemede (ihe nkiri, ọdachi, ịhụnanya, satire) - ndị ọkọ akụkọ ihe mere eme na-ewu kama ịchọpụta ihe gara aga. Derrida: mebie ederede. Mmetụta: relativism, otutu 'akụkọ ihe mere eme' bara uru.
learnUni_history_f0_kp4: njirimara na akụkọ ihe mere eme: onye akụkọ ihe mere eme? Ndị na-achị obodo dere akụkọ ihe mere eme nke colonial - ọmụmụ nke subaltern (Spivak, Guha) na-eweghachi echiche nke ndị a na-achị. Akụkọ ụmụ nwanyị, akụkọ ojii, akụkọ ọrụ - ha niile gbara akụkọ ọdịnala 'oké nwoke' aka mgba. Ọmụmụ ihe ncheta: ka obodo na-echeta ma chefuo oge gara aga.
learnUni_history_f0_task: Tụlee ụzọ akụkọ ihe mere eme atọ (Rankean positivism, Annales, postmodernism) na ọgwụgwọ ha maka otu ihe omume - dịka ọmụmaatụ. mgbanwe French. Maka usoro ọ bụla: kwupụta usoro isi ya, ajụjụ ndị ọ na-ajụ, isi mmalite/ụzọ ọ na-eji, na ihe ọ ga-emechi. Nyochaa: ebumnuche akụkọ ihe mere eme enwere ike?
learnUni_history_f0_tp0: Nkatọ isi mmalite na isi mmalite
learnUni_history_f1_desc: Ụwa oge ochie rụpụtara ntọala nke mmepeanya ọdịda anyanwụ na Eshia: polis Greek, mba Rome na alaeze ukwu, usoro ndị eze China, obodo Mesopotemia, na alaeze ukwu Egypt. Ịghọta usoro ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị ha, akụ na ụba na omenala ha na-ekpughe mmalite nke ụlọ ọrụ na-adịgide taa - iwu, ọchịchị onye kwuo uche, nkà ihe ọmụma, okpukpe, na obodo obodo.
learnUni_history_f1_kp0: Gris oge ochie: polis (obodo-steeti) dị ka ngalaba ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị bụ isi. Ọchịchị onye kwuo uche Atens (narị afọ nke ise TOA): mgbakọ (ekklesia), kansụl (boule), ụlọikpe iwu. Sparta: militarized oligarchy. Agha ndị Peshia (490–479 TOA). Agha Peloponnesia (431-404 TOA - nyocha eziokwu nke Thucydides). Mmeri Macedonia na ụwa ndị Gris.
learnUni_history_f1_kp1: Rome oge ochie: Republic (509-27 TOA) - SPQR (Senate na Ndị Rom), tribunes, consuls, populares vs. optimates. Julius Caesar, ọdịda nke Republic, Augustus na Principate. Iwu Rome, injinia (ọwa mmiri, okporo ụzọ), na nchịkwa mpaghara. Mbelata na daa - Gibbon, arụmụka Pirenne.
learnUni_history_f1_kp2: Mesopotemia na Egypt: Obodo-obodo Sumeria (ihe odide, ziggurats, Usoro nke Ur-Nammu c.2100 TOA). Usoro Hammurabi (c.1754 TOA) — iwu 282, 'anya maka anya'. Egypt pharaonic ala - Chineke eze, monumental ije. Alaeze ọhụrụ (1550–1070 TOA) - Tutankhamun, Ramesses II.
learnUni_history_f1_kp3: Han China (206 TOA-220 OA): Centralized bureaucracy (Confucian meritocracy site na nyocha ọrụ obodo), Azụmahịa Silk Road, ihe ọhụrụ (akwụkwọ, kompas, seismograph). Tulee ya na Alaeze Ukwu Rome - mmepeanya 'oge gboo' n'otu oge na nsọtụ nke netwọk azụmaahịa.
learnUni_history_f1_kp4: Akụ na ụba oge ochie: ndị na-arụ ọrụ ugbo, yana ọrụ ohu bụ isi na mmepụta Gris na Rom. Azụmahịa dị anya (Silk Road, Mediterranean): ngwongwo okomoko, ọka, ọla. Arụmụka: Echiche Finley 'primitivist' (akụ na ụba oge ochie dị iche iche - enweghị ntụzịaka uto) vs. Scheidel's comparative quantitative approach.
learnUni_history_f1_task: Tụlee usoro ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị nke Athens oge gboo na Rom Republic. Maka nke ọ bụla: kọwapụta ụkpụrụ iwu, chọpụta onye nwere ikike ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị, kọwapụta etu esi kesaa na lelee ike, wee chọpụta ka 'ọchịchị onye kwuo uche' ma ọ bụ 'oligarchic' nke ọ bụla si bụrụ. Nyochaa ihe kpatara usoro abụọ ahụ mechara nye ohere ịchịisi ọchịchị - gịnị ka nke a na-agwa anyị gbasara ọnọdụ ndị dị mkpa maka ọchịchị onye kwuo uche ya?
learnUni_history_f1_tp1: Rome oge ochie: Republic na Alaeze Ukwu
learnUni_history_f1_tp2: Mesopotemia, Egypt, na Han China || Akụkọ ihe mere eme nke oge ochie (1450–1800)
learnUni_history_f2_name: Oge mmalite nke oge a gbanwere ụwa: Renaissance remade art na mmụta, Ndozigharị ahụ kewara Krisendọm, mgbasawanye Europe meghere alaeze ukwu zuru ụwa ọnụ na ahia ohu, na mgbanwe Sayensị gbanwere otú ụmụ mmadụ si aghọta ọdịdị. The Enlightenment weputara echiche ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị - nnwere onwe, ikike, ihe kpatara ya - nke mere mgbanwe mgbanwe America na French.
learnUni_history_f2_desc: The Renaissance (14-17th c.): revival nke oge gboo mmụta, humanism (Erasmus, More - lekwasịrị anya mmadụ nwere kama Chineke ikike), nkà ọhụrụ (Leonardo, Michelangelo, Raphael - echiche, naturalism), obibi akwụkwọ (Gutenberg c.1440 - gbanwere ozi gbasaa).
learnUni_history_f2_kp0: Ndozigharị ahụ (1517): Akwụkwọ 95 Luther - akatọ aka n'ịkwado indulgences, ikike popu, na ogbugbu ndị ụkọchukwu. Sola scriptura, sola fide. Agha ndị nkịtị, Council of Trent, Agha Okpukpe (French: 1562-98, Agha Afọ Iri Atọ: 1618-48 - Udo nke Westphalia 1648 → ụkpụrụ ọchịchị steeti).
learnUni_history_f2_kp1: Mgbasawanye Europe na colonialism: nchọpụta Portuguese na Spanish (1490s-1500s), Columbian Exchange (ihe ọkụkụ, ọrịa, ndị ohu), mmeri nke America (Cortés, Pizarro - ọdachi igwe mmadụ maka ụmụ amaala). Azụmahịa ohu transatlantic: nde ndị Africa 12 bụ ndị ohu, nde 2 nwụrụ na-agafe.
learnUni_history_f2_kp2: Scientific mgbanwe (16-17th c.): Copernicus (heliocentrism, 1543), Galileo (mechanics na teliskop), Kepler (planetary iwu), Newton (Principia Mathematica 1687 - eluigwe na ala gravitation, iwu nke ngagharị). Usoro ọhụrụ: nnwale, mgbakọ na mwepụ, obi abụọ nke ikike oge ochie.
learnUni_history_f2_kp3: The Enlightenment (18th c.): echiche, nnwere onwe, na ọganihu. Locke (ikike eke, ọchịchị site na nkwenye), Voltaire (nnwere onwe okpukperechi, nnwere onwe ikwu okwu), Rousseau (ndụ izugbe), Montesquieu (nkewa nke ike). Mgbanwe nke America (1776 - mmetụta Locke na nkwupụta nke nnwere onwe), mgbanwe French (1789 - Liberté, Égalité, Fraternité).
learnUni_history_f2_kp4: Nyochaa ihe kpatara mgbanwe mgbanwe nke French nke 1789. Jiri nyocha nke ọtụtụ ihe kpatara ya: (a) ihe kpatara nhazi ogologo oge (nsogbu ego, enweghị ahaghị nhata n'okpuru usoro ụlọ, echiche nke ìhè), (b) ihe na-akpata obere oge (ọdịda owuwe ihe ubi, nsogbu Estates-General), (c) ọrụ nke echiche vs ọnọdụ ihe onwunwe. Nyochaa otu ihe ị chere kacha mkpa, ma chebe azịza gị megide nkọwa ọzọ.
learnUni_history_f2_tp2: Akụkọ ụwa nke oge a (1914-ugbu a)
learnUni_history_f3_name: Narị afọ nke 20 na 21 wetara mbibi a na-enwetụbeghị ụdị ya (agha ụwa abụọ, mgbukpọ, ngwa agha nuklia) tinyere ọganihu pụrụ iche (ịchịkwa ọchịchị, ikike mmadụ, mgbanwe teknụzụ). Ịghọta oge a chọrọ itinye aka na isi mmalite, nkọwa ndị na-asọrịta mpi, na ihe nketa na-edozibeghị nke na-akpụzi ugbu a.
learnUni_history_f3_desc: Agha Ụwa Mbụ (1914-1918): na-akpata arụmụka - esemokwu Fischer (Mmegide German na agha Aims) vs. Albertini (miscalculation na Alliance entrapment). Trench agha, mbibi teknụzụ (~ 17 nde nwụrụ anwụ). Treaty of Versailles (1919): okwu ikpe ikpe agha, nkwụghachi - 'mkpụrụ nke WWII' tesis.
learnUni_history_f3_kp0: Totalitarianism: Nazi Germany (Hitler - echiche agbụrụ, Führerprinzip, mgbukpọ - Oké Mgbukpọ, 6 nde ndị Juu; mkpokọta agha na Oké Mgbukpọ dị ka intentionalist vs. functionalist historiographical arụmụka). Soviet Union (Stalin - mkpokọta, gulags, oké ụjọ). Hannah Arendt's 'Mmalite nke Totalitarianism'.
learnUni_history_f3_kp1: Decolonization (1945-1975): mmegharị nnwere onwe n'ofe Eshia, Africa, na Caribbean. Nnwere onwe na nkebi India (1947 - ime ihe ike, ~ 1 nde nwụrụ). Agha Algeria (1954-62). Nsogbu Congo. Ọnọdụ Agha Nzuzo: USA na USSR abụọ na-emegide colonial na nkwupụta okwu mana kwadoro ndị mmekọ ọchịchị. Neo-colonialism: nnwere onwe ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị na-enweghị nnwere onwe akụ na ụba.
learnUni_history_f3_kp2: Agha Nzuzo (1947-1991): echiche, akụ na ụba, na ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị n'etiti USA na USSR. Ozizi njide (Kennan), Agha Korea, Crisis Missile Crisis (1962 - kacha nso na agha nuklia), Agha Vietnam, Détente, agbụrụ Reagan. USSR ọdịda (1991): Gorbachev's glasnost/perestroika, ọdịda nke Berlin Wall (1989).
learnUni_history_f3_kp3: Post-1991 ụwa: unipolarity (Fukuyama's 'End of History' vs. Huntington's 'Clash of Civilisations'), 9/11 na Agha na Ụjọ, 2008 nsogbu ego, Arab Spring, ịrị elu nke China, COVID-19 oria ojoo, nsogbu ihu igwe. Ijikọ ụwa ọnụ na enweghị afọ ojuju ya - populism, ahaghị nhata, na azụ azụ megide mba ụwa na-emesapụ aka.
learnUni_history_f3_kp4: Tụlee ihe kpatara Oké Mgbukpọ ahụ. Edemede gị kwesịrị: (a) itinye aka na arụmụka akụkọ ihe mere eme nke ebumnuche / functionalism, (b) nyochaa ọnọdụ nhazi (antisemitism, ike steeti, agha) n'akụkụ ụlọ ọrụ (ọrụ Hitler, SS, ndị na-ege ntị), (c) jiri ma ọ dịkarịa ala atọ isi mmalite ma ọ bụ nke abụọ, (d) nyochaa ma Oké Mgbukpọ ahụ bụ ihe pụrụ iche nke oge a (Modern) Oké Mgbukpọ') ma ọ bụ n'ụzọ bụ isi sitere na echiche ndị Nazi dị oke egwu.
learnUni_history_f3_task: Assess the causes of the Holocaust. Your essay should: (a) engage with the intentionalism/functionalism historiographical debate, (b) analyse the structural conditions (antisemitism, state power, war) alongside agency (Hitler's role, the SS, bystanders), (c) use at least three primary or secondary sources, (d) evaluate whether the Holocaust was a uniquely modern phenomenon (Bauman's 'Modernity and the Holocaust') or primarily a result of extreme Nazi ideology.
learnUni_history_f3_tp0: Agha Ụwa na ọchịchị aka ike
learnUni_history_f3_tp2: Ụwa Post-1991 na ihe ịma aka dị ugbu a
learnUni_philosophy_f0_desc: Epistemology bụ ngalaba nke nkà ihe ọmụma nke metụtara ihe ọmụma - ọdịdị ya, isi mmalite ya, oke ya na oke ya. Gịnị ka ịmara ihe pụtara? Olee otú anyị si mara ọdịiche dị n'ihe ọmụma na nkwenkwe nkịtị? Kedu isi mmalite nke ihe ọmụma (ihe kpatara, ahụmahụ, akaebe)? Ajụjụ ndị a na-ejikọta na enweghị obi abụọ, sayensị, na omume akụkọ kwa ụbọchị.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp0: Ntụle ọdịnala nke ihe ọmụma: onye S maara na P iff (i) P bụ eziokwu, (ii) S kwere P, (iii) S bụ ezi omume na ikwere P. The justified true faith (JTB) akaụntụ. Gettier (1963): ihe atụ na-egosi na JTB ezughi oke maka ihe ọmụma - nsogbu Gettier welitere afọ 60 nke nzaghachi.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp1: Isi mmalite nke ihe ọmụma: empiricism (Locke, Hume, Berkley) - ihe ọmụma niile sitere na ahụmahụ; enweghị ebumpụta ụwa echiche. Rationalism (Descartes, Leibniz, Kant) - ụfọdụ ihe ọmụma bụ a priori (tupu ahụmahụ), dabere na ihe kpatara ya. Njikọ Kant: uche na-etinye edemede (ohere, oge, ihe kpatara) na ahụmahụ.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp2: Nkwenye: Usoro obi abụọ nke Descartes - Arụmụka Ọjọọ Demon - naanị 'cogito ergo sum' na-adịgide ndụ obi abụọ. Pyrrhonia enweghị obi abụọ: kwụsịtụ ikpe n'ihe niile na-apụtaghị ìhè. Oge dị ugbu a: Ụbụrụ Putnam na vat, Moore's 'ebe a bụ aka' nzaghachi ezi uche, okwu okwu.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp3: Ọmụma Sayensị: Nghọta nke Popper - sayensị na-aga n'ihu site na nkwubi okwu siri ike na mbọ siri ike ịgha ụgha, ọ bụghị site na ntinye. Ngbanwe nke Kuhn - sayensị nkịtị nke mgbanwe gbanwere. Lakatos: mmemme nyocha (ike siri ike + eriri nchekwa). Feyerabend: 'ihe ọ bụla na-aga' - epistemological anarchism.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp4: Ọmụmụ ihe gbasara mmekọrịta ọha na eze na akaebe: ọtụtụ ihe anyị maara sitere na ndị ọzọ. Ịgba akaebe bụ isi ihe ọmụma (mgbochi mbelata - Coady). Mana nleba anya nke ndị ọchịchị, nzacha afụ, na nghọtahie ndị ọkachamara na-ebute ihe ịma aka dị egwu. Epistemic ikpe na-ezighị ezi (Fricker): ikpe na-ezighị ezi akaebe (na-enye obere ntụkwasị obi n'ihi ajọ mbunobi), ikpe na-ezighị ezi nke hermeneutical (enweghị echiche iji ghọta ahụmahụ nke onwe ya).
learnUni_philosophy_f0_task: Nyochaa nke ọma nzọrọ na enweghị ike ịgbagha enweghị obi abụọ. Na azịza gị: (a) kwuo arụmụka arụmụka Descartes (nrọ, mmụọ ọjọọ) na nzaghachi cogito, (b) na-eweta ezi uche nke Moore na nzaghachi 'On Certainty' nke Wittgenstein, (c) kọwapụta ọnọdụ ihe omimi ma chọpụta ma ọ na-agbaze ma ọ bụ na-ezere nsogbu ahụ, (d) tụlee ma ọ bụrụ na ọ na-agbagha ihe ọ bụla na-eme ihe ọmụma kwa ụbọchị.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_tp0: Ọdịdị na isi mmalite nke ihe ọmụma
learnUni_philosophy_f0_tp1: Obi abụọ na ihe ọmụma sayensị
learnUni_philosophy_f0_tp2: Ọmụmụ mmụta mmekọrịta ọha na eze na akaebe
learnUni_philosophy_f1_name: Ụkpụrụ omume na nkà ihe ọmụma omume
learnUni_philosophy_f1_desc: Ụkpụrụ omume na-enyocha ọdịdị nke omume na otú anyị kwesịrị isi na-eme omume. Echiche ụkpụrụ omume atọ ndị bụ isi - consequentialism, deontology, na ụkpụrụ omume ọma - na-enye azịza dị iche iche. Metaethics na-ajụ ma nkwupụta omume ọ bụ eziokwu ka ọ bụ ụgha, ma ọ bụrụ otu ahụ, n'echiche dị aṅaa. Ụkpụrụ omume etinyere n'ọrụ na-eji tiori lebara ezigbo nsogbu omume anya na ọgwụ, ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị, na gburugburu ebe obibi.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp0: Utilitarianism (Bentham, Mill): omume ziri ezi na-ebuli oke obi ụtọ / ịba uru (nke kachasị mma maka ọnụ ọgụgụ kacha ukwuu). Act utilitarianism (nke ọ bụla omume na-ekpe ikpe site na ya pụta) vs. rule utilitarianism (soro iwu na-n'ozuzu na-ebuli ịba uru). Mmegide: ikpe ziri ezi (owuwe ihe ubi), iguzosi ike n'ezi ihe, ịchọ ihe.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp1: Kantian deontology: uru omume sitere na ebumnobi (ọrụ, ọ bụghị nsonaazụ). Nkeji dị mkpa: (1) mee naanị n'oke oke ị nwere ike ime ka ụwa niile, (2) na-emeso ndị mmadụ ihe mgbe niile dị ka ebumnuche n'ime onwe ha, ọ bụghị naanị dị ka ihe efu, (3) mee ihe dị ka onye so n'alaeze nke njedebe. Ọrụ zuru oke (dịka ọmụmaatụ anaghị agha ụgha) vs. ọrụ ezughị okè (bụ ndị ọrụ ebere mgbe enwere ike).
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp2: Ụkpụrụ omume ọma (Aristotle): lekwasị anya na agwa karịa iwu ma ọ bụ nsonaazụ. Omume ọma (obi ike, ikpe ziri ezi, obi ike, amamihe) bụ ndị kwụsiri ike na-eme ihe nke ọma, enwetara site na omume (eudaimonia - mmadụ na-eto eto dị ka ihe mgbaru ọsọ). Ozizi nke pụtara: omume ọma dị n'etiti oke ngafe na ụkọ.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp3: Metaethics: eziokwu nke omume (Ezigbo omume ebumnobi dị adị - Moore's non-naturalism, Cornell realism), omume mgbochi omume (nkwupụta njehie: Mackie - nkwupụta omume niile bụ ụgha; expressivism: Ayer, Blackburn - nkwupụta omume na-egosipụta àgwà; relativism: omume dịgasị iche n'etiti omenala). Nsogbu ekwesịrị (Hume): enweghị ike iwepụta 'ihe' site na 'bụ'.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp4: Applied ethics: ite ime (mmadụ, aru autonomy - Thomson's violinist), euthanasia (autonomy vs. nsọ nke ndụ, na-amị amị slope), ikpe ziri ezi zuru ụwa ọnụ (Onye na-agụ egwú - ndị bara ọgaranya na-amanye inye iji belata ịda ogbenye zuru ụwa ọnụ; Rawls - ụwa dị iche ụkpụrụ), ụkpụrụ anụmanụ (Arụmọrụ Singer's util).
learnUni_philosophy_f1_task: Nsogbu nke trolley: trolley na-agba ọsọ ga-egbu mmadụ 5 ọ gwụla ma ị tụgharịrị ya n'akụkụ egwu ebe ọ ga-egbu 1. (a) Gịnị ka nke ọ bụla n'ime ụkpụrụ omume atọ ahụ bụ́ isi kwuru na i kwesịrị ime, n'ihi gịnịkwa? (b) N'ụdị 'footbridge', ị nwere ike ịkwụsị ụgbọ ala ahụ site n'ịchụpụ nnukwu mmadụ na akwa mmiri. Nke a ọ na-agbanwe azịza gị? Gịnị kpatara ma ọ bụ gịnị kpatara ya? (c) Gịnị ka eziokwu ahụ bụ́ na ihe ka ọtụtụ ná ndị mmadụ na-agbanwe na nke mbụ, ma ọ bụghị nke abụọ na-agwa anyị banyere ụkpụrụ omume nke uche (kama ịbụ ezi uche)?
learnUni_philosophy_f2_desc: Nkà ihe ọmụma nke uche na-enyocha ọdịdị nke ọnọdụ uche - nsụhọ, ebumnobi, na mmekọrịta uche na ahụ. Nsogbu siri ike nke nsụhọ na-ajụ ihe kpatara enwere ahụmịhe nke onwe ma ọlị. Ịrụ ọrụ, anụ ahụ, na dualism na-enye akaụntụ asọmpi. Arụmụka ndị a nwere mkpa kpọmkwem na ọgụgụ isi na nkà mmụta sayensị.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp0: Nsogbu uche-ahụ: ihe dualism (Descartes - uche na ahụ bụ ihe dị iche iche; nsogbu mmekọrịta), ihe onwunwe dualism (ihe ndị na-eche echiche bụ ihe na-abụghị anụ ahụ nke ụbụrụ), physicalism / materialism (echiche uche bụ otu ma ọ bụ ghọtara site na ụbụrụ anụ ahụ). Ikpochapụ ihe onwunwe (Churchland) - ndị mmadụ akparamaagwa bụ ụgha; neuroscience ga-anọchi ya.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp1: Functionalism (Putnam, Fodor): A na-akọwa ọnọdụ uche site na ọrụ ha na-arụ ọrụ (mmekọrịta ntinye-mmekọrịta), ọ bụghị mkpụrụ nke anụ ahụ ha. Otutu ezi uche: enwere ike imezu otu ọnọdụ uche site na sistemu anụ ahụ dị iche iche (silicon yana neurons). Mmegide: Ned Block's qualia tụgharịrị, qualia na-anọghị.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp2: Amamihe na qualia: qulia bụ ihe gbasara onwe ya, ihe dị egwu nke ahụmahụ ('ihe ọ dị ka' ịhụ ọbara ọbara, na-enwe mmetụta mgbu). Nsogbu siri ike (Chalmers): ọbụlagodi akụkọ anụ ahụ zuru oke nke ụbụrụ agaghị akọwa ihe kpatara enwere ahụmịhe nke onwe. Nnwale echiche zombie nke nkà ihe ọmụma: ịbụ ihe yiri m n'anụ ahụ mana enweghị mmụọ.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp3: Ebumnuche: 'ihe gbasara' nke ọnọdụ uche - nkwenye na ọchịchọ bụ gbasara ihe. Brentano: ịkpachapụ anya bụ akara nke uche. Arụmụka ọnụ ụlọ China nke Searle megide AI siri ike: kọmpụta na-emegharị akara anaghị aghọta - ọ nweghị ebumnuche. Nzaghachi Dennett: ebumnuche kpachapụrụ anya.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp4: Njirimara onwe onye: kedu ihe na-eme gị otu onye ka oge na-aga? Ọganihu nke mmụọ (Locke - ebe nchekwa; Parfit - njikọ nke uche na ịga n'ihu, enweghị eziokwu miri emi banyere njirimara), ịdịgide ndụ ndụ (ụbụrụ), njirimara akụkọ (Ricoeur). Parfit's 'kewara anyị guzoro': ikpe fission na-egosi njirimara onwe onye abụghị ihe dị mkpa - nlanarị bụ ihe dị mkpa.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_task: Kọwaa nsogbu siri ike nke nsụhọ na ihe kpatara anụ ahụ ji alụso ya ọgụ. (a) Kwupụta nsogbu ahụ kpọmkwem (Chalmers). (b) Wepụta nzaghachi abụọ nke anụ ahụ (dịka ụdị echiche njirimara, echiche dị elu nke nsụhọ) na ihe mgbochi. (c) Nyochaa ma zombies nkà ihe ọmụma bụ echiche na ihe na-esote ma ọ bụrụ na ha bụ. (d) Kwurịta ihe gbasara nsogbu siri ike maka ọgụgụ isi - AI ọ nwere ike mara nke ọma?
learnUni_philosophy_f3_name: Nkà ihe ọmụma ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị
learnUni_philosophy_f3_desc: Nkà ihe ọmụma ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị na-enyocha ntọala iwu nke ụlọ ọrụ ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị - ihe na-akwado ikike obodo, gịnị bụ ikpe ziri ezi, kedu ka a ga-esi kesaa ike ọchịchị? Site na ndị eze ọkà ihe ọmụma Plato ruo na mkpuchi amaghị nke Rawls ruo na nnwere onwe nke Nozick, usoro ndị a na-ewepụta akụkọ dị iche iche nke ọchịchị ziri ezi na ọha mmadụ.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp0: Na-akwado steeti: omenala nkwekọrịta mmekọrịta. Hobbes (Leviathan, 1651): na-enweghị steeti, ndụ bụ 'ogbenye, ogbenye, mkparị, obi ọjọọ, na mkpụmkpụ'; ndị ọrụ ezi uche na-ekwekọrịta ịhapụ nnwere onwe eke maka nchekwa. Locke: ọnọdụ nke ọdịdị dị udo; steeti e guzobere iji chebe ikike okike (ndụ, nnwere onwe, ihe onwunwe); ọchịchị site na nkwenye, mgbanwe ziri ezi ma ọ bụrụ na ọ na-emebi ikike.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp1: Rousseau (Nkwekọrịta mmekọrịta, 1762): izugbe ga - ihe ụmụ amaala ga-eme maka ọdịmma ọha, dị iche na uche mmadụ niile (nchikota nke ọdịmma onwe onye). Ikike ziri ezi chọrọ ọchịchị onye kwuo uche ya na-ekere òkè. Mwepu: ihe onwunwe na-emepụta ahaghị nhata ma mebie ịdị mma eke.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp2: Rawls (Theory of Justice, 1971): ọnọdụ mbụ + mkpuchi nke amaghị ihe - ndị ọrụ ezi uche na-ahọrọ ụkpụrụ n'amaghị ọnọdụ mmekọrịta ha. Ụkpụrụ abụọ: (1) nnwere onwe nha nhata, (2) ụkpụrụ dị iche - ahaghị nhata kwere naanị ma ọ bụrụ na ha na-erite uru nke kacha nta. Nkà ihe ọmụma ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị nnwere onwe kacha emetụta na narị afọ nke 20.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp3: Nozick (Anarchy, State, na Utopia, 1974): nzaghachi nnwere onwe nye Rawls. Ozizi ikike: naanị nkesa = enwetara site na mbufe ma ọ bụ nweta mbụ. Obere steeti bụ steeti akwadoro kacha gbasaa. Ụkpụrụ nkesa nke a haziri ahazi (dị ka Rawls') chọrọ imebi ikike onye ọ bụla na-aga n'ihu.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp4: Ihe ịma aka ndị dị ugbu a: mmekọrịta mmadụ na ibe ya (MacIntyre, Sandel, Taylor) - nnwere onwe onye n'otu n'otu na-eleghara iwu obodo nke njirimara anya; obodo, omenala na ngwa ahịa nkekọrịta ihe. Feminism: Wollstonecraft, Beauvoir ('mmekọahụ nke abụọ'), Okin - echiche liberal na-eleghara usoro okike nke mpaghara 'onwe' anya. Postcolonialism: Fanon - nkà ihe ọmụma ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị ọdịda anyanwụ na-eleghara ime ihe ike colonial anya.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_task: Rawls na Nozick nọchitere anya abụọ n'ime amamihe ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị narị afọ nke 20 kacha mkpa. (a) Kọwaa ọnọdụ mbụ Rawls na ụkpụrụ abụọ nke ikpe ziri ezi. (b) Kọwaa ozizi ikike ikike Nozick na arụmụka Wilt Chamberlain. (c) Chọpụta nnukwu nghọtahie dị n'etiti ha gbasara ụdị ikpe ziri ezi. (d) Iji ihe atụ pụtara ìhè (dịka ngbanwe akụ na ụba site n'ụtụ ụtụ isi), gosi otu onye ọkà ihe ọmụma ọ bụla ga-eche echiche. Mechie n'ọnọdụ ziri ezi nke gị.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_tp0: Echiche nkwekọrịta mmekọrịta ọha na eze
learnUni_philosophy_f4_desc: Metaphysics na-enyocha akụkụ kachasị mkpa nke eziokwu: ihe dị, kedu ihe bụ isi nke ịbụ, enwere nnwere onwe ime nhọrọ, gịnị bụ oge, enwere ihe adịghị adị? Ontology bụ ọmụmụ nke ịbụ ndị dị otú ahụ. Ndị a bụ ajụjụ na-adịghị ahụkebe na nkà ihe ọmụma, ma azịza ha nwere nsonaazụ maka sayensị, ụkpụrụ omume, na ndụ kwa ụbọchị.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp0: Ịdị adị na ontology: Nkọwa Quine - ịbụ bụ uru nke agbanwe agbanwe. Kedu ụdị ontological dị? Pụrụ iche (ihe ndị mmadụ n'otu n'otu) vs. universals (ihe onwunwe, mmekọrịta - realism: universals adị n'adabereghị; nominalism: nanị nkọwa dị).
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp1: Free will and determinism: ike determinism (ihe niile na-akpata ekpebi → enweghị nnwere onwe), compatibilism (free will dakọtara na determinism — free action = uncoerced site na mpụga ihe, ọbụna ma ọ bụrụ na e kpebisiri ike, Frankfurt hierarchical mesh theory), libertarian free will (agent causation, indeterminism). Ihe ịma aka Neuroscience: Nnwale Libet na-egosi ọrụ akwara na-ebute ebumnobi nke ọma.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp2: Ọdịdị nke oge: A-usoro (tensed - gara aga, ugbu a, n'ọdịnihu) vs. B-usoro (tenseless - tupu / mgbe e mesịrị / simultaneous). Presentism (naanị ugbu a dị), ebighị ebi / akụkụ anọ (n'oge gara aga, ugbu a, na n'ọdịnihu dị adị n'ezie - 'ihe mgbochi eluigwe na ala'). Nkwekọrịta nke ihe ịma aka ime otu oge ugbu a.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp3: Modality na ụwa nwere ike: semantics ụwa nwere ike (Lewis) - nkwupụta modal na-eme ka ọ bụrụ eziokwu site na ihe bụ ikpe na ụwa nwere ike ime. Ezi modal eziokwu: ụwa niile enwere ike dị. Eziokwu: naanị ụwa n'ezie dị; ụwa nwere ike ịbụ ihe nkịtị (Plantinga). A na-eji nyochaa ihe ndị na-emegiderịta onwe ha, mkpa, na isi.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp4: Ihe kpatara: Humean mgbe niile (ihe kpatara = njikọ mgbe niile - enweghị njikọ dị mkpa). Counterfactual analysis (Lewis): C kpatara E iff na ụwa kacha nso nwere ike ime ebe C adịghị eme, E anaghị eme. Theory Interventionist (Woodward): C na-akpata E ma ọ bụrụ na itinye aka na C ga-agbanwe E. Causal ike (Armstrong, Nnụnụ): echiche bụ ontologically mbụ.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_task: Enwere nnwere onwe ọ dakọtara na determinism? Dee edemede nkà ihe ọmụma ahaziri ahazi: (a) kọwapụta determinism ma chọpụta ihe na-adịghị mma na nnwere onwe nnwere onwe, (b) gosi nzaghachi compatibilist - ịmata ọdịiche dị na 'ekpebisi ike' site na ịbụ 'mmanye', na-ezo aka Frankfurt ma ọ bụ Dennett, (c) na-eweta mmegide na-adaghị adaba (nsonaazụ arụmụka - van Inwagen) na nyocha nke gị (d) nyocha nke onwe gị. nke arụmụka. Buru n'uche maka arụmụka nkà ihe ọmụma ziri ezi n'oge niile.
